title: 昨天做了什麼
scenario: talking about what you did yesterday

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你昨天做了什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuótiān zuò le shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zuo2tian1 zuo4 le5 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What did you do yesterday?
turns.translation_ko: 어제 뭐 하셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我昨天早上先起床，然後刷牙洗臉，再吃早餐。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān zǎoshang xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu shuāyá xǐliǎn, zài chī zǎocān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo2tian1 zao3shang5 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, zai4 chi1 zao3can1.
turns.translation_en: Yesterday morning I first got up, then brushed my teeth and washed my face, and then ate breakfast.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 이를 닦고 세수한 다음, 아침을 먹었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 然後呢？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 ne5?
turns.translation_en: And then?
turns.translation_ko: 그리고요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後我去公司上班，中午吃午餐，下午繼續工作。
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu wǒ qù gōngsī shàngbān, zhōngwǔ chī wǔcān, xiàwǔ jìxù gōngzuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 wo3 qu4 gong1si1 shang4ban1, zhong1wu3 chi1 wu3can1, xia4wu3 ji4xu4 gong1zuo4.
turns.translation_en: Then I went to the company to work, ate lunch at noon, and continued working in the afternoon.
turns.translation_ko: 그리고 회사에 출근해서 점심을 먹고, 오후에는 계속 일했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你下班以後做了什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiàbān yǐhòu zuò le shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 zuo4 le5 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What did you do after work?
turns.translation_ko: 퇴근 후에는 뭐 하셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我下班以後先回家，然後煮飯吃晚餐，最後看電視休息。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiàbān yǐhòu xiān huíjiā, ránhòu zhǔfàn chī wǎncān, zuìhòu kàn diànshì xiūxí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 xian1 hui2jia1, ran2hou4 zhu3fan4 chi1 wan3can1, zui4hou4 kan4 dian4shi4 xiu1xi5.
turns.translation_en: After work I first went home, then cooked and ate dinner, and finally watched TV and rested.
turns.translation_ko: 퇴근 후에 먼저 집에 가서, 밥을 해서 저녁을 먹고, 마지막으로 TV를 보며 쉬었어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did B do after getting up yesterday morning?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 어제 아침에 일어난 후 무엇을 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Listen to each sentence and repeat it aloud, trying to match the tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about what you did yesterday. Use words like 先, 然後, and 最後.

title: 昨天晚餐吃了什麼
scenario: talking about what you did yesterday

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你昨天晚餐吃了什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuótiān wǎncān chī le shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zuo2tian1 wan3can1 chi1 le5 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What did you eat for dinner yesterday?
turns.translation_ko: 어제 저녁에 무엇을 드셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我昨天晚餐吃了牛肉麵，還點了一份小菜。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān wǎncān chī le niúròumiàn, hái diǎn le yī fèn xiǎocài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo2tian1 wan3can1 chi1 le5 niu2rou4mian4, hai2 dian3 le5 yi1 fen4 xiao3cai4.
turns.translation_en: I ate beef noodles for dinner yesterday, and also ordered a side dish.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 저녁에 소고기 국수를 먹었고, 반찬도 하나 주문했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 牛肉麵好吃嗎？
turns.pinyin: Niúròumiàn hǎochī ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Niu2rou4mian4 hao3chi1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Was the beef noodles delicious?
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수는 맛있었어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 很好吃，可是有點辣。我點的是招牌牛肉麵。
turns.pinyin: Hěn hǎochī, kěshì yǒudiǎn là. Wǒ diǎn de shì zhāopái niúròumiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hen3 hao3chi1, ke3shi4 you3dian3 la4. Wo3 dian3 de5 shi4 zhao1pai2 niu2rou4mian4.
turns.translation_en: It was delicious, but a little spicy. I ordered the signature beef noodles.
turns.translation_ko: 아주 맛있었는데, 조금 매웠어요. 시그니처 소고기 국수를 주문했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你喜歡吃辣嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuān chī là ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xi3huan1 chi1 la4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Do you like eating spicy food?
turns.translation_ko: 매운 음식 좋아하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我喜歡吃一點辣，可是不要太辣。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān chī yīdiǎn là, kěshì bùyào tài là.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi3huan1 chi1 yi1dian3 la4, ke3shi4 bu4yao4 tai4 la4.
turns.translation_en: I like eating a little spicy, but not too spicy.
turns.translation_ko: 조금 매운 건 좋아하는데, 너무 맵지는 않았으면 좋겠어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did B eat for dinner yesterday?

shadowing_prompt: Listen to each sentence and repeat it aloud, focusing on the tones and natural pauses.
free_response_prompt: Tell me what you ate for dinner yesterday. Was it delicious? Was it spicy?

title: 昨天出門去了哪裡
scenario: talking about what you did yesterday

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你昨天出門去了哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuótiān chūmén qù le nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zuo2tian1 chu1men2 qu4 le5 na3li3?
turns.translation_en: Where did you go out to yesterday?
turns.translation_ko: 어디에 외출하셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我昨天下午出門去公園散步，然後去商店買菜。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān xiàwǔ chūmén qù gōngyuán sànbù, ránhòu qù shāngdiàn mǎicài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo2tian1 xia4wu3 chu1men2 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4, ran2hou4 qu4 shang1dian4 mai3cai4.
turns.translation_en: Yesterday afternoon I went out to the park for a walk, and then went to the store to buy groceries.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 오후에 공원에 산책하러 나갔다가, 가게에 가서 장을 봤어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 公園人多嗎？
turns.pinyin: Gōngyuán rén duō ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Gong1yuan2 ren2 duo1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Were there many people in the park?
turns.translation_ko: 공원에 사람이 많았어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 人不多，很安靜，天氣也很舒服。
turns.pinyin: Rén bù duō, hěn ānjìng, tiānqì yě hěn shūfú.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ren2 bu4 duo1, hen3 an1jing4, tian1qi4 ye3 hen3 shu1fu2.
turns.translation_en: There weren't many people, it was very quiet, and the weather was also very comfortable.
turns.translation_ko: 사람이 많지 않고, 아주 조용했으며, 날씨도 아주 쾌적했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你買了什麼菜？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ mǎi le shénme cài?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 mai3 le5 shen2 me0 cai4?
turns.translation_en: What groceries did you buy?
turns.translation_ko: 무슨 채소를 샀어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我買了青菜、雞蛋和水果，然後回家煮飯。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ mǎi le qīngcài, jīdàn hé shuǐguǒ, ránhòu huíjiā zhǔfàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 mai3 le5 qing1cai4, ji1dan4 he2 shui3guo3, ran2hou4 hui2jia1 zhu3fan4.
turns.translation_en: I bought greens, eggs, and fruit, and then went home to cook.
turns.translation_ko: 채소, 계란, 과일을 샀고, 집에 가서 밥을 했어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where did B go first yesterday afternoon?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 어제 오후에 먼저 어디에 갔습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Listen to each sentence and repeat it aloud, paying attention to the flow of the conversation.
free_response_prompt: Tell me where you went out to yesterday. What did you do there? Was the weather nice?

title: 昨天做了什麼？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你昨天做了什麼？可以從頭開始說嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuótiān zuò le shénme? Kěyǐ cóng tóu kāishǐ shuō ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zuo2tian1 zuo4 le shen2 me0? Ke3yi3 cong2 tou2 kai1shi3 shuo1 ma?
turns.translation_en: What did you do yesterday? Can you tell me from the beginning?
turns.translation_ko: 어제 뭐 하셨어요? 처음부터 말씀해 주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好。昨天早上我先起床，然後刷牙洗臉，接著吃早餐。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo. Zuótiān zǎoshang wǒ xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu shuāyá xǐliǎn, jiēzhe chī zǎocān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3. Zuo2tian1 zao3shang4 wo3 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, jie1zhe5 chi1 zao3can1.
turns.translation_en: Okay. Yesterday morning I first got up, then brushed my teeth and washed my face, and then ate breakfast.
turns.translation_ko: 네. 어제 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 이를 닦고 세수한 다음에 아침을 먹었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 然後呢？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 ne5?
turns.translation_en: And then?
turns.translation_ko: 그다음에는요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後我去公司上班，中午吃午餐，下午繼續工作，最後下班回家。
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu wǒ qù gōngsī shàngbān, zhōngwǔ chī wǔcān, xiàwǔ jìxù gōngzuò, zuìhòu xiàbān huí jiā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 wo3 qu4 gong1si1 shang4ban1, zhong1wu3 chi1 wu3can1, xia4wu3 ji4xu4 gong1zuo4, zui4hou4 xia4ban1 hui2 jia1.
turns.translation_en: Then I went to the company to work, ate lunch at noon, continued working in the afternoon, and finally got off work and went home.
turns.translation_ko: 그다음에 회사에 출근해서, 점심에 점심을 먹고, 오후에 계속 일하다가, 마지막으로 퇴근해서 집에 갔어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽起來很忙。你昨天有做別的事情嗎？
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn máng. Nǐ zuótiān yǒu zuò bié de shìqing ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 mang2. Ni3 zuo2tian1 you3 zuo4 bie2 de shi4qing5 ma?
turns.translation_en: Sounds busy. Did you do anything else yesterday?
turns.translation_ko: 바쁘셨나 봐요. 어제 다른 일도 하셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有。回家以後，我先休息一下，然後看電視，接著洗澡，最後睡覺。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu. Huí jiā yǐhòu, wǒ xiān xiūxi yīxià, ránhòu kàn diànshì, jiēzhe xǐzǎo, zuìhòu shuìjiào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3. Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4, wo3 xian1 xiu1xi5 yi1xia4, ran2hou4 kan4 dian4shi4, jie1zhe5 xi3zao3, zui4hou4 shui4jiao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes. After going home, I first rested a bit, then watched TV, then took a shower, and finally slept.
turns.translation_ko: 네. 집에 돌아와서, 먼저 좀 쉬고, 그다음에 TV를 보고, 이어서 샤워하고, 마지막으로 잤어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the person do after getting up yesterday morning?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 어제 아침에 일어난 후에 무엇을 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the sequence words like 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.
free_response_prompt: Tell a short story about what you did yesterday, using 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.

title: 下班後做什麼？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你下班以後都做什麼？可以說一下順序嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiàbān yǐhòu dōu zuò shénme? Kěyǐ shuō yīxià shùnxù ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 dou1 zuo4 shen2 me0? Ke3yi3 shuo1 yi1xia4 shun4xu4 ma?
turns.translation_en: What do you usually do after work? Can you tell me the sequence?
turns.translation_ko: 퇴근 후에 보통 뭐 하세요? 순서를 말씀해 주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好。我下班以後，先走路去捷運站，然後搭捷運回家。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo. Wǒ xiàbān yǐhòu, xiān zǒulù qù jiéyùn zhàn, ránhòu dā jiéyùn huí jiā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3. Wo3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4, xian1 zou3lu4 qu4 jie2yun4 zhan4, ran2hou4 da1 jie2yun4 hui2 jia1.
turns.translation_en: Okay. After work, I first walk to the MRT station, then take the MRT home.
turns.translation_ko: 네. 퇴근 후에, 먼저 걸어서 지하철역에 가고, 그다음에 지하철을 타고 집에 가요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 回家以後呢？
turns.pinyin: Huí jiā yǐhòu ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4 ne5?
turns.translation_en: And after going home?
turns.translation_ko: 집에 돌아간 다음에는요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 回家以後，我先休息一下，然後吃晚餐，接著看書，最後準備明天的工作。
turns.pinyin: Huí jiā yǐhòu, wǒ xiān xiūxi yīxià, ránhòu chī wǎncān, jiēzhe kàn shū, zuìhòu zhǔnbèi míngtiān de gōngzuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4, wo3 xian1 xiu1xi5 yi1xia4, ran2hou4 chi1 wan3can1, jie1zhe5 kan4 shu1, zui4hou4 zhun3bei4 ming2tian1 de gong1zuo4.
turns.translation_en: After going home, I first rest a bit, then eat dinner, then read a book, and finally prepare for tomorrow's work.
turns.translation_ko: 집에 돌아가면, 먼저 좀 쉬고, 그다음에 저녁을 먹고, 이어서 책을 보고, 마지막으로 내일 일을 준비해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你每天都是這樣嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān dōu shì zhèyàng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 mei3tian1 dou1 shi4 zhe4yang4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Do you do this every day?
turns.translation_ko: 매일 이렇게 하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 差不多。有時候會先洗澡再看書。
turns.pinyin: Chàbùduō. Yǒu shíhou huì xiān xǐzǎo zài kàn shū.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Cha4bu4duo1. You3 shi2hou4 hui4 xian1 xi3zao3 zai4 kan4 shu1.
turns.translation_en: More or less. Sometimes I take a shower first and then read.
turns.translation_ko: 거의 그래요. 가끔은 먼저 샤워하고 책을 보기도 해요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does the person do after work first?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 퇴근 후에 가장 먼저 무엇을 합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the sequence: 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.
free_response_prompt: Describe your after-work routine using 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.

title: 週末的故事

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你上個週末做了什麼？可以從頭開始講故事嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ shàng ge zhōumò zuò le shénme? Kěyǐ cóng tóu kāishǐ jiǎng gùshì ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 shang4 ge5 zhou1mo4 zuo4 le shen2 me0? Ke3yi3 cong2 tou2 kai1shi3 jiang3 gu4shi4 ma?
turns.translation_en: What did you do last weekend? Can you tell the story from the beginning?
turns.translation_ko: 지난 주말에 뭐 하셨어요? 처음부터 이야기를 들려주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好。禮拜六早上我先起床，然後吃早餐，接著和朋友一起去公園散步。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo. Lǐbài liù zǎoshang wǒ xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu chī zǎocān, jiēzhe hé péngyou yīqǐ qù gōngyuán sànbù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3. Li3bai4 liu4 zao3shang4 wo3 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 chi1 zao3can1, jie1zhe5 he2 peng2you5 yi1qi3 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4.
turns.translation_en: Okay. Saturday morning I first got up, then ate breakfast, and then went for a walk in the park with a friend.
turns.translation_ko: 네. 토요일 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 아침을 먹고, 이어서 친구와 함께 공원에 산책하러 갔어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 然後呢？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 ne5?
turns.translation_en: And then?
turns.translation_ko: 그다음에는요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後我們去小吃店吃午餐，我點了牛肉麵，朋友點了滷肉飯。
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu wǒmen qù xiǎochī diàn chī wǔcān, wǒ diǎn le niúròu miàn, péngyou diǎn le lǔròu fàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 wo3men5 qu4 xiao3chi1 dian4 chi1 wu3can1, wo3 dian3 le niu2rou4 mian4, peng2you5 dian3 le lu3rou4 fan4.
turns.translation_en: Then we went to a small eatery for lunch. I ordered beef noodles, and my friend ordered braised pork rice.
turns.translation_ko: 그다음에 우리는 작은 음식점에 가서 점심을 먹었어요. 저는 소고기 국수를 시키고, 친구는 루로우판을 시켰어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽起來很好吃。下午你們做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎochī. Xiàwǔ nǐmen zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3chi1. Xia4wu3 ni3men5 zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Sounds delicious. What did you do in the afternoon?
turns.translation_ko: 맛있겠네요. 오후에는 뭐 하셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 下午我們去看電影，看完以後去逛街，最後一起回家。
turns.pinyin: Xiàwǔ wǒmen qù kàn diànyǐng, kàn wán yǐhòu qù guàngjiē, zuìhòu yīqǐ huí jiā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xia4wu3 wo3men5 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, kan4 wan2 yi3hou4 qu4 guang4jie1, zui4hou4 yi1qi3 hui2 jia1.
turns.translation_en: In the afternoon we went to see a movie. After watching it, we went shopping, and finally went home together.
turns.translation_ko: 오후에는 영화를 보러 갔어요. 다 본 후에 쇼핑하러 갔다가, 마지막으로 함께 집에 돌아왔어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那天你開心嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà tiān nǐ kāixīn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 tian1 ni3 kai1xin1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Were you happy that day?
turns.translation_ko: 그날 기분이 좋았어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 很開心！和朋友一起出去玩很有意思。
turns.pinyin: Hěn kāixīn! Hé péngyou yīqǐ chūqù wán hěn yǒu yìsi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hen3 kai1xin1! He2 peng2you5 yi1qi3 chu1qu4 wan2 hen3 you3 yi4si5.
turns.translation_en: Very happy! Going out with friends was a lot of fun.
turns.translation_ko: 아주 좋았어요! 친구와 함께 나가서 노는 게 정말 재미있었어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the person eat for lunch on Saturday?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on the sequence words and the story flow.
free_response_prompt: Tell a story about your last weekend using 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.

title: 去過臺北嗎？
scenario: talking about things you have done before

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，你以前去過臺北嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, nǐ yǐqián qùguò Táiběi ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, ni3 yi3qian2 qu4guo4 Tai2bei3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hello, have you been to Taipei before?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 예전에 타이베이에 가본 적이 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有啊，我去過好幾次。臺北很漂亮，我喜歡淡水跟九份。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu a, wǒ qùguò hǎo jǐ cì. Táiběi hěn piàoliang, wǒ xǐhuān Dànshuǐ gēn Jiǔfèn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 a, wo3 qu4guo4 hao3 ji3 ci4. Tai2bei3 hen3 piao4liang, wo3 xi3huan1 Dan4shui3 gen1 Jiu3fen4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I've been there several times. Taipei is very beautiful, I like Tamsui and Jiufen.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여러 번 가봤어요. 타이베이는 정말 예뻐요, 단수이와 주펀을 좋아해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你吃過臺北的夜市小吃嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ chīguò Táiběi de yèshì xiǎochī ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 chi1guo4 Tai2bei3 de ye4shi4 xiao3chi1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Have you tried the night market snacks in Taipei?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 타이베이 야시장 간식을 먹어본 적이 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 吃過！我最喜歡滷肉飯跟珍珠奶茶，很好吃。
turns.pinyin: Chīguò! Wǒ zuì xǐhuān lǔròufàn gēn zhēnzhū nǎichá, hěn hǎochī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Chi1guo4! Wo3 zui4 xi3huan1 lu3rou4fan4 gen1 zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2, hen3 hao3chi1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I have! I love braised pork rice and bubble tea the most, they're delicious.
turns.translation_ko: 먹어봤어요! 루로우판과 버블티를 가장 좋아해요, 정말 맛있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽起來很好玩。我從來沒有去過臺北，下次想去看看。
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎowán. Wǒ cónglái méiyǒu qùguò Táiběi, xià cì xiǎng qù kànkan.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3wan2. Wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 qu4guo4 Tai2bei3, xia4 ci4 xiang3 qu4 kan4kan.
turns.translation_en: That sounds fun. I've never been to Taipei, I want to go next time.
turns.translation_ko: 재미있을 것 같아요. 저는 타이베이에 가본 적이 한 번도 없어서, 다음에 가보고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你一定要去！我可以幫你介紹好玩的地方。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yīdìng yào qù! Wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ jièshào hǎowán de dìfang.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 yi1ding4 yao4 qu4! Wo3 ke3yi3 bang1 ni3 jie4shao4 hao3wan2 de di4fang.
turns.translation_en: You must go! I can help introduce you to fun places.
turns.translation_ko: 꼭 가보세요! 제가 재미있는 곳을 소개해 드릴게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Has person B been to Taipei?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '去過' and '吃過'.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about a place you have been to in Taiwan. Use '去過' in your answer.

title: 你吃過牛肉麵嗎？
scenario: talking about things you have done before

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你吃過臺灣的牛肉麵嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ chīguò Táiwān de niúròumiàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 chi1guo4 Tai2wan1 de niu2rou4mian4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Have you tried Taiwanese beef noodle soup?
turns.translation_ko: 대만의 소고기 국수를 먹어본 적이 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 吃過一次，很好吃！湯很濃，肉很軟。
turns.pinyin: Chīguò yī cì, hěn hǎochī! Tāng hěn nóng, ròu hěn ruǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Chi1guo4 yi1 ci4, hen3 hao3chi1! Tang1 hen3 nong2, rou4 hen3 ruan3.
turns.translation_en: I've tried it once, it's delicious! The broth is rich and the meat is tender.
turns.translation_ko: 한 번 먹어봤는데 정말 맛있어요! 국물이 진하고 고기가 부드러워요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你喝過臺南的牛肉湯嗎？聽說也很棒。
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ hēguò Táinán de niúròutāng ma? Tīngshuō yě hěn bàng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 he1guo4 Tai2nan2 de niu2rou4tang1 ma? Ting1shuo1 ye3 hen3 bang4.
turns.translation_en: Have you tried Tainan's beef soup? I heard it's also great.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 타이난의 소고기 국물은 마셔본 적이 있나요? 듣기로도 아주 좋다고 해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒有，我從來沒有喝過。但是我很想試試看。
turns.pinyin: Méiyǒu, wǒ cónglái méiyǒu hēguò. Dànshì wǒ hěn xiǎng shìshì kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2you3, wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 he1guo4. Dan4shi4 wo3 hen3 xiang3 shi4shi4 kan4.
turns.translation_en: No, I've never had it. But I really want to try it.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 한 번도 마셔본 적이 없어요. 그런데 꼭 한번 먹어보고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我推薦你去臺南，那邊的牛肉湯很新鮮。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tuījiàn nǐ qù Táinán, nàbiān de niúròutāng hěn xīnxiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 tui1jian4 ni3 qu4 Tai2nan2, na4bian1 de niu2rou4tang1 hen3 xin1xian1.
turns.translation_en: I recommend you go to Tainan, the beef soup there is very fresh.
turns.translation_ko: 타이난에 가보시길 추천해요, 거기 소고기 국물이 아주 신선해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，下次去臺南我一定要吃吃看。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, xià cì qù Táinán wǒ yīdìng yào chī chī kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a, xia4 ci4 qu4 Tai2nan2 wo3 yi1ding4 yao4 chi1 chi1 kan4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, next time I go to Tainan I'll definitely try it.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 다음에 타이난에 가면 꼭 먹어볼게요.

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the pronunciation of '吃過' and '喝過'.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about a food you have tried in Taiwan. Use '吃過' or '喝過'.

title: 從來沒有去過海邊
scenario: talking about things you have done before

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你去過墾丁的海邊嗎？聽說那邊的風景很漂亮。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ qùguò Kěndīng de hǎibiān ma? Tīngshuō nàbiān de fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 qu4guo4 Ken3ding1 de hai3bian1 ma? Ting1shuo1 na4bian1 de feng1jing3 hen3 piao4liang.
turns.translation_en: Have you been to the beach in Kenting? I heard the scenery there is beautiful.
turns.translation_ko: 컨딩 해변에 가본 적이 있나요? 거기 풍경이 아름답다고 들었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒有，我從來沒有去過海邊。我都在臺北生活。
turns.pinyin: Méiyǒu, wǒ cónglái méiyǒu qùguò hǎibiān. Wǒ dōu zài Táiběi shēnghuó.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2you3, wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 qu4guo4 hai3bian1. Wo3 dou1 zai4 Tai2bei3 sheng1huo2.
turns.translation_en: No, I've never been to the beach. I've always lived in Taipei.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 저는 해변에 가본 적이 한 번도 없어요. 항상 타이베이에서 살았어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 真的嗎？那你應該去一次。墾丁的海邊很好玩。
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nà nǐ yīnggāi qù yī cì. Kěndīng de hǎibiān hěn hǎowán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhen1 de ma? Na4 ni3 ying1gai1 qu4 yi1 ci4. Ken3ding1 de hai3bian1 hen3 hao3wan2.
turns.translation_en: Really? Then you should go once. The beach in Kenting is very fun.
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 그럼 한 번 가보셔야 해요. 컨딩 해변은 정말 재미있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我也很想，但是最近工作很忙，沒有時間。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yě hěn xiǎng, dànshì zuìjìn gōngzuò hěn máng, méiyǒu shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ye3 hen3 xiang3, dan4shi4 zui4jin4 gong1zuo4 hen3 mang2, mei2you3 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: I really want to, but I've been busy with work lately and don't have time.
turns.translation_ko: 저도 정말 가고 싶지만, 요즘 일이 너무 바빠서 시간이 없어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，等你有空的時候再去。你可以先看照片。
turns.pinyin: Méiguānxi, děng nǐ yǒu kòng de shíhou zài qù. Nǐ kěyǐ xiān kàn zhàopiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2guan1xi, deng3 ni3 you3 kong4 de shi2hou zai4 qu4. Ni3 ke3yi3 xian1 kan4 zhao4pian4.
turns.translation_en: No problem, go when you have free time. You can look at photos first.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 시간이 날 때 가면 돼요. 먼저 사진을 보셔도 돼요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好主意！我從來沒有看過墾丁的照片，等一下來看看。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyì! Wǒ cónglái méiyǒu kànguò Kěndīng de zhàopiàn, děng yīxià lái kànkan.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 zhu3yi4! Wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 kan4guo4 Ken3ding1 de zhao4pian4, deng3 yi1xia4 lai2 kan4kan.
turns.translation_en: Good idea! I've never seen photos of Kenting, I'll take a look later.
turns.translation_ko: 좋은 생각이에요! 컨딩 사진을 본 적이 한 번도 없어서, 잠시 후에 한번 볼게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What has person B never done?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 무엇을 한 번도 해본 적이 없나요?

free_response_prompt: Tell me about something you have never done in Taiwan. Use '從來沒有' in your answer.

title: 你現在在做什麼？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 喂，你現在在做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Wèi, nǐ xiànzài zài zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wei4, ni3 xian4zai4 zai4 zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Hey, what are you doing now?
turns.translation_ko: 여보세요, 지금 뭐 하고 있어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我現在正在看書。你呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kàn shū. Nǐ ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kan4 shu1. Ni3 ne?
turns.translation_en: I'm reading a book right now. And you?
turns.translation_ko: 지금 책을 보고 있어요. 당신은요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我現在在滑手機，沒有做什麼特別的事。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiànzài zài huá shǒujī, méiyǒu zuò shénme tèbié de shì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xian4zai4 zai4 hua2 shou3ji1, mei2you3 zuo4 shen2 me0 te4bie2 de shi4.
turns.translation_en: I'm scrolling on my phone, not doing anything special.
turns.translation_ko: 지금 핸드폰을 보고 있어요, 특별히 하는 일은 없어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 這樣啊。你等一下有空嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zhèyàng a. Nǐ děng yīxià yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4yang4 a. Ni3 deng3 yi1xia4 you3 kong4 ma?
turns.translation_en: I see. Do you have time later?
turns.translation_ko: 그렇군요. 잠시 후에 시간 있어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 有啊，怎麼了？
turns.pinyin: Yǒu a, zěnme le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 a, zen3 me0 le?
turns.translation_en: Yes, what's up?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 왜요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我想跟你一起喝咖啡，方便嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng gēn nǐ yīqǐ hē kāfēi, fāngbiàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 he1 ka1fei1, fang1bian4 ma?
turns.translation_en: I'd like to have coffee with you. Is that convenient?
turns.translation_ko: 같이 커피 마시고 싶은데, 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，沒問題。我們等一下見。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, méi wèntí. Wǒmen děng yīxià jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a, mei2 wen4ti2. Wo3men deng3 yi1xia4 jian4.
turns.translation_en: Sure, no problem. See you later.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 문제없어요. 잠시 후에 봐요.

title: 現在不能講電話

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 喂，你現在方便講電話嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wèi, nǐ xiànzài fāngbiàn jiǎng diànhuà ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wei4, ni3 xian4zai4 fang1bian4 jiang3 dian4hua4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hey, is it convenient for you to talk on the phone now?
turns.translation_ko: 여보세요, 지금 통화하기 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不好意思，我現在正在開會，不方便講電話。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kāihuì, bù fāngbiàn jiǎng diànhuà.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kai1hui4, bu4 fang1bian4 jiang3 dian4hua4.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I'm in a meeting right now, so it's not convenient to talk.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 지금 회의 중이라 통화하기 어려워요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，不急。你什麼時候有空？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, bù jí. Nǐ shénme shíhou yǒu kòng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi, bu4 ji2. Ni3 shen2 me0 shi2hou you3 kong4?
turns.translation_en: No problem, it's not urgent. When will you be free?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 급하지 않아요. 언제 시간 되세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我大概再一個小時就開完會了。等一下再打給你，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ dàgài zài yī ge xiǎoshí jiù kāi wán huì le. Děng yīxià zài dǎ gěi nǐ, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 da4gai4 zai4 yi1 ge xiao3shi2 jiu4 kai1 wan2 hui4 le. Deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 da3 gei3 ni3, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: I'll probably finish the meeting in about an hour. I'll call you back later, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 한 시간쯤 후에 회의가 끝날 것 같아요. 나중에 다시 전화드릴게요, 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，你慢慢來，不急。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nǐ mànmàn lái, bù jí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, ni3 man4man4 lai2, bu4 ji2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, take your time, no rush.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 천천히 하세요, 급하지 않아요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why can't person B talk on the phone now?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 왜 지금 통화할 수 없습니까?

title: 我正在複習中文

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你現在在做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiànzài zài zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xian4zai4 zai4 zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What are you doing now?
turns.translation_ko: 지금 뭐 하고 있어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我現在正在複習中文。明天有考試。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài fùxí zhōngwén. Míngtiān yǒu kǎoshì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 fu4xi2 zhong1wen2. Ming2tian1 you3 kao3shi4.
turns.translation_en: I'm reviewing Chinese right now. I have an exam tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 지금 중국어를 복습하고 있어요. 내일 시험이 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 哇，你好認真。你複習了什麼？
turns.pinyin: Wā, nǐ hǎo rènzhēn. Nǐ fùxí le shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wa1, ni3 hao3 ren4zhen1. Ni3 fu4xi2 le shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Wow, you're so diligent. What have you reviewed?
turns.translation_ko: 와, 정말 열심히네요. 뭘 복습했어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我複習了生詞和句子，也練習了寫字。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ fùxí le shēngcí hé jùzi, yě liànxí le xiě zì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 fu4xi2 le sheng1ci2 he2 ju4zi, ye3 lian4xi2 le xie3 zi4.
turns.translation_en: I reviewed vocabulary and sentences, and also practiced writing characters.
turns.translation_ko: 단어와 문장을 복습했고, 글자 쓰기도 연습했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得中文難嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde zhōngwén nán ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2de zhong1wen2 nan2 ma?
turns.translation_en: Do you think Chinese is difficult?
turns.translation_ko: 중국어가 어렵다고 생각해요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有一點難，可是很有意思。我喜歡學中文。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu yīdiǎn nán, kěshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Wǒ xǐhuān xué zhōngwén.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 yi1dian3 nan2, ke3shi4 hen3 you3 yi4si. Wo3 xi3huan1 xue2 zhong1wen2.
turns.translation_en: It's a little difficult, but very interesting. I like learning Chinese.
turns.translation_ko: 조금 어렵지만, 아주 재미있어요. 저는 중국어 배우는 것을 좋아해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 加油！你一定可以考得很好。
turns.pinyin: Jiāyóu! Nǐ yīdìng kěyǐ kǎo dé hěn hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jia1you2! Ni3 yi1ding4 ke3yi3 kao3 de2 hen3 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Keep it up! I'm sure you'll do well on the exam.
turns.translation_ko: 힘내세요! 분명히 시험 잘 볼 거예요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 謝謝你！希望明天考試順利。
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè nǐ! Xīwàng míngtiān kǎoshì shùnlì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4 ni3! Xi1wang4 ming2tian1 kao3shi4 shun4li4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you! I hope the exam goes smoothly tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다! 내일 시험이 잘 되길 바랍니다.

title: 說中文
scenario: talking about what you can do and are learning

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你會說中文嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ huì shuō zhōngwén ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hui4 shuo1 zhong1wen2 ma5?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 會一點，但是不太會。
turns.pinyin: Huì yīdiǎn, dànshì bù tài huì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hui4 yi1dian3, dan4shi4 bu4 tai4 hui4.
turns.translation_en: A little, but not very well.

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xue2 le5 ji3 ge5 yue4?

turns.speaker: B

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得說中文難嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde shuō zhōngwén nán ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2de5 shuo1 zhong1wen2 nan2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Do you think speaking Chinese is difficult?
turns.translation_ko: 중국어 말하기가 어렵다고 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有一點難，可是我越來越進步了。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu yīdiǎn nán, kěshì wǒ yuèláiyuè jìnbù le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 yi1dian3 nan2, ke3shi4 wo3 yue4lai2yue4 jin4bu4 le5.
turns.translation_en: It's a little difficult, but I'm making more and more progress.
turns.translation_ko: 조금 어렵지만, 점점 더 발전하고 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 加油！你已經說得很好了。
turns.pinyin: Jiāyóu! Nǐ yǐjīng shuō de hěn hǎo le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jia1you2! Ni3 yi3jing1 shuo1 de5 hen3 hao3 le5.
turns.translation_en: Keep it up! You already speak very well.

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin: Xièxie, wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5, wo3 hui4 ji4xu4 nu3li4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you. I will keep working hard.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 계속 노력할게요.

title: 會煮菜
scenario: talking about what you can do and are learning

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你會煮菜嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ huì zhǔ cài ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hui4 zhu3 cai4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Can you cook?
turns.translation_ko: 요리할 줄 아세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 會，我喜歡煮菜。
turns.pinyin: Huì, wǒ xǐhuān zhǔ cài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hui4, wo3 xi3huan1 zhu3 cai4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I like cooking.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 요리하는 것을 좋아해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你常常煮什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ chángcháng zhǔ shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 chang2chang2 zhu3 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What do you often cook?
turns.translation_ko: 자주 무엇을 요리하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我常常煮炒飯和青菜。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ chángcháng zhǔ chǎofàn hé qīngcài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 chang2chang2 zhu3 chao3fan4 he2 qing1cai4.
turns.translation_en: I often make fried rice and vegetables.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 자주 볶음밥과 채소를 요리해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽起來很簡單，可是我覺得煮菜很難。
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn jiǎndān, kěshì wǒ juéde zhǔ cài hěn nán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 jian3dan1, ke3shi4 wo3 jue2de5 zhu3 cai4 hen3 nan2.
turns.translation_en: Sounds simple, but I think cooking is hard.
turns.translation_ko: 간단해 보이는데, 저는 요리가 어렵다고 생각해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不會啦，你慢慢學就會了。
turns.pinyin: Bù huì la, nǐ mànmàn xué jiù huì le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hui4 la5, ni3 man4man4 xue2 jiu4 hui4 le5.
turns.translation_en: No, it's not. If you learn slowly, you'll get it.
turns.translation_ko: 아니에요. 천천히 배우면 할 수 있게 돼요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你可以教我嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ke3yi3 jiao1 wo3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Can you teach me?
turns.translation_ko: 저를 가르쳐 주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 當然可以！我們一起煮。
turns.pinyin: Dāngrán kěyǐ! Wǒmen yīqǐ zhǔ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dang1ran2 ke3yi3! Wo3men5 yi1qi3 zhu3.
turns.translation_en: Of course! Let's cook together.
turns.translation_ko: 물론이죠! 같이 요리해요.

title: 不會看中文
scenario: talking about what you can do and are learning

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你會看中文嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ huì kàn zhōngwén ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hui4 kan4 zhong1wen2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Can you read Chinese?
turns.translation_ko: 중국어를 읽을 줄 아세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 完全不會，我只會說一點。
turns.pinyin: Wánquán bù huì, wǒ zhǐ huì shuō yīdiǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wan2quan2 bu4 hui4, wo3 zhi3 hui4 shuo1 yi1dian3.
turns.translation_en: Not at all. I can only speak a little.
turns.translation_ko: 전혀 못 해요. 조금 말할 줄만 알아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你看菜單的時候怎麼辦？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ kàn càidān de shíhou zěnme bàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 kan4 cai4dan1 de5 shi2hou5 zen3 me0 ban4?
turns.translation_en: Then what do you do when you look at a menu?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 메뉴를 볼 때 어떻게 해요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我請朋友幫忙，或者看照片。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ qǐng péngyǒu bāngmáng, huòzhě kàn zhàopiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 qing3 peng2you3 bang1mang2, huo4zhe3 kan4 zhao4pian4.
turns.translation_en: I ask a friend for help, or I look at pictures.
turns.translation_ko: 친구에게 도움을 요청하거나 사진을 봐요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你想學看中文嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng xué kàn zhōngwén ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xiang3 xue2 kan4 zhong1wen2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Do you want to learn to read Chinese?
turns.translation_ko: 중국어 읽기를 배우고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 想，可是寫字很難。
turns.pinyin: Xiǎng, kěshì xiě zì hěn nán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xiang3, ke3shi4 xie3 zi4 hen3 nan2.
turns.translation_en: Yes, but writing characters is hard.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 그런데 글자 쓰기는 어려워요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你可以先學簡單的字。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān xué jiǎndān de zì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ke3yi3 xian1 xue2 jian3dan1 de5 zi4.
turns.translation_en: You can start by learning simple characters.
turns.translation_ko: 간단한 글자부터 먼저 배울 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，我試試看。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ shì shì kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 shi4 shi4 kan4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll give it a try.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 한번 해볼게요.

title: 那個人是誰？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那個人是誰？
turns.pinyin: Nà ge rén shì shéi?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ge ren2 shi4 shei2?
turns.translation_en: Who is that person?
turns.translation_ko: 저 사람은 누구예요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 那個人是我的朋友，他叫小明。
turns.pinyin: Nà ge rén shì wǒ de péngyǒu, tā jiào Xiǎo Míng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ge ren2 shi4 wo3 de peng2you3, ta1 jiao4 Xiao3 Ming2.
turns.translation_en: That person is my friend. His name is Xiao Ming.

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin: Tā zhǎng de zěnme yàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ta1 zhang3 de zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: What does he look like?
turns.translation_ko: 그는 어떻게 생겼어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 他長得很高，頭髮短短的，戴眼鏡。
turns.pinyin: Tā zhǎng de hěn gāo, tóufa duǎn duǎn de, dài yǎnjìng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ta1 zhang3 de hen3 gao1, tou2fa duan3 duan3 de, dai4 yan3jing4.
turns.translation_en: He is very tall, has short hair, and wears glasses.
turns.translation_ko: 그는 키가 크고, 머리가 짧고, 안경을 썼어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 他的個性怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Tā de gèxìng zěnme yàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ta1 de ge4xing4 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: What is his personality like?
turns.translation_ko: 그의 성격은 어때요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 他個性很友善，也很幽默，大家都喜歡他。
turns.pinyin: Tā gèxìng hěn yǒushàn, yě hěn yōumò, dàjiā dōu xǐhuān tā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ta1 ge4xing4 hen3 you3shan4, ye3 hen3 you1mo4, da4jia1 dou1 xi3huan1 ta1.
turns.translation_en: He is very friendly and humorous. Everyone likes him.
turns.translation_ko: 그는 성격이 아주 친절하고 유머러스해서 모두가 좋아해요.
