turns.text: 他的個性怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Tā de gèxìng zěnme yàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ta1 de ge4xing4 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: What is his personality like?
turns.translation_ko: 그의 성격은 어때요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 他個性很認真，也很聰明，上課很有趣。
turns.pinyin: Tā gèxìng hěn rènzhēn, yě hěn cōngmíng, shàngkè hěn yǒuqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ta1 ge4xing4 hen3 ren4zhen1, ye3 hen3 cong1ming2, shang4ke4 hen3 you3qu4.
turns.translation_en: He is very serious and smart. His classes are interesting.
turns.translation_ko: 그는 성격이 아주 진지하고 똑똑해요. 수업도 재미있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽起來你喜歡你的老師。
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái nǐ xǐhuān nǐ de lǎoshī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai2 ni3 xi3huan1 ni3 de lao3shi1.
turns.translation_en: It sounds like you like your teacher.
turns.translation_ko: 선생님을 좋아하는 것 같네요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對啊，他是一個很好的老師。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, tā shì yī ge hěn hǎo de lǎoshī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a, ta1 shi4 yi1 ge hen3 hao3 de lao3shi1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, he is a very good teacher.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 그는 아주 좋은 선생님이에요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the teacher's personality like?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on describing appearance and personality.
free_response_prompt: Describe your teacher: appearance, personality, and why you like them.

title: 哪個比較便宜？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，請問這個便當和那個飯糰，哪個比較便宜？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn zhège biàndāng hé nàge fàntuán, nǎge bǐjiào piányí?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 zhe4 ge4 bian4 dang1 he2 na4 ge4 fan4 tuan2, na3 ge4 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2?
turns.translation_en: Hello, may I ask, between this bento and that rice ball, which one is cheaper?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 이 도시락과 저 주먹밥 중에 어느 것이 더 싼가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 飯糰比較便宜，一個只要三十塊。便當比較貴，要八十塊。
turns.pinyin: Fàntuán bǐjiào piányí, yīge zhǐ yào sānshí kuài. Biàndāng bǐjiào guì, yào bāshí kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Fan4 tuan2 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2, yi1 ge4 zhi3 yao4 san1 shi2 kuai4. Bian4 dang1 bi3 jiao4 gui4, yao4 ba1 shi2 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: The rice ball is cheaper, only 30 dollars. The bento is more expensive, 80 dollars.
turns.translation_ko: 주먹밥이 더 싸요, 하나에 30원이에요. 도시락은 더 비싸서 80원이에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 可是便當的份量比較多，我覺得比較划算。
turns.pinyin: Kěshì biàndāng de fènliàng bǐjiào duō, wǒ juéde bǐjiào huásuàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3 shi4 bian4 dang1 de fen4 liang4 bi3 jiao4 duo1, wo3 jue2 de5 bi3 jiao4 hua2 suan4.
turns.translation_en: But the bento has a larger portion, I think it's more cost-effective.
turns.translation_ko: 그런데 도시락 양이 더 많아서 더 괜찮은 것 같아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，便當的份量差不多是飯糰的兩倍，所以價格也差很多。
turns.pinyin: Duì, biàndāng de fènliàng chàbùduō shì fàntuán de liǎng bèi, suǒyǐ jiàgé yě chà hěnduō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, bian4 dang1 de fen4 liang4 cha4 bu4 duo1 shi4 fan4 tuan2 de liang3 bei4, suo3 yi3 jia4 ge2 ye3 cha4 hen3 duo1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the bento's portion is about twice that of the rice ball, so the price is also very different.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 도시락 양이 주먹밥의 약 두 배라서 가격도 많이 차이 나요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那我決定買便當，因為比較值得。
turns.pinyin: Nà wǒ juédìng mǎi biàndāng, yīnwèi bǐjiào zhídé.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wo3 jue2 ding4 mai3 bian4 dang1, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 zhi2 de2.
turns.translation_en: Then I decide to buy the bento, because it's more worth it.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 도시락을 사기로 결정할게요, 더 가치 있으니까요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer decide to buy?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of comparison words like 比較 and 差不多.
free_response_prompt: Compare two items in a convenience store and explain which one you think is more cost-effective and why.

title: 哪個比較好？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這兩家餐廳，你覺得哪一家比較好？
turns.pinyin: Zhè liǎng jiā cāntīng, nǐ juéde nǎ yī jiā bǐjiào hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 liang3 jia1 can1 ting1, ni3 jue2 de5 na3 yi1 jia1 bi3 jiao4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Between these two restaurants, which one do you think is better?
turns.translation_ko: 이 두 식당 중에 어느 쪽이 더 좋다고 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 第一家環境比較好，氣氛很舒服。第二家價格比較便宜，服務也不錯。
turns.pinyin: Dì yī jiā huánjìng bǐjiào hǎo, qìfēn hěn shūfú. Dì èr jiā jiàgé bǐjiào piányí, fúwù yě bùcuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Di4 yi1 jia1 huan2 jing4 bi3 jiao4 hao3, qi4 fen1 hen3 shu1 fu2. Di4 er4 jia1 jia4 ge2 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2, fu2 wu4 ye3 bu4 cuo4.
turns.translation_en: The first one has a better environment, the atmosphere is very comfortable. The second one has cheaper prices, and the service is not bad.
turns.translation_ko: 첫 번째 식당은 환경이 더 좋고 분위기가 아주 편안해요. 두 번째 식당은 가격이 더 싸고 서비스도 괜찮아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那味道呢？哪一家的菜比較好吃？
turns.pinyin: Nà wèidào ne? Nǎ yī jiā de cài bǐjiào hǎochī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wei4 dao4 ne5? Na3 yi1 jia1 de cai4 bi3 jiao4 hao3 chi1?
turns.translation_en: What about the taste? Which restaurant's food is more delicious?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 맛은요? 어느 식당 음식이 더 맛있어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我覺得味道差不多，都很新鮮。不過第一家的份量比較少，第二家比較多。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ juéde wèidào chàbùduō, dōu hěn xīnxiān. Búguò dì yī jiā de fènliàng bǐjiào shǎo, dì èr jiā bǐjiào duō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jue2 de5 wei4 dao4 cha4 bu4 duo1, dou1 hen3 xin1 xian1. Bu2 guo4 di4 yi1 jia1 de fen4 liang4 bi3 jiao4 shao3, di4 er4 jia1 bi3 jiao4 duo1.
turns.translation_en: I think the taste is similar, both are very fresh. But the first one has smaller portions, the second one has larger portions.
turns.translation_ko: 맛은 비슷해요, 둘 다 아주 신선해요. 그런데 첫 번째는 양이 적고 두 번째는 양이 많아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這樣的話，我寧願去第二家，因為比較划算。
turns.pinyin: Zhèyàng dehuà, wǒ nìngyuàn qù dì èr jiā, yīnwèi bǐjiào huásuàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 yang4 de5 hua4, wo3 ning4 yuan4 qu4 di4 er4 jia1, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 hua2 suan4.
turns.translation_en: In that case, I'd rather go to the second one, because it's more cost-effective.
turns.translation_ko: 그렇다면 저는 두 번째 식당에 갈래요, 더 괜찮으니까요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Which restaurant does the customer prefer?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the comparison structure 比較 and the contrast word 不過.
free_response_prompt: Compare two restaurants you know and explain which one you prefer and why.

title: 台北和高雄的比較

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得台北和高雄有什麼不同？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde Táiběi hé Gāoxióng yǒu shénme bùtóng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2 de5 Tai2 bei3 he2 Gao1 xiong2 you3 shen2 me0 bu4 tong2?
turns.translation_en: What differences do you think there are between Taipei and Kaohsiung?
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이와 가오슝은 어떤 차이가 있다고 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 台北比較熱鬧，交通很方便，捷運路線很多。高雄比較安靜，環境很舒服。
turns.pinyin: Táiběi bǐjiào rènào, jiāotōng hěn fāngbiàn, jiéyùn lùxiàn hěnduō. Gāoxióng bǐjiào ānjìng, huánjìng hěn shūfú.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai2 bei3 bi3 jiao4 re4 nao4, jiao1 tong1 hen3 fang1 bian4, jie2 yun4 lu4 xian4 hen3 duo1. Gao1 xiong2 bi3 jiao4 an1 jing4, huan2 jing4 hen3 shu1 fu2.
turns.translation_en: Taipei is more lively, transportation is very convenient, and there are many MRT lines. Kaohsiung is quieter, and the environment is very comfortable.
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이는 더 번화하고 교통이 편리하며 지하철 노선이 많아요. 가오슝은 더 조용하고 환경이 편안해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那價格呢？台北的物價是不是比較貴？
turns.pinyin: Nà jiàgé ne? Táiběi de wùjià shì bùshì bǐjiào guì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 jia4 ge2 ne5? Tai2 bei3 de wu4 jia4 shi4 bu5 shi4 bi3 jiao4 gui4?
turns.translation_en: What about prices? Is the cost of living in Taipei more expensive?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 가격은요? 타이베이 물가가 더 비싸지 않나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，台北的價格比較高，尤其是餐廳和房子。高雄比較平價，同樣的東西便宜很多。
turns.pinyin: Duì, Táiběi de jiàgé bǐjiào gāo, yóuqí shì cāntīng hé fángzi. Gāoxióng bǐjiào píngjià, tóngyàng de dōngxi piányí hěnduō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, Tai2 bei3 de jia4 ge2 bi3 jiao4 gao1, you2 qi2 shi4 can1 ting1 he2 fang2 zi5. Gao1 xiong2 bi3 jiao4 ping2 jia4, tong2 yang4 de dong1 xi5 pian2 yi2 hen3 duo1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, prices in Taipei are higher, especially for restaurants and housing. Kaohsiung is more affordable, the same things are much cheaper.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 타이베이는 가격이 더 높아요, 특히 식당과 집값이요. 가오슝은 더 저렴해서 같은 물건이 훨씬 싸요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你比較喜歡哪一個城市？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ bǐjiào xǐhuān nǎ yīge chéngshì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 bi3 jiao4 xi3 huan1 na3 yi1 ge4 cheng2 shi4?
turns.translation_en: Then which city do you prefer?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 당신은 어느 도시를 더 좋아하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我比較喜歡高雄，因為生活步調比較慢，壓力也比較小。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān Gāoxióng, yīnwèi shēnghuó bùdiào bǐjiào màn, yālì yě bǐjiào xiǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bi3 jiao4 xi3 huan1 Gao1 xiong2, yin1 wei4 sheng1 huo2 bu4 diao4 bi3 jiao4 man4, ya1 li4 ye3 bi3 jiao4 xiao3.
turns.translation_en: I prefer Kaohsiung, because the pace of life is slower and the stress is less.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 가오슝이 더 좋아요, 생활 속도가 더 느리고 스트레스도 덜하거든요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Which city does the speaker prefer?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on the comparison words 比較 and the contrast between the two cities.
free_response_prompt: Compare two cities you know and explain which one you prefer and why.

title: 邀請吃晚餐
scenario: making, accepting, declining, and changing plans

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你明天晚上有空嗎？我想邀請你一起吃晚餐。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān wǎnshàng yǒu kòng ma? Wǒ xiǎng yāoqǐng nǐ yīqǐ chī wǎncān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ming2tian1 wan3shang4 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3 xiang3 yao1qing3 ni3 yi1qi3 chi1 wan3can1.
turns.translation_en: Are you free tomorrow evening? I'd like to invite you to have dinner together.
turns.translation_ko: 내일 저녁에 시간 있으세요? 같이 저녁 식사하자고 초대하고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 明天晚上可以啊！我們去哪裡吃？
turns.pinyin: Míngtiān wǎnshàng kěyǐ a! Wǒmen qù nǎlǐ chī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ming2tian1 wan3shang4 ke3yi3 a5! Wo3men qu4 na3li3 chi1?
turns.translation_en: Tomorrow evening works! Where should we go out to eat?
turns.translation_ko: 내일 저녁 괜찮아요! 어디로 먹으러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我推薦一家牛肉麵店，在車站附近，很好吃。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tuījiàn yī jiā niúròumiàn diàn, zài chēzhàn fùjìn, hěn hǎochī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 tui1jian4 yi1 jia1 niu2rou4mian4 dian4, zai4 che1zhan4 fu4jin4, hen3 hao3chi1.
turns.translation_en: I recommend a beef noodle shop near the station; it's very tasty.
turns.translation_ko: 역 근처에 있는 소고기 국수 가게를 추천해요, 아주 맛있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我喜歡吃牛肉麵。我們約幾點？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ xǐhuān chī niúròumiàn. Wǒmen yuē jǐ diǎn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5! Wo3 xi3huan1 chi1 niu2rou4mian4. Wo3men yue1 ji3 dian3?
turns.translation_en: Great! I like eating beef noodles. What time should we meet?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 소고기 국수 좋아해요. 몇 시에 만날까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們約六點半在餐廳門口碰面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen yuē liù diǎn bàn zài cāntīng ménkǒu pèngmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men yue1 liu4 dian3 ban4 zai4 can1ting1 men2kou3 peng4mian4, ke3yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Let's meet at 6:30 at the restaurant entrance, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 6시 30분에 식당 입구에서 만날까요, 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題啊！明天見。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí a! Míngtiān jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2 a5! Ming2tian1 jian4.
turns.translation_en: No problem! See you tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요! 내일 뵙겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did A invite B to do?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Practice inviting a friend to dinner. Say: '你明天晚上有空嗎？我想邀請你一起吃晚餐。'

title: 改時間
scenario: making, accepting, declining, and changing plans

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，我臨時有事，明天的約會可以改時間嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bùhǎoyìsi, wǒ línshí yǒu shì, míngtiān de yuēhuì kěyǐ gǎi shíjiān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4hao3yi4si5, wo3 lin2shi2 you3 shi4, ming2tian1 de5 yue1hui4 ke3yi3 gai3 shi2jian1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Sorry, something came up suddenly. Can we reschedule tomorrow's appointment?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 갑자기 일이 생겨서 내일 약속 시간을 변경할 수 있을까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題啊。你想改到什麼時候？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí a. Nǐ xiǎng gǎi dào shénme shíhou?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2 a5. Ni3 xiang3 gai3 dao4 shen2 me0 shi2hou5?
turns.translation_en: No problem. When would you like to change it to?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요. 언제로 변경하고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 後天下午三點方便嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn fāngbiàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hou4tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 fang1bian4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Is the day after tomorrow at 3 PM convenient?
turns.translation_ko: 모레 오후 3시에 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 後天下午三點我可以。那我們改到後天下午三點。
turns.pinyin: Hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ kěyǐ. Nà wǒmen gǎi dào hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hou4tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 wo3 ke3yi3. Na4 wo3men gai3 dao4 hou4tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3.
turns.translation_en: The day after tomorrow at 3 PM works for me. Then let's change it to that time.
turns.translation_ko: 모레 오후 3시 괜찮아요. 그럼 모레 오후 3시로 변경할게요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 太好了！謝謝你。我們後天見。
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Xièxiè nǐ. Wǒmen hòutiān jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le5! Xie4xie4 ni3. Wo3men hou4tian1 jian4.
turns.translation_en: Great! Thank you. See you the day after tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋아요! 감사합니다. 모레 뵙겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did A want to reschedule?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Practice rescheduling a plan. Say: '不好意思，我臨時有事，明天的約會可以改時間嗎？'

title: 婉拒邀請
scenario: making, accepting, declining, and changing plans

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這個週末我們一起去夜市吃東西，好不好？
turns.pinyin: Zhège zhōumò wǒmen yīqǐ qù yèshì chī dōngxi, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 ye4shi4 chi1 dong1xi5, hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: This weekend, let's go to the night market to eat together, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 같이 야시장에 가서 먹을까요, 어떠세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 謝謝你的邀請，可是這個週末我已經有行程了，沒辦法去。
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè nǐ de yāoqǐng, kěshì zhège zhōumò wǒ yǐjīng yǒu xíngchéng le, méi bànfǎ qù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4 ni3 de5 yao1qing3, ke3shi4 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 wo3 yi3jing1 you3 xing2cheng2 le5, mei2 ban4fa3 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you for the invitation, but I already have plans this weekend, so I can't go.
turns.translation_ko: 초대해 주셔서 감사합니다만, 이번 주말에 이미 일정이 있어서 갈 수 없어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，那我們改天再約。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, nà wǒmen gǎitiān zài yuē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi5, na4 wo3men gai3tian1 zai4 yue1.
turns.translation_en: No problem, then let's plan another day.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 그럼 다음에 다시 만나요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！下次有空的時候再一起去。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Xià cì yǒu kòng de shíhou zài yīqǐ qù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5! Xia4 ci4 you3 kong4 de5 shi2hou5 zai4 yi1qi3 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Great! Let's go together next time when we're free.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 다음에 시간 될 때 같이 가요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did B decline the invitation?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Practice politely declining an invitation. Say: '謝謝你的邀請，可是這個週末我已經有行程了，沒辦法去。'

title: 租房間

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 你好，請問你要租房間嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ yào zū fángjiān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 yao4 zu1 fang2 jian1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hello, are you looking to rent a room?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 방을 구하시나요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 對，我想看看房間。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ xiǎng kàn kàn fángjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 xiang3 kan4 kan4 fang2 jian1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I'd like to see the room.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 방을 좀 보고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 好的，這個房間有床、桌子、椅子，還有冷氣。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhège fángjiān yǒu chuáng, zhuōzi, yǐzi, hái yǒu lěngqì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zhe4 ge5 fang2 jian1 you3 chuang2, zhuo1 zi5, yi3 zi5, hai2 you3 leng3 qi4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, this room has a bed, a desk, a chair, and also air conditioning.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 이 방에는 침대, 책상, 의자, 그리고 에어컨이 있어요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 房間很明亮，我很喜歡。房租多少錢？
turns.pinyin: Fángjiān hěn míngliàng, wǒ hěn xǐhuān. Fángzū duōshao qián?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Fang2 jian1 hen3 ming2 liang4, wo3 hen3 xi3 huan1. Fang2 zu1 duo1 shao3 qian2?
turns.translation_en: The room is very bright, I like it. How much is the rent?
turns.translation_ko: 방이 매우 밝아서 마음에 들어요. 집세가 얼마인가요?

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 一個月一萬塊，水電費另外算。
turns.pinyin: Yī ge yuè yī wàn kuài, shuǐ diàn fèi lìngwài suàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi1 ge5 yue4 yi1 wan4 kuai4, shui3 dian4 fei4 ling4 wai4 suan4.
turns.translation_en: 10,000 NT per month, utilities are separate.
turns.translation_ko: 한 달에 만 위안이고, 수도·전기 요금은 별도예요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好，我決定租這個房間。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ juédìng zū zhège fángjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 jue2 ding4 zu1 zhe4 ge5 fang2 jian1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I've decided to rent this room.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 이 방을 빌리기로 결정했어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does the room have?
options_en: Bed, desk, chair, and air conditioning
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Bed, desk, chair, and air conditioning

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Describe your ideal apartment room in Chinese.

title: 問設備

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 請問，這個公寓有洗衣機嗎？
turns.pinyin: Qǐng wèn, zhège gōngyù yǒu xǐyījī ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qing3 wen4, zhe4 ge5 gong1 yu4 you3 xi3 yi1 ji1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, does this apartment have a washing machine?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 아파트에 세탁기가 있나요?

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 有，在浴室裡面。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, zài yùshì lǐmiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, zai4 yu4 shi4 li3 mian4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, it's in the bathroom.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 욕실 안에 있어요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 那廚房有冰箱嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà chúfáng yǒu bīngxiāng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 chu2 fang2 you3 bing1 xiang1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Does the kitchen have a refrigerator?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 주방에 냉장고가 있나요?

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 有，冰箱很大，還有熱水器。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, bīngxiāng hěn dà, hái yǒu rèshuǐqì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, bing1 xiang1 hen3 da4, hai2 you3 re4 shui3 qi4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the refrigerator is big, and there's also a water heater.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 냉장고가 매우 크고, 온수기도 있어요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 太好了，謝謝你。
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xièxiè nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le5, xie4 xie4 ni3.
turns.translation_en: That's great, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋네요, 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where is the washing machine?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each question and answer, paying attention to intonation.
free_response_prompt: Ask about facilities in an apartment you are interested in.

title: 冷氣壞掉

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 房東，不好意思，冷氣壞掉了。
turns.pinyin: Fángdōng, bù hǎo yìsi, lěngqì huài diào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Fang2 dong1, bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, leng3 qi4 huai4 diao4 le5.
turns.translation_en: Landlord, excuse me, the air conditioner is broken.
turns.translation_ko: 집주인님, 죄송합니다만 에어컨이 고장 났어요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 真的嗎？我明天請人來修理。
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Wǒ míngtiān qǐng rén lái xiūlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhen1 de5 ma? Wo3 ming2 tian1 qing3 ren2 lai2 xiu1 li3.
turns.translation_en: Really? I'll have someone come fix it tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 내일 수리 기사를 부를게요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝，因為天氣很熱，沒有冷氣不舒服。
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè, yīnwèi tiānqì hěn rè, méiyǒu lěngqì bù shūfu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4 xie4, yin1 wei4 tian1 qi4 hen3 re4, mei2 you3 leng3 qi4 bu4 shu1 fu5.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, because it's very hot, it's uncomfortable without AC.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 날씨가 매우 더워서 에어컨이 없으면 불편해요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 沒問題，我會處理。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ huì chǔlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4 ti2, wo3 hui4 chu3 li3.
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll take care of it.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 제가 처리할게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is broken?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat the dialogue, focusing on expressing concern and reassurance.
free_response_prompt: Report a problem in your apartment to the landlord.

title: 修理水龍頭
scenario: talking to landlord or repair person

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 房東先生，不好意思，我房間的水龍頭壞掉了。
turns.pinyin: Fángdōng xiānsheng, bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ fángjiān de shuǐlóngtóu huài diào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: fang2 dong1 xian1 sheng1, bu4 hao3 yi4 si1, wo3 fang2 jian1 de shui3 long2 tou2 huai4 diao4 le.
turns.translation_en: Landlord, sorry, the faucet in my room is broken.
turns.translation_ko: 집주인님, 죄송합니다. 제 방 수도꼭지가 고장 났어요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 是嗎？水龍頭有什麼問題？
turns.pinyin: Shì ma? Shuǐlóngtóu yǒu shénme wèntí?
turns.pinyin_numeric: shi4 ma5? shui3 long2 tou2 you3 shen2 me0 wen4 ti2?
turns.translation_en: Really? What's wrong with the faucet?
turns.translation_ko: 그래요? 수도꼭지에 무슨 문제가 있나요?

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 它一直漏水，而且聲音很奇怪。
turns.pinyin: Tā yīzhí lòu shuǐ, érqiě shēngyīn hěn qíguài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ta1 yi1 zhi2 lou4 shui3, er2 qie3 sheng1 yin1 hen3 qi2 guai4.
turns.translation_en: It keeps leaking, and the sound is very strange.
turns.translation_ko: 계속 물이 새고 있고, 소리도 이상해요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 我了解了。我請修理師傅明天早上過去看看，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ liǎojiě le. Wǒ qǐng xiūlǐ shīfu míngtiān zǎoshang guòqù kànkan, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 liao3 jie3 le5. wo3 qing3 xiu1 li3 shi1 fu4 ming2 tian1 zao3 shang4 guo4 qu4 kan4 kan5, ke3 yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I understand. I'll ask a repair person to come over tomorrow morning to take a look, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 알겠습니다. 제가 수리 기사님께 내일 아침에 가서 보시라고 할게요, 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 好的，明天早上我都在家，麻煩你了。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, míngtiān zǎoshang wǒ dōu zài jiā, máfan nǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, ming2 tian1 zao3 shang4 wo3 dou1 zai4 jia1, ma2 fan5 ni3 le5.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll be home all tomorrow morning. Thank you for your help.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 내일 아침에 집에 있을게요. 수고해 주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is wrong with the faucet?
options_en: It is leaking and making a strange sound
comprehension_questions.answer_en: It is leaking and making a strange sound

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音，重複每一句話，注意語氣和停頓。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文描述你房間裡一個壞掉的東西，並告訴房東你需要修理。

title: 預約修理時間
scenario: talking to landlord or repair person

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 師傅你好，我家的冷氣壞掉了，可以請你來看看嗎？
turns.pinyin: Shīfu nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiā de lěngqì huài diào le, kěyǐ qǐng nǐ lái kànkan ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: shi1 fu4 ni3 hao3, wo3 jia1 de leng3 qi4 huai4 diao4 le5, ke3 yi3 qing3 ni3 lai2 kan4 kan5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Hello, repair person. My air conditioner at home is broken. Can you come and take a look?
turns.translation_ko: 기사님, 안녕하세요. 저희 집 에어컨이 고장 났는데, 와서 한번 봐 주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: 師傅
turns.text: 好的，請問你什麼時候方便？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nǐ shénme shíhou fāngbiàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, qing3 wen4 ni3 shen2 me0 shi2 hou5 fang1 bian4?
turns.translation_en: Okay, when is convenient for you?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 언제가 편하신가요?

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 今天下午三點以後可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn yǐhòu kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: jin1 tian1 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3 yi3 hou4 ke3 yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Can you come after 3 PM this afternoon?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 오후 3시 이후에 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: 師傅
turns.text: 沒問題，我下午三點半過去。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ xiàwǔ sān diǎn bàn guòqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2, wo3 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3 ban4 guo4 qu4.
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll come over at 3:30 PM.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 오후 3시 30분에 갈게요.

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 太好了，謝謝你！
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xièxie nǐ!
turns.pinyin_numeric: tai4 hao3 le5, xie4 xie5 ni3!
turns.translation_en: Great, thank you!
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋아요, 감사합니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What time will the repair person come?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音，練習預約修理時間的對話。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文跟修理師傅約一個時間，請他來修你家的熱水器。

title: 漏水問題
scenario: talking to landlord or repair person

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 房東，我房間的天花板有裂縫，而且一直在漏水。
turns.pinyin: Fángdōng, wǒ fángjiān de tiānhuābǎn yǒu lièfèng, érqiě yīzhí zài lòu shuǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: fang2 dong1, wo3 fang2 jian1 de tian1 hua1 ban3 you3 lie4 feng4, er2 qie3 yi1 zhi2 zai4 lou4 shui3.
turns.translation_en: Landlord, there's a crack in the ceiling of my room, and it's been leaking.
turns.translation_ko: 집주인님, 제 방 천장에 금이 가고 계속 물이 새고 있어요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 真的嗎？地板有沒有濕？
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Dìbǎn yǒu méiyǒu shī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zhen1 de5 ma5? di4 ban3 you3 mei2 you3 shi1?
turns.translation_en: Really? Is the floor wet?
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 바닥은 젖었나요?

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 有，地板也濕了，我怕會發霉。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, dìbǎn yě shī le, wǒ pà huì fā méi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: you3, di4 ban3 ye3 shi1 le5, wo3 pa4 hui4 fa1 mei2.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the floor is wet too. I'm afraid it might get moldy.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 바닥도 젖었어요. 곰팡이가 생길까 봐 걱정이에요.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 我馬上請師傅過來檢查，你先用毛巾把水擦乾。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ mǎshàng qǐng shīfu guòlái jiǎnchá, nǐ xiān yòng máojīn bǎ shuǐ cā gān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 ma3 shang4 qing3 shi1 fu4 guo4 lai2 jian3 cha2, ni3 xian1 yong4 mao2 jin1 ba3 shui3 ca1 gan1.
turns.translation_en: I'll have a repair person come over to check right away. First, use a towel to wipe the water dry.
turns.translation_ko: 제가 바로 기사님을 보내서 점검하게 할게요. 우선 수건으로 물을 닦아 두세요.

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 好的，我知道了，謝謝房東。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le, xièxie fángdōng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1 dao4 le5, xie4 xie5 fang2 dong1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I understand. Thank you, landlord.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다. 감사합니다, 집주인님.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the problem in the room?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音，練習描述漏水問題的對話。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文告訴房東，你房間的牆壁有裂縫，而且好像發霉了。

title: 看醫生

turns.speaker: 醫生
turns.text: 你好，請問你哪裡不舒服？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ nǎlǐ bù shūfu?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 na3li3 bu4 shu1fu?
turns.translation_en: Hello, where do you feel uncomfortable?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 어디가 불편하신가요?

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 醫生你好，我昨天開始頭痛，還有點發燒。
turns.pinyin: Yīshēng nǐ hǎo, wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ tóutòng, hái yǒu diǎn fāshāo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi1sheng1 ni3 hao3, wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 tou2tong4, hai2 you3 dian3 fa1shao1.
turns.translation_en: Hello doctor, I started having a headache yesterday and also have a slight fever.
turns.translation_ko: 선생님 안녕하세요, 어제부터 두통이 있고 열도 조금 있어요.

turns.speaker: 醫生
turns.text: 我幫你量一下體溫。請坐，等一下。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nǐ liáng yīxià tǐwēn. Qǐng zuò, děng yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bang1 ni3 liang2 yi1xia4 ti3wen1. Qing3 zuo4, deng3 yi1xia4.
turns.translation_en: Let me take your temperature. Please sit down and wait a moment.
turns.translation_ko: 체온을 재 드릴게요. 앉아서 잠시만 기다려 주세요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 好的，謝謝醫生。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxiè yīshēng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, xie4xie4 yi1sheng1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you doctor.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다 선생님.

turns.speaker: 醫生
turns.text: 體溫有點高，是感冒了。我開藥給你，記得按時吃。
turns.pinyin: Tǐwēn yǒu diǎn gāo, shì gǎnmào le. Wǒ kāi yào gěi nǐ, jìde ànshí chī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ti3wen1 you3 dian3 gao1, shi4 gan3mao4 le. Wo3 kai1 yao4 gei3 ni3, ji4de an4shi2 chi1.
turns.translation_en: Your temperature is a bit high, it's a cold. I'll prescribe some medicine for you, remember to take it on time.
turns.translation_ko: 체온이 좀 높네요, 감기예요. 약을 처방해 드릴게요, 시간 맞춰 드세요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 好的，我會按時吃藥。謝謝醫生！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ huì ànshí chī yào. Xièxiè yīshēng!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 hui4 an4shi2 chi1 yao4. Xie4xie4 yi1sheng1!
turns.translation_en: Okay, I will take the medicine on time. Thank you doctor!
turns.translation_ko: 네, 시간 맞춰 약 먹을게요. 감사합니다 선생님!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the patient's symptom?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Describe a time you visited a doctor. What did you say?

title: 跟房東說問題

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 房東你好，不好意思打擾你。
turns.pinyin: Fángdōng nǐ hǎo, bù hǎo yìsi dǎrǎo nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Fang2dong1 ni3 hao3, bu4 hao3 yi4si da3rao3 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Hello landlord, sorry to bother you.
turns.translation_ko: 집주인님 안녕하세요, 방해해서 죄송합니다.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 沒關係，有什麼事嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, yǒu shénme shì ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi, you3 shen2 me0 shi4 ma?
turns.translation_en: No problem, what's the matter?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 무슨 일이세요?

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 房間的冷氣壞掉了，天氣很熱，可以請人來修嗎？
turns.pinyin: Fángjiān de lěngqì huài diào le, tiānqì hěn rè, kěyǐ qǐng rén lái xiū ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Fang2jian1 de leng3qi4 huai4 diao4 le, tian1qi4 hen3 re4, ke3yi3 qing3 ren2 lai2 xiu1 ma?
turns.translation_en: The air conditioner in the room is broken, it's very hot, can you ask someone to fix it?
turns.translation_ko: 방 에어컨이 고장 났어요, 날씨가 너무 더워서 수리하러 사람을 보내 주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 好的，我明天請師傅過去看看。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ míngtiān qǐng shīfu guòqù kànkan.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 ming2tian1 qing3 shi1fu guo4qu4 kan4kan.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll ask a technician to come take a look tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 내일 기사님을 보내서 확인해 드릴게요.

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 太好了，謝謝房東！
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xièxiè fángdōng!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le, xie4xie4 fang2dong1!
turns.translation_en: That's great, thank you landlord!
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋네요, 감사합니다 집주인님!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is broken in the room?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Describe a problem you had in your apartment and how you told the landlord.

title: 約朋友看電影

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這個週末你有空嗎？我們一起去看電影好不好？
turns.pinyin: Zhège zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 ni3 you3 kong4 ma? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3 hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Are you free this weekend? How about we go see a movie together?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 시간 있어요? 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我想看那部新的台灣電影，聽說很好看。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ xiǎng kàn nà bù xīn de Táiwān diànyǐng, tīngshuō hěn hǎokàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a! Wo3 xiang3 kan4 na4 bu4 xin1 de Tai2wan1 dian4ying3, ting1shuo1 hen3 hao3kan4.
turns.translation_en: Sure! I want to see that new Taiwanese movie, I heard it's very good.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 그 새 대만 영화 보고 싶었어요, 재미있다고 들었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那我們星期六下午兩點在電影院門口見面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà wǒmen xīngqīliù xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wo3men xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 jian4mian4, ke3yi3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Then let's meet at the movie theater entrance on Saturday at 2 PM, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 토요일 오후 2시에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，星期六見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, xīngqīliù jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, xing1qi1liu4 jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem, see you on Saturday!
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 토요일에 봐요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What day are they meeting?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Describe a plan you made with a friend to see a movie.

title: 弄丟錢包

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你怎麼了？看起來心情不好。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme le? Kàn qǐlái xīnqíng bù hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zen3 me0 le5? Kan4 qi3lai2 xin1qing2 bu4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: What's wrong with you? You look upset.
turns.translation_ko: 무슨 일 있어? 기분이 안 좋아 보여.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 糟糕，我弄丟錢包了。
turns.pinyin: Zāogāo, wǒ nòng diū qiánbāo le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zao1gao1, wo3 nong4 diu1 qian2bao1 le5.
turns.translation_en: Oh no, I lost my wallet.
turns.translation_ko: 큰일 났어, 지갑을 잃어버렸어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 真的嗎？發生什麼事？
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Fāshēng shénme shì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhen1 de5 ma5? Fa1sheng1 shen2 me0 shi4?
turns.translation_en: Really? What happened?
turns.translation_ko: 정말? 무슨 일이 있었어?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我剛才去便利商店買東西，結果忘記拿錢包。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ gāngcái qù biànlì shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi, jiéguǒ wàngjì ná qiánbāo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 gang1cai2 qu4 bian4li4 shang1dian4 mai3 dong1xi5, jie2guo3 wang4ji4 na2 qian2bao1.
turns.translation_en: I went to the convenience store to buy something just now, and as a result, I forgot to take my wallet.
turns.translation_ko: 아까 편의점에 물건 사러 갔는데, 결국 지갑을 안 가져왔어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你有回去找嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu huí qù zhǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 you3 hui2 qu4 zhao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Did you go back to look for it?
turns.translation_ko: 다시 돌아가서 찾아봤어?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有，可是店員說沒有看到。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, kěshì diànyuán shuō méiyǒu kàndào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, ke3shi4 dian4yuan2 shuo1 mei2you3 kan4dao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, but the clerk said they didn't see it.
turns.translation_ko: 응, 그런데 직원이 못 봤다고 했어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那怎麼辦？裡面有重要的東西嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà zěnme bàn? Lǐmiàn yǒu zhòngyào de dōngxi ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 zen3 me0 ban4? Li3mian4 you3 zhong4yao4 de5 dong1xi5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Then what to do? Are there important things inside?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 어쩌려고? 안에 중요한 물건 있어?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有悠遊卡和信用卡。我已經打電話給銀行處理了。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu yōuyóukǎ hé xìnyòngkǎ. Wǒ yǐjīng dǎ diànhuà gěi yínháng chǔlǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 you1you2ka3 he2 xin4yong4ka3. Wo3 yi3jing1 da3 dian4hua4 gei3 yin2hang2 chu3li3 le5.
turns.translation_en: There's an EasyCard and a credit card. I've already called the bank to handle it.
turns.translation_ko: 유유카드랑 신용카드가 있어. 벌써 은행에 전화해서 처리했어.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the person lose?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of regret and worry.
free_response_prompt: Tell a story about a time you lost something important. Use words like 弄丟, 結果, 處理.

title: 錯過火車

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你怎麼遲到了？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme chídào le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zen3 me0 chi2dao4 le5?
turns.translation_en: Why are you late?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 늦었어?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 抱歉，我錯過火車了。
turns.pinyin: Bàoqiàn, wǒ cuòguò huǒchē le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bao4qian4, wo3 cuo4guo4 huo3che1 le5.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I missed the train.
turns.translation_ko: 미안해, 기차를 놓쳤어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 為什麼？發生什麼事？
turns.pinyin: Wèishénme? Fāshēng shénme shì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: wei4 shen2 me0? Fa1sheng1 shen2 me0 shi4?
turns.translation_en: Why? What happened?
turns.translation_ko: 왜? 무슨 일이 있었어?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 因為路上塞車，所以來不及到車站。
turns.pinyin: Yīnwèi lùshàng sāichē, suǒyǐ láibují dào chēzhàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yin1wei4 lu4shang4 sai1che1, suo3yi3 lai2bu4ji2 dao4 che1zhan4.
turns.translation_en: Because there was a traffic jam on the road, so I couldn't make it to the station in time.
turns.translation_ko: 길이 막혀서 역에 제때 도착하지 못했어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那後來你怎麼來的？
turns.pinyin: Nà hòulái nǐ zěnme lái de?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 hou4lai2 ni3 zen3 me0 lai2 de5?
turns.translation_en: Then how did you come later?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 나중에 어떻게 왔어?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我搭下一班火車，幸好只晚半個小時。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ dā xià yī bān huǒchē, xìnghǎo zhǐ wǎn bàn gè xiǎoshí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 da1 xia4 yi1 ban1 huo3che1, xing4hao3 zhi3 wan3 ban4 ge4 xiao3shi2.
turns.translation_en: I took the next train; luckily, it was only half an hour late.
turns.translation_ko: 다음 기차를 탔는데, 다행히 30분밖에 늦지 않았어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，下次早一點出門就好了。
turns.pinyin: Méiguānxì, xià cì zǎo yīdiǎn chūmén jiù hǎo le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2guan1xi4, xia4 ci4 zao3 yi1dian3 chu1men2 jiu4 hao3 le5.
turns.translation_en: It's okay, just leave a bit earlier next time.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아, 다음에는 조금 일찍 나가면 돼.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did the person miss the train?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 그 사람이 기차를 놓친 이유는 무엇입니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the explanation of the cause and effect.
free_response_prompt: Describe a time you were late. Use 因為, 所以, 結果, 幸好.

title: 送錯餐的故事

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 不好意思，這是你的牛肉麵嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè shì nǐ de niúròumiàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si5, zhe4 shi4 ni3 de5 niu2rou4mian4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, is this your beef noodle soup?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 이게 손님의 소고기 국수인가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不是，我點的是滷肉飯。
turns.pinyin: Bùshì, wǒ diǎn de shì lǔròufàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4shi4, wo3 dian3 de5 shi4 lu3rou4fan4.
turns.translation_en: No, I ordered braised pork rice.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 저는 루로우판을 주문했어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 糟糕，我送錯了。對不起！
turns.pinyin: Zāogāo, wǒ sòng cuò le. Duìbùqǐ!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zao1gao1, wo3 song4 cuo4 le5. Dui4bu4qi3!
turns.translation_en: Oh no, I delivered the wrong order. I'm sorry!
turns.translation_ko: 큰일 났네요, 잘못 가져왔어요. 죄송합니다!

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 沒關係，那我的滷肉飯呢？
turns.pinyin: Méiguānxì, nà wǒ de lǔròufàn ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2guan1xi4, na4 wo3 de5 lu3rou4fan4 ne5?
turns.translation_en: It's okay, but where is my braised pork rice?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 그럼 제 루로우판은요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 我馬上去廚房確認，請等一下。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ mǎshàng qù chúfáng quèrèn, qǐng děng yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ma3shang4 qu4 chu2fang2 que4ren4, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.
turns.translation_en: I'll go to the kitchen to check right away, please wait a moment.
turns.translation_ko: 바로 주방에 확인하러 갈게요, 잠시만 기다려 주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好，麻煩你了。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, máfan nǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, ma2fan5 ni3 le5.
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you for your trouble.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 번거롭게 해드려서 죄송합니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 結果你的滷肉飯已經做好了，我馬上幫你換。
turns.pinyin: Jiéguǒ nǐ de lǔròufàn yǐjīng zuò hǎo le, wǒ mǎshàng bāng nǐ huàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jie2guo3 ni3 de5 lu3rou4fan4 yi3jing1 zuo4 hao3 le5, wo3 ma3shang4 bang1 ni3 huan4.
turns.translation_en: It turns out your braised pork rice is already done; I'll swap it for you right away.
turns.translation_ko: 알고 보니 손님의 루로우판은 이미 다 됐네요, 바로 바꿔 드릴게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer actually order?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, focusing on the polite apology and the explanation of the mistake.
free_response_prompt: Tell a story about a wrong order at a restaurant. Use 送錯, 結果, 換.

title: 在便利商店請店員幫忙
scenario: asking for help after a problem

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，我的手機壞掉了，可以幫我嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ de shǒujī huài diào le, kěyǐ bāng wǒ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 de5 shou3 ji1 huai4 diao4 le5, ke3 yi3 bang1 wo3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, my phone is broken. Can you help me?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다. 제 휴대폰이 고장 났는데, 도와주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題，請問你需要什麼幫忙？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, qǐng wèn nǐ xūyào shénme bāngmáng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2, qing3 wen4 ni3 xu1 yao4 shen2 me0 bang1 mang2?
turns.translation_en: No problem. What help do you need?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다. 어떤 도움이 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我想打電話給朋友，可是手機故障了。可以借電話嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng dǎ diànhuà gěi péngyou, kěshì shǒujī gùzhàng le. Kěyǐ jiè diànhuà ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 xiang3 da3 dian4 hua4 gei3 peng2 you5, ke3 shi4 shou3 ji1 gu4 zhang4 le5. ke3 yi3 jie4 dian4 hua4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I want to call my friend, but my phone is broken. Can I borrow a phone?
turns.translation_ko: 친구에게 전화를 하고 싶은데 휴대폰이 고장 났어요. 전화를 빌릴 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 可以，這裡有電話。請告訴我號碼。
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, zhèlǐ yǒu diànhuà. Qǐng gàosu wǒ hàomǎ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ke3 yi3, zhe4 li3 you3 dian4 hua4. qing3 gao4 su5 wo3 hao4 ma3.
turns.translation_en: Sure, there's a phone here. Please tell me the number.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기에 전화기가 있습니다. 번호를 알려주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝！號碼是零九一二三四五六七八。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie! Hàomǎ shì líng jiǔ yī èr sān sì wǔ liù qī bā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: xie4 xie5! hao4 ma3 shi4 ling2 jiu3 yi1 er4 san1 si4 wu3 liu4 qi1 ba1.
turns.translation_en: Thank you! The number is 0912-345-678.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다! 번호는 0912-345-678입니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，請等一下。我幫你打。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià. Wǒ bāng nǐ dǎ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, qing3 deng3 yi1 xia4. wo3 bang1 ni3 da3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, please wait a moment. I'll call for you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요. 제가 전화를 걸어 드릴게요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 麻煩你了，謝謝！
turns.pinyin: Máfan nǐ le, xièxie!
turns.pinyin_numeric: ma2 fan5 ni3 le5, xie4 xie5!
turns.translation_en: I'm troubling you, thank you!
turns.translation_ko: 번거롭게 해드려 죄송합니다. 감사합니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the customer's problem?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the polite tone and the phrase '可以幫我嗎'.
free_response_prompt: Imagine your phone is broken and you need to call a friend. Practice asking a store staff for help in Chinese.

title: 打電話給朋友求助
scenario: asking for help after a problem

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 喂，小明嗎？我現在需要幫忙。
turns.pinyin: Wèi, Xiǎo Míng ma? Wǒ xiànzài xūyào bāngmáng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wei4, Xiao3 Ming2 ma5? wo3 xian4 zai4 xu1 yao4 bang1 mang2.
turns.translation_en: Hello, is this Xiaoming? I need help right now.
turns.translation_ko: 여보세요, 샤오밍 씨인가요? 지금 도움이 필요해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 怎麼了？發生什麼事？
turns.pinyin: Zěnme le? Fāshēng shénme shì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zen3 me0 le5? fa1 sheng1 shen2 me0 shi4?
turns.translation_en: What's wrong? What happened?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 그래요? 무슨 일이에요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我的車子故障了，停在路邊。可以來幫我嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ de chēzi gùzhàng le, tíng zài lùbiān. Kěyǐ lái bāng wǒ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 de5 che1 zi5 gu4 zhang4 le5, ting2 zai4 lu4 bian1. ke3 yi3 lai2 bang1 wo3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: My car broke down and is parked on the roadside. Can you come help me?
turns.translation_ko: 차가 고장 나서 길가에 세워뒀어요. 와서 도와줄 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你在哪裡？告訴我地址。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zài nǎlǐ? Gàosu wǒ dìzhǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ni3 zai4 na3 li3? gao4 su5 wo3 di4 zhi3.
turns.translation_en: Where are you? Tell me the address.
turns.translation_ko: 어디에 있어요? 주소를 알려줘요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我在台北車站前面的大馬路。地址是忠孝西路一段五十號。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zài Táiběi Chēzhàn qiánmiàn de dà mǎlù. Dìzhǐ shì Zhōngxiào Xīlù yī duàn wǔshí hào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 zai4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4 qian2 mian4 de5 da4 ma3 lu4. di4 zhi3 shi4 Zhong1 xiao4 Xi1 lu4 yi1 duan4 wu3 shi2 hao4.
turns.translation_en: I'm on the main road in front of Taipei Station. The address is No. 50, Section 1, Zhongxiao West Road.
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이 역 앞 큰 길에 있어요. 주소는 중샤오시루 1단 50호예요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，我馬上過去。你等我一下。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ mǎshàng guòqù. Nǐ děng wǒ yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3, wo3 ma3 shang4 guo4 qu4. ni3 deng3 wo3 yi1 xia4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll come right away. Wait for me a moment.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아, 바로 갈게. 잠시만 기다려.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝你！麻煩你了。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ! Máfan nǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: xie4 xie5 ni3! ma2 fan5 ni3 le5.
turns.translation_en: Thank you! Sorry for the trouble.
turns.translation_ko: 고마워! 번거롭게 해서 미안해.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What problem does A have?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, paying attention to the urgency in the tone and the address details.
free_response_prompt: Imagine your car breaks down. Practice calling a friend to ask for help, giving your location and address.

title: 需要地址寄東西
scenario: asking for help after a problem

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，請問你可以幫我一個忙嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ kěyǐ bāng wǒ yī ge máng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 ke3 yi3 bang1 wo3 yi1 ge5 mang2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Hello, can you do me a favor?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 부탁 하나 들어주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 當然，你需要什麼幫忙？
turns.pinyin: Dāngrán, nǐ xūyào shénme bāngmáng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: dang1 ran2, ni3 xu1 yao4 shen2 me0 bang1 mang2?
turns.translation_en: Of course, what help do you need?
turns.translation_ko: 물론이죠, 어떤 도움이 필요하세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想寄一封信給朋友，可是我把他的地址弄丟了。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng jì yī fēng xìn gěi péngyou, kěshì wǒ bǎ tā de dìzhǐ nòng diū le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 xiang3 ji4 yi1 feng1 xin4 gei3 peng2 you5, ke3 shi4 wo3 ba3 ta1 de5 di4 zhi3 nong4 diu1 le5.
turns.translation_en: I want to send a letter to a friend, but I lost his address.
turns.translation_ko: 친구에게 편지를 보내고 싶은데 주소를 잃어버렸어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒關係，你知道他的名字嗎？我可以幫你找。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, nǐ zhīdào tā de míngzì ma? Wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ zhǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 guan1 xi5, ni3 zhi1 dao4 ta1 de5 ming2 zi4 ma5? wo3 ke3 yi3 bang1 ni3 zhao3.
turns.translation_en: No problem, do you know his name? I can help you find it.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 그분 이름을 아세요? 제가 찾아드릴게요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 他叫王大明，住在台北。你有他的地址嗎？
turns.pinyin: Tā jiào Wáng Dàmíng, zhù zài Táiběi. Nǐ yǒu tā de dìzhǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ta1 jiao4 Wang2 Da4 ming2, zhu4 zai4 Tai2 bei3. ni3 you3 ta1 de5 di4 zhi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: His name is Wang Daming, and he lives in Taipei. Do you have his address?
turns.translation_ko: 그분 이름은 왕다밍이고 타이베이에 살아요. 주소를 알고 계신가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我沒有，不過你可以打電話問他。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu, bùguò nǐ kěyǐ dǎ diànhuà wèn tā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 mei2 you3, bu4 guo4 ni3 ke3 yi3 da3 dian4 hua4 wen4 ta1.
turns.translation_en: I don't have it, but you can call and ask him.
turns.translation_ko: 없는데, 전화해서 물어보시면 돼요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對，我應該打電話給他。謝謝你的建議！
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ yīnggāi dǎ diànhuà gěi tā. Xièxie nǐ de jiànyì!
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4, wo3 ying1 gai1 da3 dian4 hua4 gei3 ta1. xie4 xie5 ni3 de5 jian4 yi4!
turns.translation_en: Right, I should call him. Thanks for the suggestion!
turns.translation_ko: 맞아요, 전화해야겠어요. 조언 감사합니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did A lose?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, focusing on the polite request and the phrase '弄丟了'.
free_response_prompt: You need to send something to a friend but lost their address. Practice asking someone for help and suggesting a solution.

title: 退貨

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我想退貨。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng tuìhuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 tui4huo4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like to return an item.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 반품하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，請問有什麼問題嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng wèn yǒu shénme wèntí ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 wen4 you3 shen2 me0 wen4ti2 ma?
turns.translation_en: Okay, what seems to be the problem?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 무슨 문제가 있으신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 這件衣服有瑕疵，這裡破掉了。
turns.pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu yǒu xiácī, zhèlǐ pò diào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 jian4 yi1fu you3 xia2ci1, zhe4li3 po4 diao4 le.
turns.translation_en: This piece of clothing has a defect; it's torn here.
turns.translation_ko: 이 옷에 결함이 있어요, 여기가 찢어졌어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 我看一下。沒問題，我們可以幫您退貨。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ kàn yīxià. Méi wèntí, wǒmen kěyǐ bāng nín tuìhuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 kan4 yi1xia4. Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3men ke3yi3 bang1 nin2 tui4huo4.
turns.translation_en: Let me take a look. No problem, we can process the return for you.
turns.translation_ko: 한번 볼게요. 문제없습니다, 저희가 반품을 도와드릴 수 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝。需要發票嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Xūyào fāpiào ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie. Xu1yao4 fa1piao4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. Do you need the receipt?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 영수증이 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 是的，請給我發票。
turns.pinyin: Shì de, qǐng gěi wǒ fāpiào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Shi4 de, qing3 gei3 wo3 fa1piao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, please give me the receipt.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 영수증을 주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 在這裡。
turns.pinyin: Zài zhèlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zai4 zhe4li3.
turns.translation_en: Here it is.
turns.translation_ko: 여기 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，我幫您處理。錢會退到您的信用卡。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín chǔlǐ. Qián huì tuì dào nín de xìnyòngkǎ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 bang1 nin2 chu3li3. Qian2 hui4 tui4 dao4 nin2 de xin4yong4ka3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll handle it for you. The refund will go back to your credit card.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 처리해 드리겠습니다. 금액은 신용카드로 환불됩니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why does the customer want to return the item?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on the tone of '瑕疵' and '破掉'.
free_response_prompt: Practice explaining a reason for returning an item, like '這件衣服有瑕疵'.

title: 換尺寸

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，這雙鞋子尺寸不合，我想換尺寸。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, zhè shuāng xiézi chǐcùn bù hé, wǒ xiǎng huàn chǐcùn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4si, zhe4 shuang1 xie2zi chi3cun4 bu4 he2, wo3 xiang3 huan4 chi3cun4.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, these shoes don't fit. I'd like to exchange them for a different size.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 이 신발 사이즈가 맞지 않아서 교환하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題，請問您要換大一點還是小一點？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, qǐng wèn nín yào huàn dà yīdiǎn háishì xiǎo yīdiǎn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, qing3 wen4 nin2 yao4 huan4 da4 yi1dian3 hai2shi4 xiao3 yi1dian3?
turns.translation_en: No problem. Would you like to exchange for a larger or smaller size?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 더 큰 사이즈로 교환하시겠어요, 아니면 더 작은 사이즈로 교환하시겠어요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 要換大一點的，這雙太小了。
turns.pinyin: Yào huàn dà yīdiǎn de, zhè shuāng tài xiǎo le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yao4 huan4 da4 yi1dian3 de, zhe4 shuang1 tai4 xiao3 le.
turns.translation_en: I need a larger size; these are too small.
turns.translation_ko: 더 큰 사이즈로 교환할게요, 이건 너무 작아요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，我幫您查一下有沒有大一點的尺寸。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín chá yīxià yǒu méiyǒu dà yīdiǎn de chǐcùn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 bang1 nin2 cha2 yi1xia4 you3 mei2you3 da4 yi1dian3 de chi3cun4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, let me check if we have a larger size.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 더 큰 사이즈가 있는지 확인해 보겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝。需要補差價嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Xūyào bǔ chājià ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie. Xu1yao4 bu3 cha1jia4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. Do I need to pay the difference?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 차액을 지불해야 하나요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 不用，這雙是原價，換尺寸是免費的。
turns.pinyin: Bùyòng, zhè shuāng shì yuánjià, huàn chǐcùn shì miǎnfèi de.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4yong4, zhe4 shuang1 shi4 yuan2jia4, huan4 chi3cun4 shi4 mian3fei4 de.
turns.translation_en: No need, these are at the original price, and size exchange is free.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다, 이 신발은 정가이고 사이즈 교환은 무료입니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the customer exchanging?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, paying attention to the polite tone of '不好意思' and '請問'.
free_response_prompt: Practice asking to exchange an item for a different size, like '我想換尺寸'.

title: 沒有發票

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我想退貨，可是我沒有發票。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng tuìhuò, kěshì wǒ méiyǒu fāpiào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 tui4huo4, ke3shi4 wo3 mei2you3 fa1piao4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like to return an item, but I don't have the receipt.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 반품하고 싶은데 영수증이 없습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒關係，請問您有購買證明嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, qǐng wèn nín yǒu gòumǎi zhèngmíng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi, qing3 wen4 nin2 you3 gou4mai3 zheng4ming2 ma?
turns.translation_en: That's okay. Do you have any proof of purchase?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다. 구매 증명서가 있으신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 沒有，我只有手機的付款紀錄。
turns.pinyin: Méiyǒu, wǒ zhǐyǒu shǒujī de fùkuǎn jìlù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2you3, wo3 zhi3you3 shou3ji1 de fu4kuan3 ji4lu4.
turns.translation_en: No, I only have the payment record on my phone.
turns.translation_ko: 없습니다, 휴대폰 결제 기록만 있어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 可以，請讓我看看。
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, qǐng ràng wǒ kànkan.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, qing3 rang4 wo3 kan4kan.
turns.translation_en: That works. Please let me see it.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다. 보여주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 在這裡。
turns.pinyin: Zài zhèlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zai4 zhe4li3.
turns.translation_en: Here it is.
turns.translation_ko: 여기 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，我確認一下。沒問題，可以幫您退貨，但是會收一點手續費。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ quèrèn yīxià. Méi wèntí, kěyǐ bāng nín tuìhuò, dànshì huì shōu yīdiǎn shǒuxùfèi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 que4ren4 yi1xia4. Mei2 wen4ti2, ke3yi3 bang1 nin2 tui4huo4, dan4shi4 hui4 shou1 yi1dian3 shou3xu4fei4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, let me confirm. No problem, I can process the return, but there will be a small handling fee.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 확인해 볼게요. 문제없습니다, 환불해 드릴 수 있지만 수수료가 조금 부과됩니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，沒問題。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, méi wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, mei2 wen4ti2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 괜찮습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does the customer not have?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, focusing on the phrase '沒有發票' and '手續費'.
free_response_prompt: Practice explaining that you don't have a receipt but have a payment record, like '我沒有發票，只有手機的付款紀錄'.

title: 預約門診

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我想預約門診。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yùyuē ménzhěn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yu4yue1 men2zhen3.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like to book a clinic appointment.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 진료 예약을 하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，請問您要預約哪個時段？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nín yào yùyuē nǎge shíduàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3wen4 nin2 yao4 yu4yue1 na3ge shi2duan4?
turns.translation_en: Sure, which time slot would you like to book?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 어떤 시간대로 예약하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 下個星期二上午，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xià ge xīngqí'èr shàngwǔ, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xia4 ge xing1qi2er4 shang4wu3, ke3yi3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Next Tuesday morning, is that okay?
turns.translation_ko: 다음 주 화요일 오전에 가능할까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以，那個時段有空檔。請給我您的名字和電話。
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, nàge shíduàn yǒu kòngdǎng. Qǐng gěi wǒ nín de míngzì hé diànhuà.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, na4ge shi2duan4 you3 kong4dang3. Qing3 gei3 wo3 nin2 de ming2zi4 he2 dian4hua4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, that slot is available. Please give me your name and phone number.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 그 시간대에 자리가 있습니다. 성함과 전화번호를 알려주세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我叫王小明，電話是零九一二三四五六七八。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng, diànhuà shì líng jiǔ yī èr sān sì wǔ liù qī bā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2, dian4hua4 shi4 ling2 jiu3 yi1 er4 san1 si4 wu3 liu4 qi1 ba1.
turns.translation_en: My name is Wang Xiaoming, and my phone number is 0912-345-678.
turns.translation_ko: 제 이름은 왕샤오밍이고, 전화번호는 0912-345-678입니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，我幫您安排。預約號碼是八十八號。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín ānpái. Yùyuē hàomǎ shì bāshíbā hào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 bang1 nin2 an1pai2. Yu4yue1 hao4ma3 shi4 ba1shi2ba1 hao4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll arrange it for you. Your appointment number is 88.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 예약을 도와드리겠습니다. 예약 번호는 88번입니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝，麻煩你了。
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè, máfan nǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4, ma2fan ni3 le.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I appreciate your help.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 수고하셨습니다.

title: 改時間

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，我想改時間。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiǎng gǎi shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 xiang3 gai3 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I'd like to reschedule.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 시간을 변경하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，請問您要改到什麼時候？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, qǐngwèn nín yào gǎi dào shénme shíhòu?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, qing3wen4 nin2 yao4 gai3 dao4 shen2 me0 shi2hou4?
turns.translation_en: No problem, when would you like to reschedule to?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다, 언제로 변경하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 原本是下個星期二上午，可以改到星期三下午嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yuánběn shì xià ge xīngqí'èr shàngwǔ, kěyǐ gǎi dào xīngqísān xiàwǔ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yuan2ben3 shi4 xia4 ge xing1qi2er4 shang4wu3, ke3yi3 gai3 dao4 xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Originally it was next Tuesday morning, can I change it to Wednesday afternoon?
turns.translation_ko: 원래는 다음 주 화요일 오전이었는데, 수요일 오후로 변경할 수 있을까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我幫您看一下。星期三下午有空檔，可以改期。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nín kàn yīxià. Xīngqísān xiàwǔ yǒu kòngdǎng, kěyǐ gǎiqī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bang1 nin2 kan4 yi1xia4. Xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 you3 kong4dang3, ke3yi3 gai3qi1.
turns.translation_en: Let me check for you. Wednesday afternoon is available, so we can reschedule.
turns.translation_ko: 확인해 드리겠습니다. 수요일 오후에 자리가 있어서 변경 가능합니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 太好了，那就改到星期三下午。
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, nà jiù gǎi dào xīngqísān xiàwǔ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le, na4 jiu4 gai3 dao4 xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3.
turns.translation_en: Great, then let's change it to Wednesday afternoon.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 수요일 오후로 변경하겠습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，我已經幫您改好了。新的預約時間是星期三下午兩點。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ yǐjīng bāng nín gǎi hǎo le. Xīn de yùyuē shíjiān shì xīngqísān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 yi3jing1 bang1 nin2 gai3 hao3 le. Xin1 de yu4yue1 shi2jian1 shi4 xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I've changed it for you. The new appointment time is Wednesday at 2 PM.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 변경 완료했습니다. 새로운 예약 시간은 수요일 오후 2시입니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝，麻煩你了。
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè, máfan nǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4, ma2fan ni3 le.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I appreciate your help.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 수고하셨습니다.

title: 確認預約

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我想確認一下我的預約。

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 gei3 wo3 nin2 de yu4yue1 hao4ma3.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 預約號碼是八十八號。
turns.pinyin: Yùyuē hàomǎ shì bāshíbā hào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yu4yue1 hao4ma3 shi4 ba1shi2ba1 hao4.
turns.translation_en: The appointment number is 88.
turns.translation_ko: 예약 번호는 88번입니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我幫您查一下。您的預約是下個星期三下午兩點，對嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nín chá yīxià. Nín de yùyuē shì xià ge xīngqísān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, duì ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bang1 nin2 cha2 yi1xia4. Nin2 de yu4yue1 shi4 xia4 ge xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, dui4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Let me check for you. Your appointment is next Wednesday at 2 PM, correct?
turns.translation_ko: 확인해 드리겠습니다. 예약이 다음 주 수요일 오후 2시 맞습니까?

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, mei2 you3 wen4ti2. Xie4xie4 ni3.

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2 ke4qi4, qing3 zhun3shi2 dao4.

title: 如果下雨的話
scenario: if this happens, then do that

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 明天如果下雨的話，我們就不要去公園了。
turns.pinyin: Míngtiān rúguǒ xiàyǔ dehuà, wǒmen jiù bù yào qù gōngyuán le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ming2 tian1 ru2 guo3 xia4 yu3 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 jiu4 bu4 yao4 qu4 gong1 yuan2 le5.
turns.translation_en: If it rains tomorrow, let's not go to the park.
turns.translation_ko: 내일 비가 오면 공원에 가지 말아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，那我們就去咖啡店喝咖啡，看書。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, nà wǒmen jiù qù kāfēi diàn hē kāfēi, kàn shū.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 a5, na4 wo3 men5 jiu4 qu4 ka1 fei1 dian4 he1 ka1 fei1, kan4 shu1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, then we'll go to a coffee shop to drink coffee and read books.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 커피숍에 가서 커피 마시고 책을 봐요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 要是沒下雨的話，我們就去公園散步。
turns.pinyin: Yàoshi méi xiàyǔ dehuà, wǒmen jiù qù gōngyuán sànbù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: yao4 shi4 mei2 xia4 yu3 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 jiu4 qu4 gong1 yuan2 san4 bu4.
turns.translation_en: If it doesn't rain, we'll go for a walk in the park.
turns.translation_ko: 비가 안 오면 공원에 산책하러 가요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，那我們先準備一下。萬一下雨的話，記得帶傘。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒmen xiān zhǔnbèi yīxià. Wànyī xiàyǔ dehuà, jìde dài sǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3, na4 wo3 men5 xian1 zhun3 bei4 yi1 xia4. wan4 yi1 xia4 yu3 de5 hua4, ji4 de5 dai4 san3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, let's prepare a bit. In case it rains, remember to bring an umbrella.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 먼저 준비 좀 해요. 만약 비가 오면 우산 챙기는 거 잊지 마세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題，我會帶傘。如果天氣好的話，我們也可以去公園拍照。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ huì dài sǎn. Rúguǒ tiānqì hǎo dehuà, wǒmen yě kěyǐ qù gōngyuán pāizhào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2, wo3 hui4 dai4 san3. ru2 guo3 tian1 qi4 hao3 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 ye3 ke3 yi3 qu4 gong1 yuan2 pai1 zhao4.
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll bring an umbrella. If the weather is good, we can also take photos at the park.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 우산 챙길게요. 날씨가 좋으면 공원에서 사진도 찍을 수 있어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What will they do if it rains?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 비가 오면 그들은 무엇을 할 예정인가요?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the conditional structure '如果...的話' and '要是...就'.
free_response_prompt: Say what you will do if it rains tomorrow. Use '如果...的話' or '要是...就'.

title: 如果遲到的話
scenario: if this happens, then do that

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 明天我們約早上九點在車站見面。如果你遲到的話，我就先走了。
turns.pinyin: Míngtiān wǒmen yuē zǎoshang jiǔ diǎn zài chēzhàn jiànmiàn. Rúguǒ nǐ chídào dehuà, wǒ jiù xiān zǒu le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ming2 tian1 wo3 men5 yue1 zao3 shang5 jiu3 dian3 zai4 che1 zhan4 jian4 mian4. ru2 guo3 ni3 chi2 dao4 de5 hua4, wo3 jiu4 xian1 zou3 le5.
turns.translation_en: Tomorrow we agreed to meet at the station at 9 AM. If you're late, I'll leave first.
turns.translation_ko: 내일 아침 9시에 역에서 만나기로 했어요. 만약 늦으면 먼저 갈게요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 抱歉，我不會遲到的。要是真的遲到的話，我會先打電話給你。
turns.pinyin: Bàoqiàn, wǒ bù huì chídào de. Yàoshi zhēn de chídào dehuà, wǒ huì xiān dǎ diànhuà gěi nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: bao4 qian4, wo3 bu4 hui4 chi2 dao4 de5. yao4 shi4 zhen1 de5 chi2 dao4 de5 hua4, wo3 hui4 xian1 da3 dian4 hua4 gei3 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I won't be late. If I really am late, I'll call you first.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 늦지 않을게요. 정말 늦으면 먼저 전화 드릴게요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，那我們就約九點。萬一你遲到的話，我們就改時間。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒmen jiù yuē jiǔ diǎn. Wànyī nǐ chídào dehuà, wǒmen jiù gǎi shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3, na4 wo3 men5 jiu4 yue1 jiu3 dian3. wan4 yi1 ni3 chi2 dao4 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 jiu4 gai3 shi2 jian1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, let's meet at nine. In case you're late, we'll reschedule.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 9시로 약속해요. 만약 늦으면 시간을 바꿔요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，我會準時到。如果塞車的話，我會提早出門。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ huì zhǔnshí dào. Rúguǒ sāichē dehuà, wǒ huì tízǎo chūmén.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2, wo3 hui4 zhun3 shi2 dao4. ru2 guo3 sai1 che1 de5 hua4, wo3 hui4 ti2 zao3 chu1 men2.
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll be on time. If there's a traffic jam, I'll leave early.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 정시에 도착할게요. 교통 체증이 있으면 일찍 나갈게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What will A do if B is late?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B가 늦으면 A는 무엇을 할 예정인가요?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the conditional structures '如果...的話' and '要是...就'.
free_response_prompt: Say what you will do if your friend is late for a meeting. Use '如果...的話' or '要是...就'.

title: 如果關門的話
scenario: if this happens, then do that

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想去那家餐廳吃牛肉麵，可是如果關門的話，我們就去吃滷肉飯。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù nà jiā cāntīng chī niúròu miàn, kěshì rúguǒ guānmén dehuà, wǒmen jiù qù chī lǔròu fàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 xiang3 qu4 na4 jia1 can1 ting1 chi1 niu2 rou4 mian4, ke3 shi4 ru2 guo3 guan1 men2 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 jiu4 qu4 chi1 lu3 rou4 fan4.
turns.translation_en: I want to go to that restaurant for beef noodles, but if it's closed, we'll go out to eat braised pork rice.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，那我們先去看看。要是關門的話，我們就換一家。

turns.translation_en: Okay, let's go check first. If it's closed, we'll switch to another place.

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin_numeric: wan4 yi1 na4 jia1 ye3 guan1 men2 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 jiu4 hui2 jia1 zi4 ji3 zhu3.
turns.translation_en: In case that place is also closed, we'll go home and cook ourselves.

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒmen xiān zhǔnbèi yīxià. Rúguǒ guānmén dehuà, wǒmen jiù qù biànlì shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi chī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3, na4 wo3 men5 xian1 zhun3 bei4 yi1 xia4. ru2 guo3 guan1 men2 de5 hua4, wo3 men5 jiu4 qu4 bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 mai3 dong1 xi5 chi1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, let's prepare a bit. If it's closed, we'll go to the convenience store to buy something to eat.
