title: 曾經去過的地方，不如再去一次？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你曾經去過淡水嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ céngjīng qù guò Dànshuǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ceng2jing1 qu4 guo4 Dan4shui3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Have you ever been to Tamsui?
turns.translation_ko: 단수이에 가본 적이 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有啊，我去年去過一次。風景很漂亮。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu a, wǒ qùnián qù guò yī cì. Fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 a, wo3 qu4nian2 qu4 guo4 yi1 ci4. Feng1jing3 hen3 piao4liang.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I went once last year. The scenery was very beautiful.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 작년에 한 번 갔었어요. 풍경이 아름다웠어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你覺得再去一次怎麼樣？不如我們這個週末一起去。
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ juéde zài qù yī cì zěnme yàng? Bùrú wǒmen zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 jue2de zai4 qu4 yi1 ci4 zen3 me0 yang4? Bu4ru2 wo3men zhe4ge zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Then how about going again? Why don't we go together this weekend?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 다시 한 번 가는 게 어때요? 이번 주말에 같이 가는 게 낫겠어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我曾經吃過那裡的阿給，很好吃。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ céngjīng chī guò nàlǐ de āgěi, hěn hǎochī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a! Wo3 ceng2jing1 chi1 guo4 na4li3 de a1gei3, hen3 hao3chi1.
turns.translation_en: Great! I've had the a-gei there before; it's delicious.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 거기서 아까이를 먹어본 적이 있는데, 정말 맛있었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那我們可以再去吃一次，順便看夕陽。
turns.pinyin: Nà wǒmen kěyǐ zài qù chī yī cì, shùnbiàn kàn xīyáng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wo3men ke3yi3 zai4 qu4 chi1 yi1 ci4, shun4bian4 kan4 xi1yang2.
turns.translation_en: Then we can go out to eat it again and watch the sunset while we're at it.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 다시 먹으러 가면서 석양도 보면 좋겠네요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，就這麼決定！我現在正在看天氣，希望是晴天。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, jiù zhème juédìng! Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kàn tiānqì, xīwàng shì qíngtiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, jiu4 zhe4 me0 jue2ding4! Wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kan4 tian1qi4, xi1wang4 shi4 qing2tian1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, it's settled! I'm checking the weather now; I hope it's sunny.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그렇게 정해요! 지금 날씨를 보고 있는데, 맑았으면 좋겠네요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where did speaker B go last year?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '曾經' and '正在'.
free_response_prompt: Tell a story about a place you have visited before and suggest going there again.

title: 你能夠幫我修理手機嗎？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我的手機壞了，你能夠幫我修理嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ de shǒujī huài le, nǐ nénggòu bāng wǒ xiūlǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 de shou3ji1 huai4 le, ni3 neng2gou4 bang1 wo3 xiu1li3 ma?
turns.translation_en: My phone is broken; can you help me fix it?
turns.translation_ko: 제 휴대폰이 고장 났는데, 고치는 걸 도와주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我曾經修過手機，但是不太會修理新的型號。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ céngjīng xiū guò shǒujī, dànshì bù tài huì xiūlǐ xīn de xínghào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ceng2jing1 xiu1 guo4 shou3ji1, dan4shi4 bu4 tai4 hui4 xiu1li3 xin1 de xing2hao4.
turns.translation_en: I've fixed phones before, but I'm not very good at repairing new models.
turns.translation_ko: 예전에 휴대폰을 수리해 본 적은 있지만, 새 모델은 잘 못 고쳐요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，你先幫我看一下，能不能修。
turns.pinyin: Méiguānxi, nǐ xiān bāng wǒ kàn yīxià, néng bù néng xiū.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2guan1xi4, ni3 xian1 bang1 wo3 kan4 yi1xia4, neng2 bu4 neng2 xiu1.
turns.translation_en: It's okay; first take a look for me and see if it can be fixed.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 먼저 한번 봐 주세요, 고칠 수 있는지.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，我試試看。你正在用這支手機做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ shì shì kàn. Nǐ zhèngzài yòng zhè zhī shǒujī zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 shi4 shi4 kan4. Ni3 zheng4zai4 yong4 zhe4 zhi1 shou3ji1 zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Okay, let me try. What were you doing with this phone?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 한번 해볼게요. 이 휴대폰으로 무엇을 하고 계셨나요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我剛才正在看影片，然後螢幕就黑了。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ gāngcái zhèngzài kàn yǐngpiàn, ránhòu yíngmù jiù hēi le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 gang1cai2 zheng4zai4 kan4 ying3pian4, ran2hou4 ying2mu4 jiu4 hei1 le.
turns.translation_en: I was just watching a video, and then the screen went black.
turns.translation_ko: 방금 영상을 보고 있었는데, 화면이 꺼졌어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可能是電池的問題。我能夠幫你換電池，但是需要時間。
turns.pinyin: Kěnéng shì diànchí de wèntí. Wǒ nénggòu bāng nǐ huàn diànchí, dànshì xūyào shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3neng2 shi4 dian4chi2 de wen4ti2. Wo3 neng2gou4 bang1 ni3 huan4 dian4chi2, dan4shi4 xu1yao4 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: It might be a battery issue. I can help you replace the battery, but it will take time.
turns.translation_ko: 배터리 문제인 것 같아요. 배터리를 교체해 드릴 수는 있지만, 시간이 필요해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題，你慢慢修。我打算明天再來拿。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, nǐ màn man xiū. Wǒ dǎsuàn míngtiān zài lái ná.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, ni3 man4 man xiu1. Wo3 da3suan4 ming2tian1 zai4 lai2 na2.
turns.translation_en: No problem, take your time fixing it. I plan to come pick it up tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 천천히 고치세요. 내일 다시 찾으러 올게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the problem with the phone?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the use of '能夠' and '正在'.
free_response_prompt: Describe a time when you needed help fixing something and what you planned to do.

title: 比較一下，哪一個比較好？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想買一個新手機，但是不知道要選哪一個。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī gè xīn shǒujī, dànshì bù zhīdào yào xuǎn nǎ yī gè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi1 ge4 xin1 shou3ji1, dan4shi4 bu4 zhi1dao4 yao4 xuan3 na3 yi1 ge4.
turns.translation_en: I would like to buy a new phone, but I don't know which one to choose.
turns.translation_ko: 새 휴대폰을 사고 싶은데, 어떤 걸 골라야 할지 모르겠어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你可以比較這兩支手機的價錢和功能。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ bǐjiào zhè liǎng zhī shǒujī de jiàqián hé gōngnéng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ke3yi3 bi3jiao4 zhe4 liang3 zhi1 shou3ji1 de jia4qian2 he2 gong1neng2.
turns.translation_en: You can compare the price and features of these two phones.
turns.translation_ko: 이 두 휴대폰의 가격과 기능을 비교해 보세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這一支比較便宜，但是那一支的相機比較好。
turns.pinyin: Zhè yī zhī bǐjiào piányi, dànshì nà yī zhī de xiàngjī bǐjiào hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 yi1 zhi1 bi3jiao4 pian2yi4, dan4shi4 na4 yi1 zhi1 de xiang4ji1 bi3jiao4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: This one is cheaper, but that one has a better camera.
turns.translation_ko: 이쪽이 더 싸지만, 저쪽이 카메라가 더 좋아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 那你覺得哪一個比較重要？價錢還是相機？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ juéde nǎ yī gè bǐjiào zhòngyào? Jiàqián háishì xiàngjī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 jue2de na3 yi1 ge4 bi3jiao4 zhong4yao4? Jia4qian2 hai2shi4 xiang4ji1?
turns.translation_en: Then which do you think is more important? Price or camera?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 어떤 게 더 중요하다고 생각하세요? 가격인가요, 카메라인가요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我比較喜歡拍照，所以相機好一點比較重要。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān pāizhào, suǒyǐ xiàngjī hǎo yīdiǎn bǐjiào zhòngyào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 pai1zhao4, suo3yi3 xiang4ji1 hao3 yi1dian3 bi3jiao4 zhong4yao4.
turns.translation_en: I prefer taking photos, so a better camera is more important.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 사진 찍는 걸 더 좋아해서, 카메라가 조금 더 나은 게 더 중요해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 那不如選相機比較好的那一支，雖然比較貴。
turns.pinyin: Nà bùrú xuǎn xiàngjī bǐjiào hǎo de nà yī zhī, suīrán bǐjiào guì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 bu4ru2 xuan3 xiang4ji1 bi3jiao4 hao3 de na4 yi1 zhi1, sui1ran2 bi3jiao4 gui4.
turns.translation_en: Then why not choose the one with the better camera, even though it's more expensive.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 카메라가 더 좋은 쪽을 고르는 게 낫겠네요, 비싸긴 하지만요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，我就買這一支。謝謝你的建議！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ jiù mǎi zhè yī zhī. Xièxiè nǐ de jiànyì!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 jiu4 mai3 zhe4 yi1 zhi1. Xie4xie4 ni3 de jian4yi4!
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll buy this one. Thanks for your advice!
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 이걸로 살게요. 조언 감사합니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Which phone did speaker A decide to buy?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 화자 A는 어떤 휴대폰을 사기로 결정했습니까?
options_en: The one with the better camera
comprehension_questions.answer_en: The one with the better camera

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on the comparative structure '比較' and the suggestion '不如'.
free_response_prompt: Compare two items you are considering buying and explain your choice.

title: 頭痛

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你怎麼了？看起來不太舒服。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme le? Kàn qǐlái bú tài shūfu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zen3 me0 le5? Kan4 qi3lai2 bu2 tai4 shu1fu.
turns.translation_en: What's wrong? You don't look well.
turns.translation_ko: 어디 아파요? 몸이 안 좋아 보여요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我從早上開始一直頭痛，到現在還沒有好。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ cóng zǎoshang kāishǐ yìzhí tóutòng, dào xiànzài hái méiyǒu hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 cong2 zao3shang kai1shi3 yi4zhi2 tou2tong4, dao4 xian4zai4 hai2 mei2you3 hao3.
turns.translation_en: I've had a headache since this morning, and it still hasn't gotten better.
turns.translation_ko: 아침부터 계속 두통이 있는데, 아직도 낫지 않았어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 有去看醫生嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yǒu qù kàn yīshēng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Have you seen a doctor?
turns.translation_ko: 병원에 가 보셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 還沒有。我想先休息一下，如果還是很痛，再去看醫生。
turns.pinyin: Hái méiyǒu. Wǒ xiǎng xiān xiūxi yíxià, rúguǒ háishì hěn tòng, zài qù kàn yīshēng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hai2 mei2you3. Wo3 xiang3 xian1 xiu1xi yi2xia4, ru2guo3 hai2shi4 hen3 tong4, zai4 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1.
turns.translation_en: Not yet. I want to rest first. If it still hurts a lot, then I'll go see a doctor.
turns.translation_ko: 아직요. 먼저 좀 쉬려고요. 그래도 계속 아프면 병원에 갈 거예요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 要不要吃一點藥？我這裡有頭痛藥。
turns.pinyin: Yào bú yào chī yìdiǎn yào? Wǒ zhèlǐ yǒu tóutòng yào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yao4 bu2 yao4 chi1 yi4dian3 yao4? Wo3 zhe4li3 you3 tou2tong4 yao4.
turns.translation_en: Do you want to take some medicine? I have headache medicine here.
turns.translation_ko: 약 좀 드실래요? 여기 두통약 있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不用了，謝謝。我休息一下就好。
turns.pinyin: Bú yòng le, xièxie. Wǒ xiūxi yíxià jiù hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2 yong4 le5, xie4xie5. Wo3 xiu1xi yi2xia4 jiu4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: No, thank you. I'll be fine after resting a bit.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 고마워요. 좀 쉬면 괜찮아질 거예요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: When did B's headache start?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of 'tóutòng' and the phrase 'cóng...kāishǐ'.
free_response_prompt: Describe a time you had a headache. What did you do? Did you see a doctor or take medicine?

title: 肚子痛

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你怎麼一直摸肚子？不舒服嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme yìzhí mō dùzi? Bù shūfu ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zen3 me0 yi4zhi2 mo1 du4zi5? Bu4 shu1fu ma?
turns.translation_en: Why are you holding your stomach? Are you feeling unwell?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 계속 배를 만지고 있어요? 몸이 안 좋아요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，我肚子痛，從昨天晚上到現在一直拉肚子。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ dùzi tòng, cóng zuótiān wǎnshang dào xiànzài yìzhí lā dùzi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 du4zi5 tong4, cong2 zuo2tian1 wan3shang dao4 xian4zai4 yi4zhi2 la1 du4zi5.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I have a stomachache. I've had diarrhea since last night.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 배가 아파요. 어젯밤부터 지금까지 계속 설사를 해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 有沒有發燒？
turns.pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu fāshāo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 mei2you3 fa1shao1?
turns.translation_en: Do you have a fever?
turns.translation_ko: 열은 있어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒有發燒，但是肚子越來越痛，有點受不了。
turns.pinyin: Méiyǒu fāshāo, dànshì dùzi yuè lái yuè tòng, yǒudiǎn shòu bù liǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2you3 fa1shao1, dan4shi4 du4zi5 yue4 lai2 yue4 tong4, you3dian3 shou4 bu4 liao3.
turns.translation_en: No fever, but my stomach hurts more and more. I can't stand it.
turns.translation_ko: 열은 없는데 배가 점점 더 아파요. 좀 참기 힘들어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那要趕快去看醫生！我陪你去醫院掛號。
turns.pinyin: Nà yào gǎnkuài qù kàn yīshēng! Wǒ péi nǐ qù yīyuàn guàhào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 yao4 gan3kuai4 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1! Wo3 pei2 ni3 qu4 yi1yuan4 gua4hao4.
turns.translation_en: Then you should see a doctor quickly! I'll go with you to register at the hospital.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 빨리 병원에 가 봐야 해요! 제가 같이 가서 접수해 드릴게요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，麻煩你了。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, máfan nǐ le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, ma2fan5 ni3 le5.
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you for your trouble.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 번거롭게 해서 죄송해요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What symptom does B have besides stomach pain?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 복통 외에 어떤 증상이 있습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to 'lā dùzi' and 'yuè lái yuè tòng'.
free_response_prompt: Have you ever had a stomachache? What caused it? What did you do to feel better?

title: 感冒症狀

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你聽起來聲音怪怪的，是不是感冒了？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ tīng qǐlái shēngyīn guài guài de, shì bú shì gǎnmào le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ting1 qi3lai2 sheng1yin1 guai4 guai4 de5, shi4 bu2 shi4 gan3mao4 le5?
turns.translation_en: Your voice sounds strange. Did you catch a cold?
turns.translation_ko: 목소리가 이상한데, 감기 걸렸어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，我昨天開始喉嚨痛，今天早上起來一直咳嗽，還有流鼻水。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ hóulóng tòng, jīntiān zǎoshang qǐlai yìzhí késòu, hái yǒu liú bíshuǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 hou2long2 tong4, jin1tian1 zao3shang qi3lai5 yi4zhi2 ke2sou4, hai2 you3 liu2 bi2shui3.
turns.translation_en: Yes, my throat started hurting yesterday. This morning I've been coughing and have a runny nose.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 어제부터 목이 아팠는데, 오늘 아침에 일어나서 계속 기침하고 콧물도 나요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 有沒有量體溫？發燒了嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu liáng tǐwēn? Fāshāo le ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 mei2you3 liang2 ti3wen1? Fa1shao1 le5 ma?
turns.translation_en: Did you take your temperature? Do you have a fever?
turns.translation_ko: 체온은 재봤어요? 열이 있어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 量了，三十七度五，有一點點發燒，但是不嚴重。
turns.pinyin: Liáng le, sānshíqī dù wǔ, yǒu yìdiǎndiǎn fāshāo, dànshì bù yánzhòng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Liang2 le5, san1shi2qi1 du4 wu3, you3 yi4dian3dian3 fa1shao1, dan4shi4 bu4 yan2zhong4.
turns.translation_en: I did. It's 37.5 degrees. I have a slight fever, but it's not serious.
turns.translation_ko: 재봤는데 37.5도예요. 열이 조금 있지만 심하지는 않아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 要多休息，喝熱水，吃藥了嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yào duō xiūxi, hē rè shuǐ, chī yào le ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yao4 duo1 xiu1xi, he1 re4 shui3, chi1 yao4 le5 ma?
turns.translation_en: You should rest more and drink hot water. Have you taken any medicine?
turns.translation_ko: 휴식을 많이 취하고 따뜻한 물을 마셔야 해요. 약은 먹었어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 還沒有，我打算等一下去藥房買藥。
turns.pinyin: Hái méiyǒu, wǒ dǎsuàn děng yíxià qù yàofáng mǎi yào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hai2 mei2you3, wo3 da3suan4 deng3 yi2xia4 qu4 yao4fang2 mai3 yao4.
turns.translation_en: Not yet. I plan to go to the pharmacy to buy medicine later.
turns.translation_ko: 아직요. 잠시 후에 약국에 가서 약을 살 생각이에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，那你要好好休息，希望你快點好起來。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà nǐ yào hǎohāo xiūxi, xīwàng nǐ kuài diǎn hǎo qǐlai.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, na4 ni3 yao4 hao3hao1 xiu1xi, xi1wang4 ni3 kuai4 dian3 hao3 qi3lai5.
turns.translation_en: Okay, then you should rest well. I hope you get better soon.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 푹 쉬세요. 빨리 나으시길 바랄게요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What symptoms does B have?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on 'hóulóng tòng', 'késòu', and 'liú bíshuǐ'.
free_response_prompt: Describe your symptoms when you had a cold. What did you do to recover?

title: 在藥房買藥

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我想要買成藥。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào mǎi chéng yào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 mai3 cheng2 yao4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I would like to buy some over-the-counter medicine.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 일반약을 사고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 你好，請問你有什麼症狀？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ yǒu shénme zhèngzhuàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 you3 shen2 me0 zheng4zhuang4?
turns.translation_en: Hello, may I ask what symptoms you have?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 어떤 증상이 있으신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我昨天開始頭痛，還有喉嚨痛。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ tóutòng, hái yǒu hóulóng tòng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 tou2tong4, hai2 you3 hou2long2 tong4.
turns.translation_en: I started having a headache yesterday, and also a sore throat.
turns.translation_ko: 어제부터 두통이 있고, 목도 아픕니다.

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 你有發燒嗎？要不要先量體溫？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu fāshāo ma? Yào bù yào xiān liáng tǐwēn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 you3 fa1shao1 ma? Yao4 bu4 yao4 xian1 liang2 ti3wen1?
turns.translation_en: Do you have a fever? Would you like to take your temperature first?
turns.translation_ko: 열이 있나요? 먼저 체온을 재보시겠어요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我沒有量，但是覺得身體很熱。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu liáng, dànshì juéde shēntǐ hěn rè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 mei2you3 liang2, dan4shi4 jue2de shen1ti3 hen3 re4.
turns.translation_en: I have not taken my temperature, but I feel very hot.
turns.translation_ko: 재보지는 않았는데, 몸이 많이 뜨겁습니다.

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 我建議你去診所看醫生。成藥可能不夠。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ jiànyì nǐ qù zhěnsuǒ kàn yīshēng. Chéng yào kěnéng bú gòu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jian4yi4 ni3 qu4 zhen3suo3 kan4 yi1sheng1. Cheng2 yao4 ke3neng2 bu2 gou4.
turns.translation_en: I suggest you go to the clinic to see a doctor. Over-the-counter medicine might not be enough.
turns.translation_ko: 진료소에 가서 의사를 만나보시는 게 좋겠습니다. 일반약으로는 부족할 수 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，謝謝你。那診所在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ. Nà zhěnsuǒ zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, xie4xie4 ni3. Na4 zhen3suo3 zai4 na3li3?
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you. Where is the clinic?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다. 그럼 진료소는 어디에 있나요?

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 前面左轉，走兩分鐘就到了。
turns.pinyin: Qiánmiàn zuǒ zhuǎn, zǒu liǎng fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qian2mian4 zuo3 zhuan3, zou3 liang3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le.
turns.translation_en: Turn left ahead, and it's a two-minute walk.
turns.translation_ko: 앞에서 좌회전하시면 2분 거리에 있습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What symptoms does the customer have?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of 症狀, 發燒, and 量體溫.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are at a pharmacy with a headache. Ask the pharmacist for advice and describe your symptoms.

title: 在診所掛號

turns.speaker: 護士
turns.text: 你好，請問要掛號嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào guàhào ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 gua4hao4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hello, would you like to register?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 접수하시겠어요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 是的，我想要掛號。
turns.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ xiǎng yào guàhào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Shi4 de, wo3 xiang3 yao4 gua4hao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I would like to register.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 접수하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 護士
turns.text: 請問你叫什麼名字？
turns.pinyin: Qǐng wèn nǐ jiào shénme míngzì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qing3 wen4 ni3 jiao4 shen2 me0 ming2zi4?
turns.translation_en: What is your name?
turns.translation_ko: 성함이 어떻게 되세요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我叫王小明。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2.
turns.translation_en: My name is Wang Xiaoming.
turns.translation_ko: 왕샤오밍이라고 합니다.

turns.speaker: 護士
turns.text: 你有來過這間診所嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu lái guò zhè jiān zhěnsuǒ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 you3 lai2 guo4 zhe4 jian1 zhen3suo3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Have you been to this clinic before?
turns.translation_ko: 이 진료소에 오신 적이 있나요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 沒有，這是第一次。
turns.pinyin: Méiyǒu, zhè shì dì yī cì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2you3, zhe4 shi4 di4 yi1 ci4.
turns.translation_en: No, this is the first time.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 처음입니다.

turns.speaker: 護士
turns.text: 好的，請填一下這張表。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng tián yīxià zhè zhāng biǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 tian2 yi1xia4 zhe4 zhang1 biao3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, please fill out this form.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 이 서류를 작성해 주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 沒問題。請問掛號費多少錢？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Qǐng wèn guàhào fèi duōshǎo qián?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Qing3 wen4 gua4hao4 fei4 duo1shao3 qian2?
turns.translation_en: No problem. How much is the registration fee?
turns.translation_ko: 알겠습니다. 접수비는 얼마인가요?

turns.speaker: 護士
turns.text: 掛號費是兩百塊。
turns.pinyin: Guàhào fèi shì liǎng bǎi kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Gua4hao4 fei4 shi4 liang3 bai3 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: The registration fee is 200 NT dollars.
turns.translation_ko: 접수비는 200위안입니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How much is the registration fee?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of 掛號 and 第一次.
free_response_prompt: You are at a clinic for the first time. Practice registering with the nurse, giving your name and asking about the fee.

title: 藥師說明用藥方法

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 這是你的藥，請記得飯後吃。
turns.pinyin: Zhè shì nǐ de yào, qǐng jìde fàn hòu chī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 shi4 ni3 de yao4, qing3 ji4de fan4 hou4 chi1.
turns.translation_en: This is your medicine. Please remember to take it after meals.
turns.translation_ko: 이것은 당신의 약입니다. 식후에 드시는 것을 기억하세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 一天要吃幾次？
turns.pinyin: Yì tiān yào chī jǐ cì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi4 tian1 yao4 chi1 ji3 ci4?
turns.translation_en: How many times a day should I take it?
turns.translation_ko: 하루에 몇 번 먹어야 하나요?

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 一天三次，一次一顆藥丸。
turns.pinyin: Yì tiān sān cì, yí cì yì kē yàowán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi4 tian1 san1 ci4, yi2 ci4 yi4 ke1 yao4wan2.
turns.translation_en: Three times a day, one pill each time.
turns.translation_ko: 하루 세 번, 한 번에 한 알씩 드세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我對某些藥過敏，這藥有副作用嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ duì mǒuxiē yào guòmǐn, zhè yào yǒu fù zuò yòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 dui4 mou3xie1 yao4 guo4min3, zhe4 yao4 you3 fu4 zuo4 yong4 ma?
turns.translation_en: I am allergic to some medicines. Does this medicine have side effects?
turns.translation_ko: 저는 특정 약에 알레르기가 있습니다. 이 약에 부작용이 있나요?

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 可能會有想睡覺的副作用。如果你不舒服，請停藥。
turns.pinyin: Kěnéng huì yǒu xiǎng shuìjiào de fù zuò yòng. Rúguǒ nǐ bù shūfú, qǐng tíng yào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3neng2 hui4 you3 xiang3 shui4jiao4 de fu4 zuo4 yong4. Ru2guo3 ni3 bu4 shu1fu2, qing3 ting2 yao4.
turns.translation_en: There may be a side effect of drowsiness. If you feel unwell, please stop taking it.
turns.translation_ko: 졸음이 오는 부작용이 있을 수 있습니다. 불편하시면 복용을 중단하세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，我了解了。謝謝你。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ liǎojiě le. Xièxiè nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 liao3jie3 le. Xie4xie4 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I understand. Thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다. 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 不客氣，祝你早日康復。
turns.pinyin: Bú kèqì, zhù nǐ zǎorì kāngfù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2 ke4qi4, zhu4 ni3 zao3ri4 kang1fu4.
turns.translation_en: You're welcome. I wish you a speedy recovery.
turns.translation_ko: 천만에요. 빨리 쾌차하시길 바랍니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How many pills should the customer take each time?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 손님은 한 번에 몇 알을 먹어야 합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of 副作用, 過敏, and 飯後.
free_response_prompt: You are at the pharmacy receiving medicine. Ask the pharmacist about the dosage, side effects, and when to take it.

title: 醫生的建議
scenario: what should or must be done

turns.speaker: 醫生
turns.text: 你應該多休息，不要工作太多。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yīnggāi duō xiūxi, bùyào gōngzuò tài duō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ying1gai1 duo1 xiu1xi5, bu4yao4 gong1zuo4 tai4 duo1.
turns.translation_en: You should rest more and not work too much.
turns.translation_ko: 더 쉬어야 하고, 너무 많이 일하지 마세요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 可是我必須把工作做完。
turns.pinyin: Kěshì wǒ bìxū bǎ gōngzuò zuò wán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3shi4 wo3 bi4xu1 ba3 gong1zuo4 zuo4 wan2.
turns.translation_en: But I must finish my work.
turns.translation_ko: 그런데 일을 끝내야 해요.

turns.speaker: 醫生
turns.text: 你最好先休息，不然身體會更不舒服。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuìhǎo xiān xiūxi, bùrán shēntǐ huì gèng bù shūfu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zui4hao3 xian1 xiu1xi5, bu4ran2 shen1ti3 hui4 geng4 bu4 shu1fu5.
turns.translation_en: You'd better rest first, otherwise your body will feel worse.
turns.translation_ko: 먼저 쉬시는 게 좋아요. 그렇지 않으면 몸이 더 안 좋아질 거예요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 好吧，我聽你的建議。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo ba, wǒ tīng nǐ de jiànyì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 ba5, wo3 ting1 ni3 de5 jian4yi4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll follow your advice.
turns.translation_ko: 알겠어요. 선생님 말씀대로 할게요.

turns.speaker: 醫生
turns.text: 還有，你必須按時吃藥，一天三次。
turns.pinyin: Hái yǒu, nǐ bìxū ànshí chī yào, yī tiān sān cì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hai2 you3, ni3 bi4xu1 an4shi2 chi1 yao4, yi1 tian1 san1 ci4.
turns.translation_en: Also, you must take your medicine on time, three times a day.
turns.translation_ko: 그리고 약은 꼭 제때 드셔야 해요. 하루에 세 번이요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does the doctor advise the patient to do?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of advice and necessity.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are a doctor. Give advice to a patient who is too busy. Use '應該', '最好', and '必須'.

title: 朋友的建議
scenario: what should or must be done

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我最近很累，每天都工作到很晚。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn hěn lèi, měitiān dōu gōngzuò dào hěn wǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zui4jin4 hen3 lei4, mei3tian1 dou1 gong1zuo4 dao4 hen3 wan3.
turns.translation_en: I've been very tired lately, working late every day.
turns.translation_ko: 요즘 너무 피곤해요. 매일 늦게까지 일해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你應該早點睡覺，不然身體會受不了。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yīnggāi zǎo diǎn shuìjiào, bùrán shēntǐ huì shòu bù liǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ying1gai1 zao3 dian3 shui4jiao4, bu4ran2 shen1ti3 hui4 shou4 bu4 liao3.
turns.translation_en: You should go to bed earlier, otherwise your body won't be able to handle it.
turns.translation_ko: 일찍 자야 해요. 그렇지 않으면 몸이 견디지 못할 거예요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我也想，可是工作太多了。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng, kěshì gōngzuò tài duō le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ye3 xiang3, ke3shi4 gong1zuo4 tai4 duo1 le5.
turns.translation_en: I want to, but there's too much work.
turns.translation_ko: 그러고 싶은데 일이 너무 많아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你必須學會說「不」，不然會更累。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ bìxū xuéhuì shuō 'bù', bùrán huì gèng lèi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 bi4xu1 xue2hui4 shuo1 'bu4', bu4ran2 hui4 geng4 lei4.
turns.translation_en: You must learn to say 'no', otherwise you'll be even more tired.
turns.translation_ko: '아니요'라고 말하는 법을 꼭 배워야 해요. 그렇지 않으면 더 피곤해질 거예요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你說得對，我應該試試看。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ yīnggāi shì shì kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 shuo1 de5 dui4, wo3 ying1gai1 shi4 shi5 kan4.
turns.translation_en: You're right, I should give it a try.
turns.translation_ko: 네 말이 맞아요. 한번 해봐야겠어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does friend B advise A to do?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 친구 B는 A에게 무엇을 하라고 조언합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of friendly advice and concern.
free_response_prompt: Your friend is very stressed about work. Give them advice using '應該', '最好', and '必須'.

title: 工作的需要
scenario: what should or must be done

turns.speaker: 同事A
turns.text: 明天早上九點必須開會，你記得嗎？
turns.pinyin: Míngtiān zǎoshang jiǔ diǎn bìxū kāihuì, nǐ jìde ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ming2tian1 zao3shang5 jiu3 dian3 bi4xu1 kai1hui4, ni3 ji4de5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: We must have a meeting at 9 AM tomorrow, do you remember?
turns.translation_ko: 내일 아침 9시에 꼭 회의가 있어요, 기억하시나요?

turns.speaker: 同事B
turns.text: 我記得。我需要準備什麼嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ jìde. Wǒ xūyào zhǔnbèi shénme ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ji4de5. Wo3 xu1yao4 zhun3bei4 shen2 me0 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I remember. Do I need to prepare anything?
turns.translation_ko: 기억해요. 뭘 준비해야 하나요?

turns.speaker: 同事A
turns.text: 你最好先看一下報告，然後準備問題。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuìhǎo xiān kàn yīxià bàogào, ránhòu zhǔnbèi wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zui4hao3 xian1 kan4 yi1xia4 bao4gao4, ran2hou4 zhun3bei4 wen4ti2.
turns.translation_en: You'd better read the report first, and then prepare questions.
turns.translation_ko: 보고서를 먼저 읽어보시고, 그다음에 질문을 준비하시는 게 좋아요.

turns.speaker: 同事B
turns.text: 好的，我必須在下午三點前看完。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ bìxū zài xiàwǔ sān diǎn qián kàn wán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 bi4xu1 zai4 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 qian2 kan4 wan2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I must finish reading it before 3 PM.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 오후 3시 전까지 꼭 다 읽어야 해요.

turns.speaker: 同事A
turns.text: 還有，你應該提醒經理時間。
turns.pinyin: Hái yǒu, nǐ yīnggāi tíxǐng jīnglǐ shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hai2 you3, ni3 ying1gai1 ti2xing3 jing1li3 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: Also, you should remind the manager about the time.
turns.translation_ko: 그리고 매니저님께 시간을 알려드려야 해요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What must colleague B do before 3 PM?

title: 週末的興趣

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你週末常常做什麼休閒活動？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhōumò chángcháng zuò shénme xiūxián huódòng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhou1mo4 chang2chang2 zuo4 shen2 me0 xiu1xian2 huo2dong4?
turns.translation_en: What leisure activities do you often do on weekends?
turns.translation_ko: 주말에 주로 어떤 여가 활동을 하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我喜歡爬山和騎腳踏車，有時候也會看小說。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān páshān hé qí jiǎotàchē, yǒu shíhou yě huì kàn xiǎoshuō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi3huan1 pa2shan1 he2 qi2 jiao3ta4che1, you3 shi2hou ye3 hui4 kan4 xiao3shuo1.
turns.translation_en: I like hiking and cycling, and sometimes I also read novels.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 등산과 자전거 타기를 좋아하고, 가끔 소설도 봐요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽起來很好玩！你常常去哪裡爬山？
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎowán! Nǐ chángcháng qù nǎlǐ páshān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3wan2! Ni3 chang2chang2 qu4 na3li3 pa2shan1?
turns.translation_en: Sounds fun! Where do you often go hiking?
turns.translation_ko: 재미있어 보이네요! 주로 어디로 등산 가세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我最近很喜歡去台北附近的山，風景很漂亮。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn hěn xǐhuān qù Táiběi fùjìn de shān, fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zui4jin4 hen3 xi3huan1 qu4 Tai2bei3 fu4jin4 de shan1, feng1jing3 hen3 piao4liang.
turns.translation_en: Lately I really like going to the mountains near Taipei; the scenery is beautiful.
turns.translation_ko: 요즘에는 타이베이 근처 산에 가는 걸 좋아해요. 경치가 아주 예뻐요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那下次可以一起去嗎？我也想試試看。
turns.pinyin: Nà xiàcì kěyǐ yīqǐ qù ma? Wǒ yě xiǎng shì shì kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 xia4ci4 ke3yi3 yi1qi3 qu4 ma? Wo3 ye3 xiang3 shi4 shi4 kan4.
turns.translation_en: Then can we go together next time? I also want to give it a try.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 다음에 같이 가도 될까요? 저도 한번 해보고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 當然可以！我們可以約這個週末，你有空嗎？
turns.pinyin: Dāngrán kěyǐ! Wǒmen kěyǐ yuē zhège zhōumò, nǐ yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dang1ran2 ke3yi3! Wo3men ke3yi3 yue1 zhe4ge zhou1mo4, ni3 you3 kong4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Of course! We can plan for this weekend. Are you free?
turns.translation_ko: 물론이죠! 이번 주말에 약속할 수 있어요. 시간 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這個週末我有空，我們約好了！
turns.pinyin: Zhège zhōumò wǒ yǒu kòng, wǒmen yuē hǎo le!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 wo3 you3 kong4, wo3men yue1 hao3 le!
turns.translation_en: I'm free this weekend. It's settled!
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 시간 돼요. 약속 잡았네요!

title: 運動愛好

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你平時喜歡做什麼運動？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí xǐhuān zuò shénme yùndòng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ping2shi2 xi3huan1 zuo4 shen2 me0 yun4dong4?
turns.translation_en: What sports do you usually like to do?
turns.translation_ko: 평소에 어떤 운동을 좋아하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我喜歡打籃球和踢足球，每個週末都會和朋友一起玩。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān dǎ lánqiú hé tī zúqiú, měi ge zhōumò dōu huì hé péngyou yīqǐ wán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi3huan1 da3 lan2qiu2 he2 ti1 zu2qiu2, mei3 ge zhou1mo4 dou1 hui4 he2 peng2you yi1qi3 wan2.
turns.translation_en: I like playing basketball and soccer; every weekend I play with friends.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 농구와 축구를 좋아해요. 매주 주말마다 친구들과 같이 해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好厲害！你打籃球多久了？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo lìhài! Nǐ dǎ lánqiú duō jiǔ le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 li4hai4! Ni3 da3 lan2qiu2 duo1 jiu3 le?
turns.translation_en: Awesome! How long have you been playing basketball?
turns.translation_ko: 대단하네요! 농구를 얼마나 하셨어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我從高中開始打籃球，已經好幾年了。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ cóng gāozhōng kāishǐ dǎ lánqiú, yǐjīng hǎo jǐ nián le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 cong2 gao1zhong1 kai1shi3 da3 lan2qiu2, yi3jing1 hao3 ji3 nian2 le.
turns.translation_en: I started playing basketball in high school; it's been several years already.
turns.translation_ko: 고등학교 때부터 농구를 시작해서 벌써 몇 년 됐어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我也想學打籃球，你可以教我嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng xué dǎ lánqiú, nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ye3 xiang3 xue2 da3 lan2qiu2, ni3 ke3yi3 jiao1 wo3 ma?
turns.translation_en: I also want to learn basketball; can you teach me?
turns.translation_ko: 저도 농구를 배우고 싶은데, 가르쳐 주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題！這個週末我們可以一起去打球。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí! Zhège zhōumò wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ qù dǎ qiú.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2! Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 wo3men ke3yi3 yi1qi3 qu4 da3 qiu2.
turns.translation_en: No problem! We can go play together this weekend.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요! 이번 주말에 같이 하러 가요.

title: 看電影

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你放假的時候喜歡做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ fàngjià de shíhou xǐhuān zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 fang4jia4 de shi2hou xi3huan1 zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What do you like to do during your holidays?
turns.translation_ko: 휴가 때 무엇을 하기를 좋아하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我喜歡看電影，有時候也會看演唱會。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān kàn diànyǐng, yǒu shíhou yě huì kàn yǎnchànghuì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi3huan1 kan4 dian4ying3, you3 shi2hou ye3 hui4 kan4 yan3chang4hui4.
turns.translation_en: I like watching movies, and sometimes I also go to concerts.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 영화 보는 걸 좋아하고, 가끔 콘서트도 가요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你最近看了什麼好看的電影嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn kàn le shénme hǎokàn de diànyǐng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zui4jin4 kan4 le shen2 me0 hao3kan4 de dian4ying3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Have you watched any good movies recently?
turns.translation_ko: 최근에 본 좋은 영화가 있나요?

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin: Wǒ shàng ge lǐbài kàn le yī bù hěn yǒu yìsi de diànyǐng, tuījiàn nǐ yě qù kàn kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 shang4 ge li3bai4 kan4 le yi1 bu4 hen3 you3 yi4si de dian4ying3, tui1jian4 ni3 ye3 qu4 kan4 kan4.
turns.translation_en: Last week I watched a very interesting movie; I recommend you go see it too.
turns.translation_ko: 지난주에 아주 재미있는 영화를 봤어요. 추천하니까 한번 보세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊！我們可以約這個週末一起去看電影。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒmen kěyǐ yuē zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a! Wo3men ke3yi3 yue1 zhe4ge zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3.
turns.translation_en: Great! We can plan to go see a movie together this weekend.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 이번 주말에 같이 영화 보러 가기로 해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，我們到時候見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒmen dào shíhou jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3men dao4 shi2hou jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem, see you then!
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 그때 봐요!

title: 雖然貴但是好吃
scenario: although something is true, another thing is also true

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 這家餐廳的牛肉麵雖然很貴，但是很好吃。
turns.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de niúròumiàn suīrán hěn guì, dànshì hěn hǎochī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: zhe4 jia1 can1ting1 de5 niu2rou4mian4 sui1ran2 hen3 gui4, dan4shi4 hen3 hao3chi1.
turns.translation_en: This restaurant's beef noodles are expensive, but they are delicious.
turns.translation_ko: 이 식당의 소고기 국수는 비싸지만 맛있습니다.

turns.speaker: 朋友
turns.text: 對啊，雖然價錢比較貴，不過份量也很多。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, suīrán jiàqián bǐjiào guì, bùguò fènliàng yě hěn duō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4 a5, sui1ran2 jia4qian2 bi3jiao4 gui4, bu2guo4 fen4liang4 ye3 hen3 duo1.
turns.translation_en: Right, although the price is higher, the portion is also large.
turns.translation_ko: 맞아요, 가격은 비싸지만 양도 많아요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 而且湯的味道很濃，肉也很新鮮。
turns.pinyin: Érqiě tāng de wèidào hěn nóng, ròu yě hěn xīnxiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: er2qie3 tang1 de5 wei4dao4 hen3 nong2, rou4 ye3 hen3 xin1xian1.
turns.translation_en: Moreover, the soup is rich in flavor, and the meat is very fresh.
turns.translation_ko: 게다가 국물 맛이 진하고 고기도 아주 신선해요.

turns.speaker: 朋友
turns.text: 雖然貴，但是值得。我們下次再來吧！
turns.pinyin: Suīrán guì, dànshì zhídé. Wǒmen xià cì zài lái ba!
turns.pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 gui4, dan4shi4 zhi2de2. wo3men5 xia4 ci4 zai4 lai2 ba5!
turns.translation_en: Although it's expensive, it's worth it. Let's come again next time!
turns.translation_ko: 비싸지만 그만한 가치가 있어요. 우리 다음에 또 와요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the main reason the customer thinks the beef noodles are worth it?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 손님이 소고기 국수가 가치 있다고 생각하는 주된 이유는 무엇입니까?
options_en: The soup is rich and the meat is fresh
comprehension_questions.answer_en: The soup is rich and the meat is fresh

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the contrastive tone of '雖然...但是...'.
free_response_prompt: Describe a restaurant you know where the food is expensive but worth the price. Use '雖然...但是...'.

title: 雖然忙但是可以
scenario: although something is true, another thing is also true

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你這個週末有空嗎？我們一起去逛街。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhège zhōumò yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù guàngjiē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ni3 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 you3 kong4 ma5? wo3men5 yi1qi3 qu4 guang4jie1.
turns.translation_en: Are you free this weekend? Let's go shopping.
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 시간 있어요? 우리 같이 쇼핑 가요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 雖然我這個週末很忙，但是我可以抽空跟你去一下。
turns.pinyin: Suīrán wǒ zhège zhōumò hěn máng, dànshì wǒ kěyǐ chōukòng gēn nǐ qù yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 wo3 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 hen3 mang2, dan4shi4 wo3 ke3yi3 chou1kong4 gen1 ni3 qu4 yi1xia4.
turns.translation_en: Although I'm very busy this weekend, I can spare some time to go with you.
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 바쁘지만 시간을 내서 같이 갈 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 真的嗎？太好了！我們可以去喝咖啡，順便聊天。
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Tài hǎo le! Wǒmen kěyǐ qù hē kāfēi, shùnbiàn liáotiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: zhen1 de5 ma5? tai4 hao3 le5! wo3men5 ke3yi3 qu4 he1 ka1fei1, shun4bian4 liao2tian1.
turns.translation_en: Really? That's great! We can go have coffee and chat while we're at it.
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 너무 좋아요! 우리 커피 마시면서 이야기해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，不過我只能去兩個小時，因為我還有工作要做。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, bùguò wǒ zhǐ néng qù liǎng ge xiǎoshí, yīnwèi wǒ hái yǒu gōngzuò yào zuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 a5, bu2guo4 wo3 zhi3 neng2 qu4 liang3 ge5 xiao3shi2, yin1wei4 wo3 hai2 you3 gong1zuo4 yao4 zuo4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, but I can only go for two hours because I still have work to do.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 하지만 일이 있어서 두 시간밖에 못 가요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題，兩個小時也很夠了。我們星期六下午見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, liǎng ge xiǎoshí yě hěn gòu le. Wǒmen xīngqīliù xiàwǔ jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4ti2, liang3 ge5 xiao3shi2 ye3 hen3 gou4 le5. wo3men5 xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem, two hours is plenty. See you Saturday afternoon!
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 두 시간이면 충분해요. 토요일 오후에 봐요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why can B only go for two hours?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B가 두 시간밖에 갈 수 없는 이유는 무엇입니까?

shadowing_prompt: Practice the dialogue, emphasizing the contrast in B's first turn with '雖然...但是...'.
free_response_prompt: Tell a friend you are busy but can still meet for a short time. Use '雖然...但是...'.

title: 雖然遠但是值得
scenario: although something is true, another thing is also true

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 聽說那家新的咖啡店在台北車站附近，但是離我們學校很遠。
turns.pinyin: Tīngshuō nà jiā xīn de kāfēi diàn zài Táiběi chēzhàn fùjìn, dànshì lí wǒmen xuéxiào hěn yuǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ting1shuo1 na4 jia1 xin1 de5 ka1fei1 dian4 zai4 Tai2bei3 che1zhan4 fu4jin4, dan4shi4 li2 wo3men5 xue2xiao4 hen3 yuan3.
turns.translation_en: I heard that new coffee shop is near Taipei Station, but it's far from our school.
turns.translation_ko: 그 새 커피숍이 타이베이 역 근처에 있다고 들었는데 우리 학교에서 멀어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 雖然很遠，但是聽說他們的咖啡很好喝，而且環境很舒服。
turns.pinyin: Suīrán hěn yuǎn, dànshì tīngshuō tāmen de kāfēi hěn hǎo hē, érqiě huánjìng hěn shūfu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 hen3 yuan3, dan4shi4 ting1shuo1 ta1men5 de5 ka1fei1 hen3 hao3 he1, er2qie3 huan2jing4 hen3 shu1fu5.
turns.translation_en: Although it's far, I heard their coffee is very good and the atmosphere is comfortable.
turns.translation_ko: 멀지만 커피가 맛있고 분위기도 좋다고 들었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 真的嗎？那我們這個週末一起去看看，雖然遠，但是值得去。
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nà wǒmen zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù kànkan, suīrán yuǎn, dànshì zhídé qù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: zhen1 de5 ma5? na4 wo3men5 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4kan5, sui1ran2 yuan3, dan4shi4 zhi2de2 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Really? Then let's go check it out this weekend. Although it's far, it's worth going.
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 그럼 이번 주말에 같이 가 봐요. 멀지만 갈 가치가 있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我們可以搭捷運去，雖然要轉車，但是不會太久。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒmen kěyǐ dā jiéyùn qù, suīrán yào zhuǎn chē, dànshì bù huì tài jiǔ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 a5! wo3men5 ke3yi3 da1 jie2yun4 qu4, sui1ran2 yao4 zhuan3 che1, dan4shi4 bu2 hui4 tai4 jiu3.
turns.translation_en: Okay! We can take the MRT. Although we need to transfer, it won't take too long.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 지하철을 타고 가요. 환승해야 하지만 오래 걸리지 않을 거예요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How do A and B plan to get to the coffee shop?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A와 B는 커피숍에 어떻게 가기로 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Focus on the intonation of '雖然...但是...' when expressing contrast between distance and worth.
free_response_prompt: Talk about a place that is far from your home but worth visiting. Use '雖然...但是...'.

title: 請進來坐
scenario: movement in and out, up and down

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 歡迎光臨！請進來坐。
turns.pinyin: Huānyíng guānglín! Qǐng jìnlái zuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Huan1ying2 guang1lin2! Qing3 jin4lai2 zuo4.
turns.translation_en: Welcome! Please come in and have a seat.
turns.translation_ko: 어서 오세요! 들어와서 앉으세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝。請問有兩個人的座位嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Qǐngwèn yǒu liǎng gè rén de zuòwèi ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie. Qing3wen4 you3 liang3 ge4 ren2 de zuo4wei4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. Do you have a seat for two people?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 두 명이 앉을 자리가 있나요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 有，這邊請。我幫您帶過去。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, zhèbiān qǐng. Wǒ bāng nín dài guòqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, zhe4bian1 qing3. Wo3 bang1 nin2 dai4 guo4qu4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, this way please. I'll take you over there.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 이쪽으로 오세요. 제가 안내해 드리겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, xie4xie.
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 不客氣。這是菜單，請慢慢看。
turns.pinyin: Bú kèqì. Zhè shì càidān, qǐng mànman kàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2 ke4qi4. Zhe4 shi4 cai4dan1, qing3 man4man kan4.
turns.translation_en: You're welcome. Here's the menu, please take your time.
turns.translation_ko: 천만에요. 여기 메뉴판입니다. 천천히 보세요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the staff ask the customer to do first?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 직원이 손님에게 먼저 무엇을 하라고 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat after the staff: '歡迎光臨！請進來坐。'
free_response_prompt: Practice inviting someone into your home or shop. Say: '請進來坐。'

title: 出去買東西
scenario: movement in and out, up and down

turns.speaker: 媽媽
turns.text: 我要出去買菜，你要一起去嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yào chūqù mǎi cài, nǐ yào yīqǐ qù ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yao4 chu1qu4 mai3 cai4, ni3 yao4 yi1qi3 qu4 ma?
turns.translation_en: I'm going out to buy groceries. Do you want to come along?
turns.translation_ko: 나 장 보러 나갈 건데, 같이 갈래?

turns.speaker: 兒子
turns.text: 好啊，我跟你一起出去。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, wǒ gēn nǐ yīqǐ chūqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a, wo3 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 chu1qu4.
turns.translation_en: Sure, I'll go out with you.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 같이 나갈게요.

turns.speaker: 媽媽
turns.text: 好，那我們現在出去吧。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒmen xiànzài chūqù ba.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, na4 wo3men xian4zai4 chu1qu4 ba.
turns.translation_en: Okay, let's go out now.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아, 그럼 지금 나가자.

turns.speaker: 兒子
turns.text: 等一下，我先拿錢包出來。
turns.pinyin: Děng yīxià, wǒ xiān ná qiánbāo chūlái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Deng3 yi1xia4, wo3 xian1 na2 qian2bao1 chu1lai2.
turns.translation_en: Wait a moment, I'll take out my wallet first.
turns.translation_ko: 잠깐만요, 먼저 지갑을 꺼낼게요.

turns.speaker: 媽媽
turns.text: 好，我在門口等你。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ zài ménkǒu děng nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 zai4 men2kou3 deng3 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll wait for you at the door.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아, 문 앞에서 기다릴게.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the son need to do before going out?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 아들은 나가기 전에 무엇을 해야 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat after the mother: '我要出去買菜，你要一起去嗎？'
free_response_prompt: Practice telling someone you are going out. Say: '我要出去買東西。'

title: 上樓拿東西
scenario: movement in and out, up and down

turns.speaker: 朋友A
turns.text: 我的手機放在樓上，我要上去拿。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ de shǒujī fàng zài lóushàng, wǒ yào shàngqù ná.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 de shou3ji1 fang4 zai4 lou2shang4, wo3 yao4 shang4qu4 na2.
turns.translation_en: My phone is upstairs. I need to go up and get it.
turns.translation_ko: 내 핸드폰이 위층에 있어서 올라가서 가져와야 해.

turns.speaker: 朋友B
turns.text: 好，我跟你一起上去。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ gēn nǐ yīqǐ shàngqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 shang4qu4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll go up with you.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아, 같이 올라갈게.

turns.speaker: 朋友A
turns.text: 不用，你可以在這裡等我，我馬上下來。
turns.pinyin: Búyòng, nǐ kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ děng wǒ, wǒ mǎshàng xiàlái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2yong4, ni3 ke3yi3 zai4 zhe4li3 deng3 wo3, wo3 ma3shang4 xia4lai2.
turns.translation_en: No need, you can wait here for me. I'll come down right away.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아, 여기서 기다려 줘. 금방 내려올게.

turns.speaker: 朋友B
turns.text: 好，那你快點上去拿，我在這裡等你。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà nǐ kuài diǎn shàngqù ná, wǒ zài zhèlǐ děng nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, na4 ni3 kuai4 dian3 shang4qu4 na2, wo3 zai4 zhe4li3 deng3 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, then hurry up and go get it. I'll wait here for you.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아, 그럼 빨리 올라가서 가져와. 여기서 기다릴게.

turns.speaker: 朋友A
turns.text: 好，我上去了。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ shàngqù le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 shang4qu4 le.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'm going up.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아, 올라갈게.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did friend A need to go upstairs?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 친구 A는 왜 위층에 올라가야 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat after friend A: '我的手機放在樓上，我要上去拿。'
free_response_prompt: Practice saying you need to go upstairs to get something. Say: '我要上去拿東西。'

title: Bringing a Document
scenario: bringing, taking, coming back, going back

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我來拿文件。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ lái ná wénjiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 lai2 na2 wen2jian4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I've come to pick up a document.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 서류를 가지러 왔습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，請等一下。我幫你拿出來。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià. Wǒ bāng nǐ ná chūlái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4. Wo3 bang1 ni3 na2 chu1lai2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, please wait a moment. I'll take it out for you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요. 제가 꺼내 드리겠습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝。這份文件要帶回去給老闆。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Zhè fèn wénjiàn yào dài huíqù gěi lǎobǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5. Zhe4 fen4 wen2jian4 yao4 dai4 hui2qu4 gei3 lao3ban3.
turns.translation_en: Thank you. This document needs to be taken back to the boss.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 이 서류는 사장님께 가져가야 합니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題。你拿好，別弄丟了。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Nǐ ná hǎo, bié nòng diū le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Ni3 na2 hao3, bie2 nong4 diu1 le5.
turns.translation_en: No problem. Hold it carefully, don't lose it.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 잘 챙기세요, 잃어버리지 마세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，謝謝你。我現在就帶回去。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie nǐ. Wǒ xiànzài jiù dài huíqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, xie4xie5 ni3. Wo3 xian4zai4 jiu4 dai4 hui2qu4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you. I'll take it back now.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다. 지금 바로 가져가겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the person come to pick up?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the direction verbs like 拿出來 and 帶回去.
free_response_prompt: Practice saying: 'I came to pick up a document and will take it back to the office.'

title: Taking Food Out
scenario: bringing, taking, coming back, going back

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我要外帶。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào wàidài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 yao4 wai4dai4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I would like to order takeout.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 포장하겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，請問你要點什麼？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nǐ yào diǎn shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3wen4 ni3 yao4 dian3 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Okay, what would you like to order?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 무엇을 주문하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我要一份牛肉麵，帶回去吃。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yào yī fèn niúròumiàn, dài huíqù chī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yao4 yi1 fen4 niu2rou4mian4, dai4 hui2qu4 chi1.
turns.translation_en: I would like one bowl of beef noodle soup to go.
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수 한 그릇 주문할게요, 집에 가져가서 먹을 거예요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，我幫你拿出來打包。請等一下。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nǐ ná chūlái dǎbāo. Qǐng děng yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 bang1 ni3 na2 chu1lai2 da3bao1. Qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll take it out and pack it for you. Please wait a moment.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 꺼내서 포장해 드리겠습니다. 잠시만 기다려 주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝。我還要一杯紅茶，一起帶去。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Wǒ hái yào yī bēi hóngchá, yīqǐ dài qù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5. Wo3 hai2 yao4 yi1 bei1 hong2cha2, yi1qi3 dai4 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you. I would also like a black tea to go.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 홍차 한 잔도 같이 가져갈게요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題。總共一百五十塊。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Zǒnggòng yībǎi wǔshí kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Zong3gong4 yi1bai3 wu3shi2 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: No problem. Total is 150 dollars.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 총 150원입니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer order?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to 外帶, 帶回去, and 帶去.
free_response_prompt: Practice ordering takeout: 'I would like one bowl of beef noodle soup and a black tea to go.'

title: Come Back Later
scenario: bringing, taking, coming back, going back

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，我現在有事，可以晚一點再回來嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiànzài yǒu shì, kěyǐ wǎn yīdiǎn zài huílái ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si5, wo3 xian4zai4 you3 shi4, ke3yi3 wan3 yi1dian3 zai4 hui2lai2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I have something to do now. Can I come back a little later?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 지금 볼일이 있어서 조금 늦게 다시 와도 될까요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 可以啊。你要帶什麼東西回去嗎？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ a. Nǐ yào dài shénme dōngxī huíqù ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3 a5. Ni3 yao4 dai4 shen2 me0 dong1xi1 hui2qu4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Sure. Do you need to take anything back?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 괜찮습니다. 가져가실 물건이 있으신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不用，我只是先來看一下。等一下再回來拿。
turns.pinyin: Bùyòng, wǒ zhǐshì xiān lái kàn yīxià. Děng yīxià zài huílái ná.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4yong4, wo3 zhi3shi4 xian1 lai2 kan4 yi1xia4. Deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 hui2lai2 na2.
turns.translation_en: No need, I just came to take a look first. I'll come back later to pick it up.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다, 그냥 먼저 와서 좀 봤어요. 나중에 다시 와서 찾겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，沒問題。你慢慢來。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, méi wèntí. Nǐ mànman lái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, mei2 wen4ti2. Ni3 man4man5 lai2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem. Take your time.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 문제없습니다. 천천히 오세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝，我大概半小時後回來。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie, wǒ dàgài bàn xiǎoshí hòu huílái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5, wo3 da4gai4 ban4 xiao3shi2 hou4 hui2lai2.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I'll be back in about half an hour.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 약 30분 후에 다시 오겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did the customer come back later?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on 回來 and 回去.
free_response_prompt: Practice saying: 'I have something to do now, I'll come back later to pick it up.'

title: 診所看診問題

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 你好，我昨天有預約，可是今天早上喉嚨很痛，想取消預約。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ zuótiān yǒu yùyuē, kěshì jīntiān zǎoshang hóulóng hěn tòng, xiǎng qǔxiāo yùyuē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 zuo2tian1 you3 yu4yue1, ke3shi4 jin1tian1 zao3shang5 hou2long2 hen3 tong4, xiang3 qu3xiao1 yu4yue1.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I had an appointment yesterday, but my throat hurts a lot this morning, so I would like to cancel the appointment.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 어제 예약을 했는데 오늘 아침에 목이 많이 아파서 예약을 취소하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 櫃檯人員
turns.text: 沒問題，我幫你處理。請問你的名字和預約時間是幾點？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ bāng nǐ chǔlǐ. Qǐngwèn nǐ de míngzì hé yùyuē shíjiān shì jǐ diǎn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3 bang1 ni3 chu3li3. Qing3wen4 ni3 de ming2zi4 he2 yu4yue1 shi2jian1 shi4 ji3 dian3?
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll help you handle it. May I ask your name and what time the appointment was?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 제가 처리해 드리겠습니다. 성함과 예약 시간이 몇 시인지 여쭤봐도 될까요?

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 我叫王小明，預約是今天上午十點。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng, yùyuē shì jīntiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2, yu4yue1 shi4 jin1tian1 shang4wu3 shi2 dian3.
turns.translation_en: My name is Wang Xiaoming, the appointment was at 10 AM today.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 왕샤오밍이라고 합니다. 예약은 오늘 오전 10시였습니다.

turns.speaker: 櫃檯人員
turns.text: 好的，我已經幫你取消預約了。假如你之後還需要看診，可以再預約。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ yǐjīng bāng nǐ qǔxiāo yùyuē le. Jiǎrú nǐ zhīhòu hái xūyào kànzhěn, kěyǐ zài yùyuē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 yi3jing1 bang1 ni3 qu3xiao1 yu4yue1 le5. Jia3ru2 ni3 zhi1hou4 hai2 xu1yao4 kan4zhen3, ke3yi3 zai4 yu4yue1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I've canceled the appointment for you. If you still need to see a doctor later, you can make another appointment.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 예약 취소를 도와드렸습니다. 나중에 진료가 필요하시면 다시 예약하실 수 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 謝謝你。那假如我明天想預約，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè nǐ. Nà jiǎrú wǒ míngtiān xiǎng yùyuē, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4 ni3. Na4 jia3ru2 wo3 ming2tian1 xiang3 yu4yue1, ke3yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. If I want to make an appointment tomorrow, is that okay?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 그럼 내일 예약하고 싶으면 가능할까요?

turns.speaker: 櫃檯人員
turns.text: 可以，你明天上午或下午都可以。請你打電話來預約。
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, nǐ míngtiān shàngwǔ huò xiàwǔ dōu kěyǐ. Qǐng nǐ dǎ diànhuà lái yùyuē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, ni3 ming2tian1 shang4wu3 huo4 xia4wu3 dou1 ke3yi3. Qing3 ni3 da3 dian4hua4 lai2 yu4yue1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, you can come tomorrow morning or afternoon. Please call to make an appointment.
turns.translation_ko: 가능합니다. 내일 오전이나 오후 모두 괜찮습니다. 전화로 예약해 주세요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 好的，我知道了。謝謝你的幫忙。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1dao4 le5. Xie4xie4 ni3 de bang1mang2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I understand. Thank you for your help.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다. 도와주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did the patient want to cancel the appointment?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '取消' and '預約'.
free_response_prompt: Practice saying: '假如你明天不舒服，你會怎麼取消預約？'

title: 遺失物品處理

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，我剛剛在你們餐廳吃飯，好像把手機放在座位上了。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ gānggāng zài nǐmen cāntīng chīfàn, hǎoxiàng bǎ shǒujī fàng zài zuòwèi shàng le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si5, wo3 gang1gang1 zai4 ni3men5 can1ting1 chi1fan4, hao3xiang4 ba3 shou3ji1 fang4 zai4 zuo4wei4 shang4 le5.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I just ate at your restaurant, and I think I left my phone on the seat.
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 방금 식당에서 식사했는데 자리에 핸드폰을 두고 온 것 같아요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 請你等一下，我幫你問問看。你經過哪個座位？
turns.pinyin: Qǐng nǐ děng yīxià, wǒ bāng nǐ wèn wèn kàn. Nǐ jīngguò nǎge zuòwèi?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qing3 ni3 deng3 yi1xia4, wo3 bang1 ni3 wen4 wen5 kan4. Ni3 jing1guo4 na3ge5 zuo4wei4?
turns.translation_en: Please wait a moment, I'll ask for you. Which seat did you pass by?
turns.translation_ko: 잠시만 기다려 주세요, 제가 물어보겠습니다. 어느 자리에 앉으셨나요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我坐在靠窗的那個位子。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuò zài kào chuāng de nàge wèizi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo4 zai4 kao4 chuang1 de5 na4ge5 wei4zi5.
turns.translation_en: I was sitting at the seat by the window.
turns.translation_ko: 창가 쪽 자리에 앉아 있었어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，我過去看看。假如有找到，我幫你拿過來。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ guòqù kàn kàn. Jiǎrú yǒu zhǎodào, wǒ bāng nǐ ná guòlái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 guo4qu4 kan4 kan5. Jia3ru2 you3 zhao3dao4, wo3 bang1 ni3 na2 guo4lai2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll go check. If I find it, I'll bring it over for you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 가서 확인해 보겠습니다. 찾으면 가져다 드리겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 麻煩你了，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Máfan nǐ le, xièxiè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ma2fan5 ni3 le5, xie4xie4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you for your trouble.
turns.translation_ko: 번거롭게 해드려 죄송합니다, 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 找到了！是你的手機嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zhǎodào le! Shì nǐ de shǒujī ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhao3dao4 le5! Shi4 ni3 de shou3ji1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Found it! Is this your phone?
turns.translation_ko: 찾았습니다! 이게 당신 핸드폰인가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 對，就是這個！謝謝你幫我處理。
turns.pinyin: Duì, jiùshì zhège! Xièxiè nǐ bāng wǒ chǔlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, jiu4shi4 zhe4ge5! Xie4xie4 ni3 bang1 wo3 chu3li3.
turns.translation_en: Yes, that's it! Thank you for helping me handle it.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 맞아요! 처리해 주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer lose?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '經過' and '處理'.
free_response_prompt: Practice saying: '假如你在餐廳忘記帶手機，你會怎麼做？'

title: 更改預約時間

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我上個星期有預約今天下午三點，可是臨時有事，想改時間。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ shàngge xīngqī yǒu yùyuē jīntiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn, kěshì línshí yǒu shì, xiǎng gǎi shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 shang4ge5 xing1qi1 you3 yu4yue1 jin1tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, ke3shi4 lin2shi2 you3 shi4, xiang3 gai3 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I made an appointment last week for 3 PM today, but something came up, so I want to reschedule.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 지난주에 오늘 오후 3시로 예약했는데 갑자기 일이 생겨서 시간을 변경하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 櫃檯人員
turns.text: 沒問題，我幫你處理。請問你想改成什麼時候？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ bāng nǐ chǔlǐ. Qǐngwèn nǐ xiǎng gǎi chéng shénme shíhou?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3 bang1 ni3 chu3li3. Qing3wen4 ni3 xiang3 gai3 cheng2 shen2 me0 shi2hou5?
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll help you handle it. When would you like to change it to?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 제가 처리해 드리겠습니다. 언제로 변경하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 假如明天上午有空的話，我想改成明天上午十點。
turns.pinyin: Jiǎrú míngtiān shàngwǔ yǒu kòng dehuà, wǒ xiǎng gǎi chéng míngtiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jia3ru2 ming2tian1 shang4wu3 you3 kong4 de5hua4, wo3 xiang3 gai3 cheng2 ming2tian1 shang4wu3 shi2 dian3.
turns.translation_en: If there's availability tomorrow morning, I'd like to change it to 10 AM tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 내일 오전에 시간이 된다면 내일 오전 10시로 변경하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 櫃檯人員
turns.text: 我幫你看看。明天上午十點可以，我幫你改時間。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nǐ kàn kàn. Míngtiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn kěyǐ, wǒ bāng nǐ gǎi shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bang1 ni3 kan4 kan5. Ming2tian1 shang4wu3 shi2 dian3 ke3yi3, wo3 bang1 ni3 gai3 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: Let me check for you. Tomorrow at 10 AM is available, I'll reschedule for you.
turns.translation_ko: 확인해 드리겠습니다. 내일 오전 10시 가능합니다. 시간을 변경해 드리겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 太好了，謝謝你。那原本的預約就取消了嗎？
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xièxiè nǐ. Nà yuánběn de yùyuē jiù qǔxiāo le ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le5, xie4xie4 ni3. Na4 yuan2ben3 de5 yu4yue1 jiu4 qu3xiao1 le5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Great, thank you. So the original appointment is canceled?
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋네요, 감사합니다. 그럼 원래 예약은 취소된 건가요?

turns.speaker: 櫃檯人員
turns.text: 對，原本的預約已經取消了。明天請準時來。
turns.pinyin: Duì, yuánběn de yùyuē yǐjīng qǔxiāo le. Míngtiān qǐng zhǔnshí lái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, yuan2ben3 de5 yu4yue1 yi3jing1 qu3xiao1 le5. Ming2tian1 qing3 zhun3shi2 lai2.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the original appointment has been canceled. Please come on time tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 원래 예약은 취소되었습니다. 내일 정시에 와 주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，我知道了。謝謝你的幫忙。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1dao4 le5. Xie4xie4 ni3 de bang1mang2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I understand. Thank you for your help.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다. 도와주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer want to do?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '改時間' and '取消'.
free_response_prompt: Practice saying: '假如你臨時有事，你會怎麼改預約時間？'

title: 你現在做什麼工作？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你現在做什麼工作？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiànzài zuò shénme gōngzuò?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xian4zai4 zuo4 shen2 me0 gong1zuo4?
turns.translation_en: What do you do for work now?
turns.translation_ko: 지금 무슨 일을 하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我在一間公司上班，是兼職的工讀生。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zài yī jiān gōngsī shàngbān, shì jiānzhí de gōngdúshēng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zai4 yi1 jian1 gong1si1 shang4ban1, shi4 jian1zhi2 de gong1du2sheng1.
turns.translation_en: I work at a company as a part-time student worker.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 한 회사에서 아르바이트로 일하고 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你的老闆好嗎？同事呢？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ de lǎobǎn hǎo ma? Tóngshì ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 de lao3ban3 hao3 ma? Tong2shi4 ne?
turns.translation_en: Is your boss nice? And your colleagues?
turns.translation_ko: 사장님은 좋으세요? 동료들은요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 老闆很友善，同事也都很幫忙。
turns.pinyin: Lǎobǎn hěn yǒushàn, tóngshì yě dōu hěn bāngmáng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Lao3ban3 hen3 you3shan4, tong2shi4 ye3 dou1 hen3 bang1mang2.
turns.translation_en: The boss is very friendly, and the colleagues are all very helpful.
turns.translation_ko: 사장님은 매우 친절하시고, 동료들도 모두 잘 도와줘요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你的薪水怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ de xīnshuǐ zěnme yàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 de xin1shui3 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: How about your salary?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 급여는 어떤가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 薪水還可以，不過我打算以後找全職的工作。
turns.pinyin: Xīnshuǐ hái kěyǐ, bùguò wǒ dǎsuàn yǐhòu zhǎo quánzhí de gōngzuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xin1shui3 hai2 ke3yi3, bu2guo4 wo3 da3suan4 yi3hou4 zhao3 quan2zhi2 de gong1zuo4.
turns.translation_en: The salary is okay, but I plan to find a full-time job later.
turns.translation_ko: 급여는 괜찮은데, 나중에 정규직을 찾을 생각이에요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What kind of job does B have now?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 지금 어떤 일을 하고 있습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones of 兼職 and 薪水.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about your job or your ideal job. Use words like 全職, 兼職, 薪水, and 老闆.

title: 學生的時間表

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你這個學期修幾門課？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhège xuéqī xiū jǐ mén kè?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhe4ge xue2qi1 xiu1 ji3 men2 ke4?
turns.translation_en: How many courses are you taking this semester?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 학기에 몇 과목을 수강하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我修了五門課，都是必修的。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiū le wǔ mén kè, dōu shì bìxiū de.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiu1 le5 wu3 men2 ke4, dou1 shi4 bi4xiu1 de.
turns.translation_en: I'm taking five courses, all required.
turns.translation_ko: 다섯 과목을 수강하는데, 모두 필수 과목이에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 功課多嗎？考試多嗎？
turns.pinyin: Gōngkè duō ma? Kǎoshì duō ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Gong1ke4 duo1 ma? Kao3shi4 duo1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Is there a lot of homework? Are there many exams?
turns.translation_ko: 숙제가 많나요? 시험도 많나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 功課很多，每個星期都有作業和報告。
turns.pinyin: Gōngkè hěn duō, měi ge xīngqī dōu yǒu zuòyè hé bàogào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Gong1ke4 hen3 duo1, mei3 ge xing1qi1 dou1 you3 zuo4ye4 he2 bao4gao4.
turns.translation_en: There's a lot of homework; every week there are assignments and reports.
turns.translation_ko: 숙제가 많아요. 매주 과제와 보고서가 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你怎麼安排時間？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ zěnme ānpái shíjiān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 zen3 me0 an1pai2 shi2jian1?
turns.translation_en: So how do you manage your time?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 시간은 어떻게 관리하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我每天早上先做功課，下午再去上課。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang xiān zuò gōngkè, xiàwǔ zài qù shàngkè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 mei3tian1 zao3shang4 xian1 zuo4 gong1ke4, xia4wu3 zai4 qu4 shang4ke4.
turns.translation_en: Every morning I do my homework first, then go to class in the afternoon.
turns.translation_ko: 매일 아침에 먼저 숙제를 하고, 오후에 수업을 들으러 가요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How many courses is B taking this semester?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 이번 학기에 몇 과목을 수강합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the pronunciation of 必修 and 報告.
free_response_prompt: Describe your school schedule. Use words like 學期, 必修, 作業, and 安排.

title: 忙碌的一週

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你這個星期很忙嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhège xīngqī hěn máng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhe4ge xing1qi1 hen3 mang2 ma?
turns.translation_en: Are you busy this week?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주에 많이 바쁘세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，我每天都要加班，因為下星期有重要的報告。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ měitiān dōu yào jiābān, yīnwèi xià xīngqī yǒu zhòngyào de bàogào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 mei3tian1 dou1 yao4 jia1ban1, yin1wei4 xia4 xing1qi1 you3 zhong4yao4 de bao4gao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I have to work overtime every day because there's an important report next week.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 매일 야근해야 해요. 다음 주에 중요한 보고서가 있어서요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你週末也要上班嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ zhōumò yě yào shàngbān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 zhou1mo4 ye3 yao4 shang4ban1 ma?
turns.translation_en: So do you have to work on weekends too?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 주말에도 출근해야 하나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不用，週末我打算好好休息。
turns.pinyin: Bùyòng, zhōumò wǒ dǎsuàn hǎohao xiūxi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4yong4, zhou1mo4 wo3 da3suan4 hao3hao xiu1xi.
turns.translation_en: No, I plan to rest well on the weekend.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 주말에는 푹 쉴 생각이에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你的同事也加班嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ de tóngshì yě jiābān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 de tong2shi4 ye3 jia1ban1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Do your colleagues also work overtime?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 동료분들도 야근하나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，我們部門的同事都一起加班。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒmen bùmén de tóngshì dōu yīqǐ jiābān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3men bu4men2 de tong2shi4 dou1 yi4qi3 jia1ban1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, all the colleagues in my department work overtime together.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 저희 부서 동료들이 다 같이 야근해요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why does B have to work overtime every day?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B가 매일 야근해야 하는 이유는 무엇입니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on the tones of 加班 and 報告.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about a busy week you had. Use words like 加班, 報告, 部門, and 休息.

title: 約開會時間

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我們下個星期要開會，你什麼時候方便？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒmen xià ge xīngqī yào kāihuì, nǐ shénme shíhou fāngbiàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3men xia4 ge5 xing1qi1 yao4 kai1hui4, ni3 shen2 me0 shi2hou fang1bian4?
turns.translation_en: Hello, we need to have a meeting next week. When is convenient for you?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 다음 주에 회의를 해야 하는데요, 언제 편하신가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我星期二下午和星期四早上有空。你呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xīngqī'èr xiàwǔ hé xīngqīsì zǎoshang yǒu kòng. Nǐ ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xing1qi2er4 xia4wu3 he2 xing1qi2si4 zao3shang5 you3 kong4. Ni3 ne5?
turns.translation_en: I'm free Tuesday afternoon and Thursday morning. And you?
turns.translation_ko: 저는 화요일 오후와 목요일 오전에 시간이 됩니다. 당신은요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我星期四早上可以。我們早上十點開會，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xīngqīsì zǎoshang kěyǐ. Wǒmen zǎoshang shí diǎn kāihuì, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xing1qi2si4 zao3shang5 ke3yi3. Wo3men zao3shang5 shi2 dian3 kai1hui4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Thursday morning works for me. Let's have the meeting at 10 AM, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 저는 목요일 오전에 괜찮습니다. 오전 10시에 회의하는 게 어떨까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題。我們要討論什麼？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Wǒmen yào tǎolùn shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Wo3men yao4 tao3lun4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: No problem. What are we going to discuss?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 무엇에 대해 논의할까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們要討論新的任務和進度。請你先準備一下資料。
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen yào tǎolùn xīn de rènwù hé jìndù. Qǐng nǐ xiān zhǔnbèi yīxià zīliào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men yao4 tao3lun4 xin1 de5 ren4wu4 he2 jin4du4. Qing3 ni3 xian1 zhun3bei4 yi1xia4 zi1liao4.
turns.translation_en: We're going to discuss the new tasks and progress. Please prepare the materials first.
turns.translation_ko: 새로운 업무와 진행 상황에 대해 논의할 예정입니다. 먼저 자료를 준비해 주세요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，我會準備好。星期四見。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ huì zhǔnbèi hǎo. Xīngqīsì jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 hui4 zhun3bei4 hao3. Xing1qi2si4 jian4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll have it ready. See you on Thursday.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 준비하겠습니다. 목요일에 뵙겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What day and time did they agree on for the meeting?

shadowing_prompt: Listen to the dialogue and repeat each sentence aloud, focusing on the tone and rhythm of asking about availability and confirming a meeting time.
free_response_prompt: Practice asking a colleague about their available time for a meeting next week. Use the phrases '你什麼時候方便？' and '我們...開會，好嗎？'.

title: 確認任務進度

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你的任務進度怎麼樣了？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ de rènwù jìndù zěnmeyàng le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 de5 ren4wu4 jin4du4 zen3 me0yang4 le5?
turns.translation_en: How is the progress on your task?
turns.translation_ko: 당신의 업무 진행 상황은 어떻습니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我已經完成一半了。但是有一個問題。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng wánchéng yībàn le. Dànshì yǒu yī ge wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yi3jing1 wan2cheng2 yi1ban4 le5. Dan4shi4 you3 yi1 ge5 wen4ti2.
turns.translation_en: I've already completed half of it. But there is a problem.
turns.translation_ko: 절반은 이미 완료했습니다. 그런데 문제가 하나 있습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 什麼問題？需要幫忙嗎？
turns.pinyin: Shénme wèntí? Xūyào bāngmáng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: shen2 me0 wen4ti2? Xu1yao4 bang1mang2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: What problem? Do you need help?
turns.translation_ko: 무슨 문제인가요? 도움이 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 資料不太夠，我需要更多時間整理。
turns.pinyin: Zīliào bù tài gòu, wǒ xūyào gèng duō shíjiān zhěnglǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zi1liao4 bu4 tai4 gou4, wo3 xu1yao4 geng4 duo1 shi2jian1 zheng3li3.
turns.translation_en: The data is not enough. I need more time to organize it.
turns.translation_ko: 자료가 충분하지 않습니다. 정리하는 데 시간이 더 필요합니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，你可以先整理有的資料。截止日期是下星期五。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, nǐ kěyǐ xiān zhěnglǐ yǒu de zīliào. Jiézhǐ rìqī shì xià xīngqīwǔ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi5, ni3 ke3yi3 xian1 zheng3li3 you3 de5 zi1liao4. Jie2zhi3 ri4qi1 shi4 xia4 xing1qi1wu3.
turns.translation_en: It's okay. You can organize the data you have first. The deadline is next Friday.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다. 가지고 있는 자료부터 먼저 정리하세요. 마감일은 다음 주 금요일입니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，我會先整理，然後再跟你報告。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ huì xiān zhěnglǐ, ránhòu zài gēn nǐ bàogào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 hui4 xian1 zheng3li3, ran2hou4 zai4 gen1 ni3 bao4gao4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll organize it first and then report back to you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 먼저 정리한 다음에 보고드리겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the problem with B's task?

shadowing_prompt: Listen to the dialogue and repeat each sentence aloud, focusing on the tone of asking about progress and explaining a problem.
free_response_prompt: Practice asking a teammate about their task progress. Use the phrase '你的任務進度怎麼樣了？' and respond with a problem like '資料不太夠'.

title: 截止日期的問題

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，關於這個任務的截止日期，我想跟你討論一下。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, guānyú zhège rènwù de jiézhǐ rìqī, wǒ xiǎng gēn nǐ tǎolùn yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si5, guan1yu2 zhe4ge5 ren4wu4 de5 jie2zhi3 ri4qi1, wo3 xiang3 gen1 ni3 tao3lun4 yi1xia4.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I'd like to discuss the deadline for this task with you.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다만, 이 업무의 마감일에 대해 논의하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 怎麼了？有什麼問題嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zěnme le? Yǒu shénme wèntí ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zen3 me0 le5? You3 shen2 me0 wen4ti2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: What's wrong? Is there a problem?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 그러세요? 무슨 문제라도 있나요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 因為最近有另一個緊急任務，我可能沒辦法在星期五完成。
turns.pinyin: Yīnwèi zuìjìn yǒu lìng yī ge jǐnjí rènwù, wǒ kěnéng méi bànfǎ zài xīngqīwǔ wánchéng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yin1wei4 zui4jin4 you3 ling4 yi1 ge5 jin3ji2 ren4wu4, wo3 ke3neng2 mei2 ban4fa3 zai4 xing1qi1wu3 wan2cheng2.
turns.translation_en: Because I have another urgent task recently, I might not be able to finish it by Friday.
turns.translation_ko: 최근에 다른 긴급 업무가 있어서 금요일까지 완료하지 못할 수도 있습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我了解了。那你需要延長期限嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ liǎojiě le. Nà nǐ xūyào yáncháng qīxiàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 liao3jie3 le5. Na4 ni3 xu1yao4 yan2chang2 qi1xian4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I understand. So, do you need an extension on the deadline?
turns.translation_ko: 이해했습니다. 그러면 마감일 연장이 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 如果可以的話，我希望延長到下個星期一。
turns.pinyin: Rúguǒ kěyǐ de huà, wǒ xīwàng yáncháng dào xià ge xīngqīyī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ru2guo3 ke3yi3 de5 hua4, wo3 xi1wang4 yan2chang2 dao4 xia4 ge5 xing1qi1yi1.
turns.translation_en: If possible, I hope to extend it to next Monday.
turns.translation_ko: 가능하다면 다음 주 월요일까지 연장하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，沒問題。但是請你確認新的進度，然後告訴我。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, méi wèntí. Dànshì qǐng nǐ quèrèn xīn de jìndù, ránhòu gàosu wǒ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, mei2 wen4ti2. Dan4shi4 qing3 ni3 que4ren4 xin1 de5 jin4du4, ran2hou4 gao4su4 wo3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem. But please confirm the new progress and let me know.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 괜찮습니다. 하지만 새로운 진행 상황을 확인하신 후에 저에게 알려주세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，謝謝你。我會盡快完成。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ. Wǒ huì jǐnkuài wánchéng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, xie4xie5 ni3. Wo3 hui4 jin3kuai4 wan2cheng2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you. I will finish it as soon as possible.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다. 최대한 빨리 완료하겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why does A need to extend the deadline?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A가 마감일을 연장해야 하는 이유는 무엇입니까?

shadowing_prompt: Listen to the dialogue and repeat each sentence aloud, focusing on the polite tone of asking for an extension and the response.
free_response_prompt: Practice explaining to your boss that you need an extension on a deadline because of another urgent task. Use the phrases '因為最近有另一個緊急任務' and '我希望延長到...'.

title: 你覺得這家餐廳怎麼樣？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得這家餐廳的牛肉麵怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde zhè jiā cāntīng de niúròu miàn zěnmeyàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2de zhe4 jia1 can1ting1 de niu2rou4 mian4 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: What do you think of the beef noodles at this restaurant?
turns.translation_ko: 이 식당의 소고기 국수 어때요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我覺得很好吃，湯很濃，肉也很嫩。你覺得呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ juéde hěn hǎochī, tāng hěn nóng, ròu yě hěn nèn. Nǐ juéde ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jue2de hen3 hao3chi1, tang1 hen3 nong2, rou4 ye3 hen3 nen4. Ni3 jue2de ne5?
turns.translation_en: I think it's delicious, the soup is rich and the meat is tender. What do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 맛있다고 생각해요. 국물이 진하고 고기도 부드러워요. 당신은 어떻게 생각해요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我同意你的看法，不過我覺得有點太鹹了。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ, búguò wǒ juéde yǒudiǎn tài xián le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 tong2yi4 ni3 de kan4fa3, bu2guo4 wo3 jue2de you3dian3 tai4 xian2 le5.
turns.translation_en: I agree with your opinion, but I think it's a bit too salty.
turns.translation_ko: 당신의 의견에 동의해요. 그런데 좀 너무 짠 것 같아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你說得沒錯，是有點鹹。不過我還是很喜歡。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de méi cuò, shì yǒudiǎn xián. Búguò wǒ háishì hěn xǐhuān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 shuo1 de mei2 cuo4, shi4 you3dian3 xian2. Bu2guo4 wo3 hai2shi4 hen3 xi3huan1.
turns.translation_en: You're right, it is a bit salty. But I still like it a lot.
turns.translation_ko: 맞아요, 좀 짜네요. 그래도 저는 여전히 아주 좋아해요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does A think about the beef noodles?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A는 소고기 국수에 대해 어떻게 생각합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '覺得' and '同意'.
free_response_prompt: Tell me your opinion about a food you ate recently. Use '我覺得' and '同意' or '不同意'.

title: 你覺得台北怎麼樣？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得台北這個地方怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde Táiběi zhège dìfang zěnmeyàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2de Tai2bei3 zhe4ge di4fang5 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: What do you think of Taipei?
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이는 어때요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我認為台北很熱鬧，交通也很方便。你覺得呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ rènwéi Táiběi hěn rènao, jiāotōng yě hěn fāngbiàn. Nǐ juéde ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ren4wei2 Tai2bei3 hen3 re4nao5, jiao1tong1 ye3 hen3 fang1bian4. Ni3 jue2de ne5?
turns.translation_en: I think Taipei is very lively and the transportation is very convenient. What do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 저는 타이베이가 매우 번화하고 교통도 편리하다고 생각해요. 당신은 어떻게 생각해요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我同意你的看法，不過我覺得人太多了，有點擠。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ, búguò wǒ juéde rén tài duō le, yǒudiǎn jǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 tong2yi4 ni3 de kan4fa3, bu2guo4 wo3 jue2de ren2 tai4 duo1 le5, you3dian3 ji3.
turns.translation_en: I agree with your opinion, but I think there are too many people, it's a bit crowded.
turns.translation_ko: 당신의 의견에 동의해요. 그런데 사람이 너무 많아서 좀 붐벼요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你說得沒錯，是有點擠。不過我還是很喜歡台北。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de méi cuò, shì yǒudiǎn jǐ. Búguò wǒ háishì hěn xǐhuān Táiběi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 shuo1 de mei2 cuo4, shi4 you3dian3 ji3. Bu2guo4 wo3 hai2shi4 hen3 xi3huan1 Tai2bei3.
turns.translation_en: You're right, it is a bit crowded. But I still like Taipei a lot.
turns.translation_ko: 맞아요, 좀 붐비네요. 그래도 저는 여전히 타이베이를 아주 좋아해요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does A think about Taipei?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '認為' and '同意'.
free_response_prompt: Tell me your opinion about a place you visited. Use '我認為' and '同意' or '不同意'.

title: 你覺得那部電影怎麼樣？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得那部電影怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde nà bù diànyǐng zěnmeyàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2de na4 bu4 dian4ying3 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: What do you think of that movie?
turns.translation_ko: 그 영화 어때요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我覺得很好看，故事很有意思。你覺得呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ juéde hěn hǎokàn, gùshì hěn yǒuyìsi. Nǐ juéde ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jue2de hen3 hao3kan4, gu4shi4 hen3 you3yi4si5. Ni3 jue2de ne5?
turns.translation_en: I think it's very good, the story is very interesting. What do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 저는 아주 재미있다고 생각해요. 이야기가 아주 흥미로워요. 당신은 어떻게 생각해요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我不同意你的看法，我覺得有點無聊。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bù tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ, wǒ juéde yǒudiǎn wúliáo.
