turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bu4 tong2yi4 ni3 de kan4fa3, wo3 jue2de you3dian3 wu2liao2.
turns.translation_en: I disagree with your opinion, I think it's a bit boring.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 당신의 의견에 동의하지 않아요. 좀 지루하다고 생각해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 真的嗎？我覺得很好看啊。不過沒關係，看法不同很正常。
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Wǒ juéde hěn hǎokàn a. Búguò méi guānxi, kànfǎ bùtóng hěn zhèngcháng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhen1 de5 ma5? Wo3 jue2de hen3 hao3kan4 a5. Bu2guo4 mei2 guan1xi5, kan4fa3 bu4tong2 hen3 zheng4chang2.
turns.translation_en: Really? I think it's very good. But it's okay, it's normal to have different opinions.
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 저는 아주 재미있다고 생각하는데요. 그래도 괜찮아요, 의견이 다른 것은 정상이에요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does A think about the movie?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A는 그 영화에 대해 어떻게 생각합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '不同意' and '看法不同'.
free_response_prompt: Tell me your opinion about a movie you watched. Use '我覺得' and '同意' or '不同意'.

title: 為什麼喜歡台灣

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你為什麼喜歡台灣？可以舉例說明嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme xǐhuān Táiwān? Kěyǐ jǔlì shuōmíng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 wei4 shen2 me0 xi3huan1 Tai2wan1? Ke3yi3 ju3li4 shuo1ming2 ma?
turns.translation_en: Why do you like Taiwan? Can you give examples to explain?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 대만을 좋아하세요? 예를 들어 설명해 주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我喜歡台灣，因為這裡的人很友善。比如，上次我迷路，有人帶我去車站。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān Táiwān, yīnwèi zhèlǐ de rén hěn yǒushàn. Bǐrú, shàngcì wǒ mílù, yǒu rén dài wǒ qù chēzhàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi3huan1 Tai2wan1, yin1wei4 zhe4li3 de ren2 hen3 you3shan4. Bi3ru2, shang4ci4 wo3 mi2lu4, you3 ren2 dai4 wo3 qu4 che1zhan4.
turns.translation_en: I like Taiwan because the people here are very friendly. For example, last time I got lost, someone took me to the station.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 대만이 좋아요. 여기 사람들이 매우 친절하기 때문이에요. 예를 들어, 지난번에 길을 잃었을 때 어떤 분이 저를 역까지 데려다 주셨어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 還有其他原因嗎？比如食物？
turns.pinyin: Hái yǒu qítā yuányīn ma? Bǐrú shíwù?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hai2 you3 qi2ta1 yuan2yin1 ma? Bi3ru2 shi2wu4?
turns.translation_en: Are there other reasons? For example, the food?
turns.translation_ko: 다른 이유도 있나요? 예를 들어 음식 같은 것요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，食物也是一個很大的優點。比如，夜市的小吃很好吃，而且價錢不貴。
turns.pinyin: Duì, shíwù yě shì yī gè hěn dà de yōudiǎn. Bǐrú, yèshì de xiǎochī hěn hàochī, érqiě jiàqián bù guì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, shi2wu4 ye3 shi4 yi1 ge4 hen3 da4 de you1dian3. Bi3ru2, ye4shi4 de xiao3chi1 hen3 hao3chi1, er2qie3 jia4qian2 bu4 gui4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, food is also a big advantage. For example, the snacks at the night market are delicious and not expensive.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 음식도 큰 장점이에요. 예를 들어, 야시장의 간식이 맛있고 가격도 비싸지 않아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 所以，你覺得台灣的優點勝過缺點嗎？
turns.pinyin: Suǒyǐ, nǐ juéde Táiwān de yōudiǎn shèngguò quēdiǎn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Suo3yi3, ni3 jue2de Tai2wan1 de you1dian3 sheng4guo4 que1dian3 ma?
turns.translation_en: So, do you think Taiwan's advantages outweigh its disadvantages?
turns.translation_ko: 그래서 대만의 장점이 단점보다 더 낫다고 생각하나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 當然，台灣的優點比缺點多很多。總之，我很喜歡這裡。
turns.pinyin: Dāngrán, Táiwān de yōudiǎn bǐ quēdiǎn duō hěnduō. Zǒngzhī, wǒ hěn xǐhuān zhèlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dang1ran2, Tai2wan1 de you1dian3 bi3 que1dian3 duo1 hen3duo1. Zong3zhi1, wo3 hen3 xi3huan1 zhe4li3.
turns.translation_en: Of course, Taiwan's advantages are many more than its disadvantages. In short, I really like it here.
turns.translation_ko: 물론이죠, 대만의 장점이 단점보다 훨씬 많아요. 요컨대, 저는 이곳이 정말 좋아요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why does B like Taiwan?
options_en: Because the people are friendly and the food is good
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Because the people are friendly and the food is good

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone and rhythm of giving reasons and examples.
free_response_prompt: Tell me why you like your country or city. Give at least two reasons and one example for each reason.

title: 為什麼選這個

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 你好，請問你要點什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐhǎo, qǐngwèn nǐ yào diǎn shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3hao3, qing3wen4 ni3 yao4 dian3 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Hello, what would you like to order?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 무엇을 주문하시겠어요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我想要一杯珍珠奶茶，半糖去冰。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi zhēnzhū nǎichá, bàn táng qù bīng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2, ban4 tang2 qu4 bing1.
turns.translation_en: I would like a bubble tea with half sugar and no ice.
turns.translation_ko: 버블티 한 잔에 반당, 얼음 빼고 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的。可以請問你為什麼選這個嗎？比如，你喜歡它的味道嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de. Kěyǐ qǐngwèn nǐ wèishénme xuǎn zhège ma? Bǐrú, nǐ xǐhuān tā de wèidào ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de. Ke3yi3 qing3wen4 ni3 wei4 shen2 me0 xuan3 zhe4ge ma? Bi3ru2, ni3 xi3huan1 ta1 de wei4dao4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Okay. May I ask why you chose this? For example, do you like its taste?
turns.translation_ko: 네. 왜 이것을 선택하셨는지 여쭤봐도 될까요? 예를 들어, 맛이 좋아서이신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 對，我喜歡珍珠奶茶的味道，而且珍珠的口感很好。另外，半糖比較不甜，比較健康。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ xǐhuān zhēnzhū nǎichá de wèidào, érqiě zhēnzhū de kǒugǎn hěn hǎo. Lìngwài, bàn táng bǐjiào bù tián, bǐjiào jiànkāng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 xi3huan1 zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2 de wei4dao4, er2qie3 zhen1zhu1 de kou3gan3 hen3 hao3. Ling4wai4, ban4 tang2 bi3jiao4 bu4 tian2, bi3jiao4 jian4kang1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I like the taste of bubble tea, and the texture of the pearls is good. Also, half sugar is less sweet and healthier.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 버블티의 맛이 좋고 펄의 식감도 좋아요. 게다가 반당은 덜 달아서 더 건강해요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 原來如此。所以，你覺得珍珠奶茶勝過其他飲料嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Suǒyǐ, nǐ juéde zhēnzhū nǎichá shèngguò qítā yǐnliào ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yuan2lai2 ru2ci3. Suo3yi3, ni3 jue2de zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2 sheng4guo4 qi2ta1 yin3liao4 ma?
turns.translation_en: I see. So, do you think bubble tea is better than other drinks?
turns.translation_ko: 그렇군요. 그래서 버블티가 다른 음료보다 낫다고 생각하시나요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 對，我寧願喝珍珠奶茶，也不想喝別的。因為它的味道和口感都很好。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ nìngyuàn hē zhēnzhū nǎichá, yě bù xiǎng hē bié de. Yīnwèi tā de wèidào hé kǒugǎn dōu hěn hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 ning4yuan4 he1 zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2, ye3 bu4 xiang3 he1 bie2 de. Yin1wei4 ta1 de wei4dao4 he2 kou3gan3 dou1 hen3 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I'd rather drink bubble tea than any other drink. Because its taste and texture are both great.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 차라리 버블티를 마실래요, 다른 건 마시고 싶지 않아요. 맛과 식감이 모두 좋기 때문이에요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did the customer choose bubble tea?
options_en: Because of the taste and texture
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Because of the taste and texture

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of giving reasons and comparisons.
free_response_prompt: Tell me why you chose your favorite drink or food. Give at least two reasons and one example.

title: 舉例說明

turns.speaker: 老師
turns.text: 今天我們要學怎麼舉例說明。比如，你可以說「台灣有很多好吃的東西，例如牛肉麵和滷肉飯」。
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen yào xué zěnme jǔlì shuōmíng. Bǐrú, nǐ kěyǐ shuō 'Táiwān yǒu hěnduō hàochī de dōngxī, lìrú niúròumiàn hé lǔròufàn'.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jin1tian1 wo3men yao4 xue2 zen3 me0 ju3li4 shuo1ming2. Bi3ru2, ni3 ke3yi3 shuo1 'Tai2wan1 you3 hen3duo1 hao3chi1 de dong1xi1, li4ru4 niu2rou4mian4 he2 lu3rou4fan4'.
turns.translation_en: Today we're going to learn how to give examples to explain. For example, you can say 'Taiwan has a lot of delicious food, such as beef noodles and braised pork rice.'
turns.translation_ko: 오늘은 예를 들어 설명하는 방법을 배울 거예요. 예를 들어, '대만에는 맛있는 음식이 많아요, 예를 들어 소고기 국수와 루로우판이 있어요'라고 말할 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: 學生
turns.text: 老師，我懂了。比如，我可以說「我喜歡運動，例如跑步和游泳」。
turns.pinyin: Lǎoshī, wǒ dǒng le. Bǐrú, wǒ kěyǐ shuō 'wǒ xǐhuān yùndòng, lìrú pǎobù hé yóuyǒng'.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Lao3shi1, wo3 dong3 le. Bi3ru2, wo3 ke3yi3 shuo1 'wo3 xi3huan1 yun4dong4, li4ru4 pao3bu4 he2 you2yong3'.
turns.translation_en: Teacher, I understand. For example, I can say 'I like sports, such as running and swimming.'
turns.translation_ko: 선생님, 이해했어요. 예를 들어, '저는 운동을 좋아해요, 예를 들어 달리기와 수영이요'라고 말할 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: 老師
turns.text: 很好！現在請你舉例說明你為什麼喜歡台灣。
turns.pinyin: Hěn hǎo! Xiànzài qǐng nǐ jǔlì shuōmíng nǐ wèishénme xǐhuān Táiwān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hen3 hao3! Xian4zai4 qing3 ni3 ju3li4 shuo1ming2 ni3 wei4 shen2 me0 xi3huan1 Tai2wan1.
turns.translation_en: Very good! Now please give examples to explain why you like Taiwan.
turns.translation_ko: 아주 좋아요! 이제 예를 들어 대만을 왜 좋아하는지 설명해 보세요.

turns.speaker: 學生
turns.text: 我喜歡台灣，因為這裡的風景很美。例如，我去過花蓮，那裡的海邊很漂亮。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān Táiwān, yīnwèi zhèlǐ de fēngjǐng hěn měi. Lìrú, wǒ qùguò Huālián, nàlǐ de hǎibiān hěn piàoliang.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi3huan1 Tai2wan1, yin1wei4 zhe4li3 de feng1jing3 hen3 mei3. Li4ru4, wo3 qu4guo4 Hua1lian2, na4li3 de hai3bian1 hen3 piao4liang.
turns.translation_en: I like Taiwan because the scenery here is beautiful. For example, I've been to Hualien, and the seaside there is very pretty.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 대만이 좋아요, 여기 풍경이 아름답기 때문이에요. 예를 들어, 화롄에 가 봤는데 거기 바닷가가 매우 예뻤어요.

turns.speaker: 老師
turns.text: 很好！你的例子很清楚。總之，舉例可以讓你的說明更容易懂。
turns.pinyin: Hěn hǎo! Nǐ de lìzi hěn qīngchǔ. Zǒngzhī, jǔlì kěyǐ ràng nǐ de shuōmíng gèng róngyì dǒng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hen3 hao3! Ni3 de li4zi hen3 qing1chu3. Zong3zhi1, ju3li4 ke3yi3 rang4 ni3 de shuo1ming2 geng4 rong2yi4 dong3.
turns.translation_en: Very good! Your example is very clear. In short, giving examples can make your explanation easier to understand.
turns.translation_ko: 아주 좋아요! 예시가 아주 명확해요. 요컨대, 예를 들면 설명을 더 이해하기 쉽게 만들 수 있어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the student learn to do?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of teaching and giving examples.
free_response_prompt: Give an example to explain why you like a place or a food. Use '例如' or '比如'.

title: 工作問題：進度延遲

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 老闆，不好意思，這個任務的進度有點延遲。
turns.pinyin: Lǎobǎn, bùhǎoyìsi, zhège rènwù de jìndù yǒudiǎn yánchí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Lao3ban3, bu4hao3yi4si5, zhe4ge4 ren4wu4 de5 jin4du4 you3dian3 yan2chi2.
turns.translation_en: Boss, I'm sorry, the progress on this task is a bit delayed.
turns.translation_ko: 사장님, 죄송합니다. 이 작업의 진행이 조금 지연되었습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 為什麼？你原本說這個星期五可以完成。
turns.pinyin: Wèishénme? Nǐ yuánběn shuō zhège xīngqíwǔ kěyǐ wánchéng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wei4 shen2 me0? Ni3 yuan2ben3 shuo1 zhe4ge4 xing1qi2wu3 ke3yi3 wan2cheng2.
turns.translation_en: Why? You originally said it could be completed this Friday.
turns.translation_ko: 왜요? 원래 이번 주 금요일에 완료할 수 있다고 하셨잖아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 因為同事給我的資料晚了兩天，所以我需要延長到星期一。
turns.pinyin: Yīnwèi tóngshì gěi wǒ de zīliào wǎn le liǎng tiān, suǒyǐ wǒ xūyào yáncháng dào xīngqíyī.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yin1wei4 tong2shi4 gei3 wo3 de5 zi1liao4 wan3 le5 liang3 tian1, suo3yi3 wo3 xu1yao4 yan2chang2 dao4 xing1qi2yi1.
turns.translation_en: Because my colleague gave me the data two days late, so I need to extend it to Monday.
turns.translation_ko: 동료가 저에게 자료를 이틀 늦게 줘서, 월요일까지 연장해야 합니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好吧，那星期一早上一定要給我。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo ba, nà xīngqíyī zǎoshang yīdìng yào gěi wǒ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 ba5, na4 xing1qi2yi1 zao3shang4 yi1ding4 yao4 gei3 wo3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, then you must give it to me on Monday morning.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 월요일 아침에 꼭 주세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題，謝謝老闆。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, xièxiè lǎobǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, xie4xie4 lao3ban3.
turns.translation_en: No problem, thank you boss.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다, 사장님 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why is the task delayed?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of apology and explanation.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are the employee. Explain to your boss why your task is delayed and propose a new deadline.

title: 退貨：尺寸不合

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我想退貨。這件上衣尺寸不合。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng tuìhuò. Zhè jiàn shàngyī chǐcùn bù hé.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 tui4huo4. Zhe4 jian4 shang4yi1 chi3cun4 bu4 he2.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like to return this. The size of this top doesn't fit.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 환불하고 싶습니다. 이 상의 사이즈가 맞지 않습니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 不好意思，請問您有帶購買證明嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bùhǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn nín yǒu dài gòumǎi zhèngmíng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4hao3yi4si5, qing3wen4 nin2 you3 dai4 gou4mai3 zheng4ming2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I'm sorry, do you have the proof of purchase?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 구매 증명서를 가지고 계신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 有，這是發票。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, zhè shì fāpiào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, zhe4 shi4 fa1piao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, here is the receipt.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기 영수증입니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，我幫您處理。不過，退貨需要七天內，您昨天買的，沒問題。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín chǔlǐ. Búguò, tuìhuò xūyào qī tiān nèi, nín zuótiān mǎi de, méi wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 bang1 nin2 chu3li3. Bu2guo4, tui4huo4 xu1yao4 qi1 tian1 nei4, nin2 zuo2tian1 mai3 de5, mei2 wen4ti2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll handle it for you. However, returns need to be within seven days. You bought it yesterday, so no problem.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 처리해 드리겠습니다. 하지만 환불은 7일 이내에 가능합니다. 어제 구매하셨으니 문제없습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 太好了，謝謝你。
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xièxiè nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le5, xie4xie4 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Great, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋네요, 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why does the customer want to return the item?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on polite request and confirmation.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are the store clerk. Ask the customer for the receipt and explain the return policy.

title: 意見：選擇餐廳

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們晚上要去哪裡吃飯？你有什麼想法？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen wǎnshàng yào qù nǎlǐ chīfàn? Nǐ yǒu shénme xiǎngfǎ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men5 wan3shang4 yao4 qu4 na3li3 chi1fan4? Ni3 you3 shen2 me0 xiang3fa3?
turns.translation_en: Where should we go for dinner tonight? What do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 저녁에 어디로 밥 먹으러 갈까요? 어떻게 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我認為吃牛肉麵不錯，可是你覺得呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ rènwéi chī niúròumiàn búcuò, kěshì nǐ juéde ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ren4wei2 chi1 niu2rou4mian4 bu2cuo4, ke3shi4 ni3 jue2de5 ne5?
turns.translation_en: I think beef noodles are good, but what do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수가 괜찮다고 생각하는데, 당신은 어떻게 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我同意你的看法，牛肉麵很好吃。不過，我比較想吃水餃。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ, niúròumiàn hěn hǎochī. Búguò, wǒ bǐjiào xiǎng chī shuǐjiǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 tong2yi4 ni3 de5 kan4fa3, niu2rou4mian4 hen3 hao3chi1. Bu2guo4, wo3 bi3jiao4 xiang3 chi1 shui3jiao3.
turns.translation_en: I agree with you, beef noodles are delicious. However, I'd rather eat dumplings.
turns.translation_ko: 당신 의견에 동의합니다. 소고기 국수는 정말 맛있어요. 하지만 저는 만두를 더 먹고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 水餃也可以啊！那我們去吃水餃吧。
turns.pinyin: Shuǐjiǎo yě kěyǐ a! Nà wǒmen qù chī shuǐjiǎo ba.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Shui3jiao3 ye3 ke3yi3 a5! Na4 wo3men5 qu4 chi1 shui3jiao3 ba5.
turns.translation_en: Dumplings are fine too! Then let's go out to eat dumplings.
turns.translation_ko: 만두도 괜찮네요! 그럼 만두 먹으러 가요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，就這麼決定。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, jiù zhème juédìng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, jiu4 zhe4 me0 jue2ding4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, it's decided.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그렇게 결정합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What do they finally decide to eat?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on expressing opinions and reaching agreement.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are discussing dinner plans with a friend. Suggest a restaurant and explain why you prefer it.

title: 找不到手機，後來找到了

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 昨天早上我出門的時候，發現手機不見了。
turns.pinyin: Zuótiān zǎoshang wǒ chūmén de shíhou, fāxiàn shǒujī bújiàn le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: zuo2 tian1 zao3 shang4 wo3 chu1 men2 de5 shi2 hou4, fa1 xian4 shou3 ji1 bu2 jian4 le5.
turns.translation_en: Yesterday morning when I went out, I found my phone was missing.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 아침에 나갈 때 핸드폰이 없어진 것을 알았어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 真的嗎？那後來呢？
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nà hòulái ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zhen1 de5 ma5? Na4 hou4 lai2 ne5?
turns.translation_en: Really? And then what happened?
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 그런데 나중에는요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我很緊張，到處找，可是找不到。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ hěn jǐnzhāng, dàochù zhǎo, kěshì zhǎo bú dào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 hen3 jin3 zhang1, dao4 chu4 zhao3, ke3 shi4 zhao3 bu2 dao4.
turns.translation_en: I was very nervous, looked everywhere, but couldn't find it.
turns.translation_ko: 너무 긴장해서 여기저기 찾았는데 찾을 수 없었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 那怎麼辦？你最後找到了嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nà zěnme bàn? Nǐ zuìhòu zhǎodào le ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 zen3 me0 ban4? Ni3 zui4 hou4 zhao3 dao4 le5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: What did you do then? Did you finally find it?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 어떻게 했어요? 마침내 찾았어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 後來我打電話，聽到手機在沙發下面響。原來掉到沙發下面了！
turns.pinyin: Hòulái wǒ dǎ diànhuà, tīng dào shǒujī zài shāfā xiàmiàn xiǎng. Yuánlái diào dào shāfā xiàmiàn le!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hou4 lai2 wo3 da3 dian4 hua4, ting1 dao4 shou3 ji1 zai4 sha1 fa1 xia4 mian4 xiang3. Yuan2 lai2 diao4 dao4 sha1 fa1 xia4 mian4 le5!
turns.translation_en: Later I called it, and heard the phone ringing under the sofa. It had fallen under the sofa!
turns.translation_ko: 나중에 전화를 걸었더니 핸드폰이 소파 아래에서 울리는 소리가 났어요. 알고 보니 소파 밑에 떨어져 있었어요!

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 太好了！找到的時候你一定很開心吧？
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Zhǎodào de shíhou nǐ yídìng hěn kāixīn ba?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le5! Zhao3 dao4 de5 shi2 hou4 ni3 yi2 ding4 hen3 kai1 xin1 ba5?
turns.translation_en: That's great! You must have been very happy when you found it, right?
turns.translation_ko: 잘됐네요! 찾았을 때 정말 기뻤겠죠?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對啊，我覺得很開心，終於可以出門了。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, wǒ juéde hěn kāixīn, zhōngyú kěyǐ chūmén le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a5, wo3 jue2 de5 hen3 kai1 xin1, zhong1 yu2 ke3 yi3 chu1 men2 le5.
turns.translation_en: Yeah, I felt very happy, and finally could go out.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 정말 기뻤어요. 드디어 나갈 수 있었어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where did the phone fall?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音唸出對話，注意語氣和停頓。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文說一個你曾經找不到東西的故事。

title: 去九份玩的故事

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 上個週末我跟朋友去九份玩，我覺得很好玩。
turns.pinyin: Shàng ge zhōumò wǒ gēn péngyou qù Jiǔfèn wán, wǒ juéde hěn hǎowán.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Shang4 ge5 zhou1 mo4 wo3 gen1 peng2 you3 qu4 Jiu3 fen4 wan2, wo3 jue2 de5 hen3 hao3 wan2.
turns.translation_en: Last weekend I went to Jiufen with my friends, I thought it was very fun.
turns.translation_ko: 지난 주말에 친구와 함께 구펀에 놀러 갔는데 정말 재미있었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 九份？那裡有什麼好玩的？
turns.pinyin: Jiǔfèn? Nàlǐ yǒu shénme hǎowán de?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jiu3 fen4? Na4 li3 you3 shen2 me0 hao3 wan2 de5?
turns.translation_en: Jiufen? What's fun there?
turns.translation_ko: 구펀요? 거기에 뭐 재미있는 게 있어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們吃了很多小吃，比如芋圓和滷肉飯。風景也很漂亮。
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen chī le hěn duō xiǎochī, bǐrú yùyuán hé lǔròufàn. Fēngjǐng yě hěn piàoliang.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 men5 chi1 le5 hen3 duo1 xiao3 chi1, bi3 ru2 yu4 yuan2 he2 lu3 rou4 fan4. Feng1 jing3 ye3 hen3 piao4 liang5.
turns.translation_en: We ate a lot of snacks, like taro balls and braised pork rice. The scenery was also very beautiful.
turns.translation_ko: 타로볼과 루로우판 같은 길거리 음식을 많이 먹었어요. 경치도 정말 아름다웠어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 聽起來不錯！你們怎麼去的？
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlai búcuò! Nǐmen zěnme qù de?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3 lai5 bu2 cuo4! Ni3 men5 zen3 me0 qu4 de5?
turns.translation_en: Sounds good! How did you get there?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮네요! 어떻게 갔어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們先搭捷運到台北車站，然後轉火車到瑞芳，再搭公車上去。
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen xiān dā jiéyùn dào Táiběi chēzhàn, ránhòu zhuǎn huǒchē dào Ruìfāng, zài dā gōngchē shàngqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 men5 xian1 da1 jie2 yun4 dao4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4, ran2 hou4 zhuan3 huo3 che1 dao4 Rui4 fang1, zai4 da1 gong1 che1 shang4 qu4.
turns.translation_en: We first took the MRT to Taipei Main Station, then transferred to a train to Ruifang, and then took a bus up.
turns.translation_ko: 먼저 지하철을 타고 타이베이역에 가서 기차로 루이팡까지 간 다음, 버스를 타고 올라갔어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 原來是這樣。下次我也想去看看。
turns.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Xià cì wǒ yě xiǎng qù kànkan.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. Xia4 ci4 wo3 ye3 xiang3 qu4 kan4 kan5.
turns.translation_en: I see. Next time I also want to go and see.
turns.translation_ko: 그렇군요. 다음에 저도 가보고 싶어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How did they get to Jiufen?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音唸出對話，注意語氣和停頓。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文說一個你去某個地方玩的故事。

title: 昨天真是糟糕的一天

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 昨天真是糟糕的一天！
turns.pinyin: Zuótiān zhēn shì zāogāo de yì tiān!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zuo2 tian1 zhen1 shi4 zao1 gao1 de5 yi4 tian1!
turns.translation_en: Yesterday was really a terrible day!
turns.translation_ko: 어제는 정말 최악의 날이었어요!

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 怎麼了？發生什麼事情？
turns.pinyin: Zěnme le? Fāshēng shénme shìqing?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zen3 me0 le5? Fa1 sheng1 shen2 me0 shi4 qing5?
turns.translation_en: What happened? What happened?
turns.translation_ko: 왜요? 무슨 일이 있었어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 早上我起床的時候，發現鬧鐘沒響，所以遲到了。
turns.pinyin: Zǎoshang wǒ qǐchuáng de shíhou, fāxiàn nàozhōng méi xiǎng, suǒyǐ chídào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zao3 shang4 wo3 qi3 chuang2 de5 shi2 hou4, fa1 xian4 nao4 zhong1 mei2 xiang3, suo3 yi3 chi2 dao4 le5.
turns.translation_en: In the morning when I got up, I found the alarm didn't ring, so I was late.
turns.translation_ko: 아침에 일어났을 때 알람이 울리지 않은 것을 발견해서 지각했어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 哎呀，那後來呢？
turns.pinyin: Āiyā, nà hòulái ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ai1 ya1, na4 hou4 lai2 ne5?
turns.translation_en: Oh dear, and then?
turns.translation_ko: 아이고, 그런데 나중에는요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 然後我出門的時候又下雨了，我忘記帶傘，全身都濕了。
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu wǒ chūmén de shíhou yòu xiàyǔ le, wǒ wàngjì dài sǎn, quánshēn dōu shī le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2 hou4 wo3 chu1 men2 de5 shi2 hou4 you4 xia4 yu3 le5, wo3 wang4 ji4 dai4 san3, quan2 shen1 dou1 shi1 le5.
turns.translation_en: Then when I went out, it rained again, I forgot to bring an umbrella, and my whole body got wet.
turns.translation_ko: 그리고 나갈 때 비가 또 내렸는데 우산을 가져오는 걸 잊어서 온몸이 다 젖었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 天啊！那你一定很難過吧？
turns.pinyin: Tiān a! Nà nǐ yídìng hěn nánguò ba?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tian1 a5! Na4 ni3 yi2 ding4 hen3 nan2 guo4 ba5?
turns.translation_en: Oh my god! You must have been very upset, right?
turns.translation_ko: 세상에! 그럼 정말 속상했겠네요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對啊，我覺得很生氣，可是後來想想，也沒辦法。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, wǒ juéde hěn shēngqì, kěshì hòulái xiǎngxiǎng, yě méi bànfǎ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a5, wo3 jue2 de5 hen3 sheng1 qi4, ke3 shi4 hou4 lai2 xiang3 xiang3, ye3 mei2 ban4 fa3.
turns.translation_en: Yeah, I felt very angry, but later I thought about it, there was nothing I could do.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 정말 화가 났는데 나중에 생각해보니 어쩔 수 없더라고요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why was the person late?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音唸出對話，注意語氣和停頓。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文說一個你覺得很糟糕的一天。

title: 朋友問後續
scenario: telling stories with interruption and questions

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 昨天我發生了一件有趣的事情。
turns.pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ fāshēng le yī jiàn yǒuqù de shìqíng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: zuo2 tian1 wo3 fa1 sheng1 le yi1 jian4 you3 qu4 de shi4 qing2.
turns.translation_en: Yesterday, something interesting happened to me.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 저에게 재미있는 일이 있었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 真的嗎？然後呢？
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Ránhòu ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zhen1 de5 ma5? ran2 hou4 ne5?
turns.translation_en: Really? And then?
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 그리고요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我在路上看到一隻小狗，然後牠一直跟著我。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zài lùshàng kàn dào yī zhī xiǎo gǒu, ránhòu tā yīzhí gēnzhe wǒ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 zai4 lu4 shang4 kan4 dao4 yi1 zhi1 xiao3 gou3, ran2 hou4 ta1 yi1 zhi2 gen1 zhe5 wo3.
turns.translation_en: I saw a little dog on the road, and then it kept following me.
turns.translation_ko: 길에서 작은 개 한 마리를 봤는데, 계속 저를 따라왔어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後呢？你怎麼做？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne? Nǐ zěnme zuò?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ran2 hou4 ne5? ni3 zen3 me0 zuo4?
turns.translation_en: And then? What did you do?
turns.translation_ko: 그리고요? 어떻게 하셨어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我帶牠去商店，買了水給牠喝。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ dài tā qù shāngdiàn, mǎi le shuǐ gěi tā hē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 dai4 ta1 qu4 shang1 dian4, mai3 le5 shui3 gei3 ta1 he1.
turns.translation_en: I took it to a store and bought water for it to drink.
turns.translation_ko: 그 개를 데리고 가게에 가서 물을 사서 줬어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 原來是這樣！後來呢？
turns.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng! Hòulái ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4! hou4 lai2 ne5?
turns.translation_en: So that's how it was! And later?
turns.translation_ko: 그랬군요! 그다음에는요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 後來牠的主人來了，把牠帶回去了。
turns.pinyin: Hòulái tā de zhǔrén lái le, bǎ tā dài huí qù le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hou4 lai2 ta1 de5 zhu3 ren2 lai2 le5, ba3 ta1 dai4 hui2 qu4 le5.
turns.translation_en: Later, its owner came and took it back.
turns.translation_ko: 나중에 주인이 와서 데리고 갔어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did A see on the road?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '然後呢' and '後來呢'.
free_response_prompt: Tell a short story about something that happened to you recently, and let your partner ask '然後呢' or '後來呢'.

title: 澄清故事
scenario: telling stories with interruption and questions

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我昨天去餐廳吃飯，結果發生了一件奇怪的事情。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān qù cāntīng chīfàn, jiéguǒ fāshēng le yī jiàn qíguài de shìqíng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 zuo2 tian1 qu4 can1 ting1 chi1 fan4, jie2 guo3 fa1 sheng1 le yi1 jian4 qi2 guai4 de shi4 qing2.
turns.translation_en: I went to a restaurant to eat yesterday, and as a result, something strange happened.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 식당에 밥을 먹으러 갔는데, 이상한 일이 일어났어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 怎麼了？可以講清楚一點嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zěnme le? Kěyǐ jiǎng qīngchu yīdiǎn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: zen3 me0 le5? ke3 yi3 jiang3 qing1 chu5 yi1 dian3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: What happened? Can you explain a bit more clearly?
turns.translation_ko: 어떻게 된 거예요? 좀 더 자세히 말해 주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我點了一份牛肉麵，可是送來的菜不對。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ diǎn le yī fèn niúròumiàn, kěshì sòng lái de cài bù duì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 dian3 le5 yi1 fen4 niu2 rou4 mian4, ke3 shi4 song4 lai2 de5 cai4 bu4 dui4.
turns.translation_en: I ordered a bowl of beef noodles, but the dish that came was wrong.
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수를 주문했는데, 잘못된 요리가 나왔어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你的意思是，他們送錯了？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ de yìsi shì, tāmen sòng cuò le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ni3 de5 yi4 si5 shi4, ta1 men5 song4 cuo4 le5?
turns.translation_en: Do you mean they delivered the wrong order?
turns.translation_ko: 그러니까 주문이 잘못 나왔다는 뜻이에요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對，我點的是牛肉麵，可是他們送來的是滷肉飯。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ diǎn de shì niúròumiàn, kěshì tāmen sòng lái de shì lǔròufàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4, wo3 dian3 de5 shi4 niu2 rou4 mian4, ke3 shi4 ta1 men5 song4 lai2 de5 shi4 lu3 rou4 fan4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I ordered beef noodles, but they brought braised pork rice.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 소고기 국수를 주문했는데 루로우판이 나왔어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 原來如此。然後你怎麼處理？
turns.pinyin: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Ránhòu nǐ zěnme chǔlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: yuan2 lai2 ru2 ci3. ran2 hou4 ni3 zen3 me0 chu3 li3?
turns.translation_en: I see. Then how did you handle it?
turns.translation_ko: 그렇군요. 그럼 어떻게 처리하셨어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我跟店員說，然後他們幫我換了一份。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ gēn diànyuán shuō, ránhòu tāmen bāng wǒ huàn le yī fèn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 gen1 dian4 yuan2 shuo1, ran2 hou4 ta1 men5 bang1 wo3 huan4 le5 yi1 fen4.
turns.translation_en: I told the staff, and then they helped me exchange it.
turns.translation_ko: 직원에게 말했더니, 교환해 주었어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did A originally order?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the clarifying questions like '你的意思是' and '然後你怎麼處理'.
free_response_prompt: Tell a story about a time you received the wrong order, and let your partner ask clarifying questions.

title: 繼續故事
scenario: telling stories with interruption and questions

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我昨天去公園散步，然後看到一個人在拍照。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān qù gōngyuán sànbù, ránhòu kàn dào yī gè rén zài pāizhào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 zuo2 tian1 qu4 gong1 yuan2 san4 bu4, ran2 hou4 kan4 dao4 yi1 ge4 ren2 zai4 pai1 zhao4.
turns.translation_en: I went for a walk in the park yesterday, and then I saw someone taking photos.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 공원에 산책하러 갔는데, 한 사람이 사진을 찍고 있었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後呢？你認識那個人嗎？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne? Nǐ rènshi nà ge rén ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ran2 hou4 ne5? ni3 ren4 shi5 na4 ge4 ren2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: And then? Do you know that person?
turns.translation_ko: 그런데요? 그 사람을 아세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不認識，可是我覺得他拍的照片很好看。
turns.pinyin: Bù rènshi, kěshì wǒ juéde tā pāi de zhàopiàn hěn hǎokàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 ren4 shi5, ke3 shi4 wo3 jue2 de5 ta1 pai1 de5 zhao4 pian4 hen3 hao3 kan4.
turns.translation_en: I don't know him, but I think the photos he took were very beautiful.
turns.translation_ko: 몰라요, 하지만 그가 찍은 사진이 아주 예뻤어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後呢？你有跟他說話嗎？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne? Nǐ yǒu gēn tā shuōhuà ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ran2 hou4 ne5? ni3 you3 gen1 ta1 shuo1 hua4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: And then? Did you talk to him?
turns.translation_ko: 그런데요? 그 사람과 이야기했어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 有啊，我問他能不能教我拍照。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu a, wǒ wèn tā néng bù néng jiào wǒ pāizhào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: you3 a5, wo3 wen4 ta1 neng2 bu4 neng2 jiao4 wo3 pai1 zhao4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I asked him if he could teach me to take photos.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 사진 찍는 법을 가르쳐 줄 수 있는지 물어봤어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後呢？他怎麼說？
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu ne? Tā zěnme shuō?
turns.pinyin_numeric: ran2 hou4 ne5? ta1 zen3 me0 shuo1?
turns.translation_en: And then? What did he say?
turns.translation_ko: 그런데요? 그가 뭐라고 했어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 他說可以，然後我們就一起拍照了。
turns.pinyin: Tā shuō kěyǐ, ránhòu wǒmen jiù yīqǐ pāizhào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ta1 shuo1 ke3 yi3, ran2 hou4 wo3 men5 jiu4 yi1 qi3 pai1 zhao4 le5.
turns.translation_en: He said yes, and then we took photos together.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮다고 해서, 함께 사진을 찍었어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did A ask the person?
options_en: To teach how to take photos
To take a photo of A
comprehension_questions.answer_en: To teach how to take photos

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, focusing on the flow of '然後呢' questions to continue the story.
free_response_prompt: Continue the story: what happened after they took photos together? Use '然後' and '接著'.

title: 點餐猶豫

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 你好，請問要點什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào diǎn shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 dian3 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Hello, what would you like to order?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 무엇을 주문하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 嗯，我想一下喔……那個，我要一杯珍珠奶茶，半糖少冰。
turns.pinyin: Ēn, wǒ xiǎng yīxià ō…… nàge, wǒ yào yī bēi zhēnzhū nǎichá, bàn táng shǎo bīng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: En1, wo3 xiang3 yi1 xia4 o1... na4 ge5, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhen1 zhu1 nai3 cha2, ban4 tang2 shao3 bing1.
turns.translation_en: Um, let me think... I would like a bubble tea with half sugar and light ice.
turns.translation_ko: 음, 잠깐 생각해볼게요... 저, 버블 밀크티 한 잔, 당 반, 얼음 적게 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，半糖少冰。還要別的嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, bàn táng shǎo bīng. Hái yào bié de ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, ban4 tang2 shao3 bing1. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de5 ma3?
turns.translation_en: Okay, half sugar, light ice. Anything else?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 당 반, 얼음 적게요. 다른 것도 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我再看一下菜單……那個，我還想要一個三明治，呃沒有，就是說，火腿的。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zài kàn yīxià càidān…… nàge, wǒ hái xiǎng yào yī ge sānmíngzhì, é méi yǒu, jiùshì shuō, huǒ tuǐ de.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zai4 kan4 yi1 xia4 cai4 dan1... na4 ge5, wo3 hai2 xiang3 yao4 yi1 ge5 san1 ming2 zhi4, e4 mei2 you3, jiu4 shi4 shuo1, huo3 tui3 de5.
turns.translation_en: Let me look at the menu again... um, I also want a sandwich, uh no, I mean, ham.
turns.translation_ko: 메뉴를 좀 더 볼게요... 저, 샌드위치도 하나 더, 어 아니, 그러니까, 햄으로요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好，一個火腿三明治。這樣就這些嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, yī ge huǒ tuǐ sānmíngzhì. Zhèyàng jiù zhèxiē ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, yi1 ge5 huo3 tui3 san1 ming2 zhi4. Zhe4 yang4 jiu4 zhe4 xie1 ma3?
turns.translation_en: Okay, one ham sandwich. Is that all?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 햄 샌드위치 하나요. 이걸로 다인가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 對啊，就這樣。謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, jiù zhèyàng. Xièxiè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a5, jiu4 zhe4 yang4. Xie4 xie5.
turns.translation_en: Yeah, that's it. Thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 그게 다예요. 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer order?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat after the customer, using natural pauses and fillers like '嗯', '那個', '就是說'.
free_response_prompt: Order a drink and a snack at a bubble tea shop, hesitating naturally like the customer.

title: 自我修正

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你知道嗎，我昨天去了一家新的餐廳，就是說，在公司附近。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhīdào ma, wǒ zuótiān qù le yī jiā xīn de cāntīng, jiùshì shuō, zài gōngsī fùjìn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhi1 dao4 ma5, wo3 zuo2 tian1 qu4 le5 yi1 jia1 xin1 de5 can1 ting1, jiu4 shi4 shuo1, zai4 gong1 si1 fu4 jin4.
turns.translation_en: You know, I went to a new restaurant yesterday, I mean, near the company.
turns.translation_ko: 있잖아, 나 어제 새 식당에 갔어, 그러니까, 회사 근처에.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 哦，是嗎？那家店怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Ō, shì ma? Nà jiā diàn zěnme yàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: O1, shi4 ma5? Na4 jia1 dian4 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: Oh, really? How was that place?
turns.translation_ko: 아, 그래? 그 가게 어땠어?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我覺得還不錯，但是——哎，不是，我的意思是，它的招牌菜很好吃，可是服務有點慢。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ juéde hái bùcuò, dànshì——āi, bùshì, wǒ de yìsi shì, tā de zhāopái cài hěn hǎo chī, kěshì fúwù yǒu diǎn màn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jue2 de5 hai2 bu4 cuo4, dan4 shi4--ai1, bu2 shi4, wo3 de5 yi4 si1 shi4, ta1 de5 zhao1 pai2 cai4 hen3 hao3 chi1, ke3 shi4 fu2 wu4 you3 dian3 man4.
turns.translation_en: I thought it was okay, but—ah, no, I mean, its signature dish was delicious, but the service was a bit slow.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮다고 생각했는데, 아, 아니, 내 말은, 그 가게 대표 메뉴는 맛있었는데 서비스가 좀 느렸어.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 這樣啊。那你會再去嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zhèyàng a. Nà nǐ huì zài qù ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 yang4 a5. Na4 ni3 hui4 zai4 qu4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I see. Would you go again?
turns.translation_ko: 그렇구나. 그럼 다시 갈 거야?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 嗯……應該會吧，但是我想換一下說，下次去的時候要早一點。
turns.pinyin: Ēn…… yīnggāi huì ba, dànshì wǒ xiǎng huàn yīxià shuō, xià cì qù de shíhou yào zǎo yīdiǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: En1... ying1 gai1 hui4 ba5, dan4 shi4 wo3 xiang3 huan4 yi1 xia4 shuo1, xia4 ci4 qu4 de5 shi2 hou5 yao4 zao3 yi1 dian3.
turns.translation_en: Hmm... probably, but let me rephrase, next time I'll go earlier.
turns.translation_ko: 음... 아마 갈 거야, 그런데 말을 바꾸자면, 다음에 갈 때는 좀 일찍 가려고.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did A correct about the restaurant?
options_en: The service was slow, not the food
options_ko: 서비스가 느렸지 음식이 나쁜 게 아니다
comprehension_questions.answer_en: The service was slow, not the food

shadowing_prompt: Practice self-correction phrases like '不是', '我的意思是', '換一下說' with natural intonation.
free_response_prompt: Tell a friend about a restaurant you visited, then correct yourself on one detail.

title: 確認理解

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們下個星期六去九份，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen xià ge xīngqī liù qù jiǔfèn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 men5 xia4 ge5 xing1 qi1 liu4 qu4 jiu3 fen4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Let's go to Jiufen next Saturday, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 우리 다음 주 토요일에 지우펀에 가는 게 어때?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 九份？那個，我知道那個地方，就是說，很多小吃的地方，對不對？
turns.pinyin: Jiǔfèn? Nàge, wǒ zhīdào nà ge dìfang, jiùshì shuō, hěn duō xiǎochī de dìfang, duì bù duì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jiu3 fen4? Na4 ge5, wo3 zhi1 dao4 na4 ge5 di4 fang5, jiu4 shi4 shuo1, hen3 duo1 xiao3 chi1 de5 di4 fang5, dui4 bu4 dui4?
turns.translation_en: Jiufen? Um, I know that place, I mean, a place with lots of snacks, right?
turns.translation_ko: 지우펀? 저, 그 장소 알아, 그러니까, 간식이 많은 곳, 맞지?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對啊，那裡有很多特產，還有好看的風景。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, nà lǐ yǒu hěn duō tèchǎn, hái yǒu hǎo kàn de fēngjǐng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a5, na4 li3 you3 hen3 duo1 te4 chan3, hai2 you3 hao3 kan4 de5 feng1 jing3.
turns.translation_en: Yeah, there are lots of local specialties and beautiful scenery.
turns.translation_ko: 맞아, 거기 특산물도 많고 경치도 예뻐.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 那我們怎麼去？坐火車還是開車？
turns.pinyin: Nà wǒmen zěnme qù? Zuò huǒchē háishì kāichē?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wo3 men5 zen3 me0 qu4? Zuo4 huo3 che1 hai2 shi4 kai1 che1?
turns.translation_en: Then how do we get there? By train or by car?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 우리 어떻게 가? 기차 타고 갈까, 운전해서 갈까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我覺得坐火車比較好，因為不用擔心塞車。你覺得呢？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ juéde zuò huǒchē bǐjiào hǎo, yīnwèi bùyòng dānxīn sāichē. Nǐ juéde ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jue2 de5 zuo4 huo3 che1 bi3 jiao4 hao3, yin1 wei4 bu4 yong4 dan1 xin1 sai1 che1. Ni3 jue2 de5 ne5?
turns.translation_en: I think taking the train is better because we don't have to worry about traffic. What do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 나는 기차 타는 게 더 나은 것 같아, 차 막힐 걱정이 없으니까. 너는 어떻게 생각해?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 也對，那我們就坐火車。我再確認一下，是下個星期六上午出發，對嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yě duì, nà wǒmen jiù zuò huǒchē. Wǒ zài quèrèn yīxià, shì xià ge xīngqī liù shàngwǔ chūfā, duì ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ye3 dui4, na4 wo3 men5 jiu4 zuo4 huo3 che1. Wo3 zai4 que4 ren4 yi1 xia4, shi4 xia4 ge5 xing1 qi1 liu4 shang4 wu3 chu1 fa1, dui4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: That's right, so let's take the train. Let me confirm, we're leaving next Saturday morning, right?
turns.translation_ko: 그래, 그럼 기차 타자. 내가 다시 확인할게, 다음 주 토요일 오전에 출발하는 거 맞지?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對，沒問題。
turns.pinyin: Duì, méi wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, mei2 wen4 ti2.
turns.translation_en: Yes, no problem.
turns.translation_ko: 응, 문제없어.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How will they go to Jiufen?

shadowing_prompt: Practice confirmation phrases like '對不對', '確認一下', '對嗎' with rising intonation.
free_response_prompt: Plan a trip with a friend, confirming each detail using natural fillers and questions.

title: 聽不懂，請再說一次

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，我聽不懂你的意思。可以再說一次嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ tīng bù dǒng nǐ de yìsi. Kěyǐ zài shuō yī cì ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 ting1 bu4 dong3 ni3 de5 yi4 si5. ke3 yi3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I don't understand what you mean. Can you say it again?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다만, 무슨 뜻인지 모르겠어요. 한 번 더 말씀해 주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題。我說，這個句子有錯誤，需要改一下。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Wǒ shuō, zhège jùzi yǒu cuòwù, xūyào gǎi yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2. wo3 shuo1, zhe4 ge5 ju4 zi5 you3 cuo4 wu4, xu1 yao4 gai3 yi1 xia4.
turns.translation_en: No problem. I said, this sentence has a mistake and needs to be corrected.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요. 제가 말한 건, 이 문장에 오류가 있어서 고쳐야 한다는 거예요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 哦，原來是這樣。我以為你說的是答案有問題。
turns.pinyin: Ó, yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Wǒ yǐwéi nǐ shuō de shì dá'àn yǒu wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: o2, yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. wo3 yi3 wei2 ni3 shuo1 de5 shi4 da2 an4 you3 wen4 ti2.
turns.translation_en: Oh, I see. I thought you meant the answer had a problem.
turns.translation_ko: 아, 그렇군요. 저는 답에 문제가 있다고 말씀하시는 줄 알았어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不是的，是句子本身有錯誤。我們確認一下，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù shì de, shì jùzi běnshēn yǒu cuòwù. Wǒmen quèrèn yīxià, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 shi4 de5, shi4 ju4 zi5 ben3 shen1 you3 cuo4 wu4. wo3 men5 que4 ren4 yi1 xia4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: No, it's the sentence itself that has a mistake. Let's confirm it, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 아니에요, 문장 자체에 오류가 있는 거예요. 확인해 볼까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，對不起，我誤會了。請你解釋清楚。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, duìbuqǐ, wǒ wùhuì le. Qǐng nǐ jiěshì qīngchu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, dui4 bu5 qi3, wo3 wu4 hui4 le5. qing3 ni3 jie3 shi4 qing1 chu5.
turns.translation_en: Okay, sorry, I misunderstood. Please explain clearly.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 죄송합니다. 제가 오해했어요. 분명히 설명해 주세요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒關係。這個句子的意思是「我喜歡喝咖啡」，不是「我喜歡喝茶」。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi. Zhège jùzi de yìsi shì 'wǒ xǐhuān hē kāfēi', bù shì 'wǒ xǐhuān hē chá'.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 guan1 xi5. zhe4 ge5 ju4 zi5 de5 yi4 si5 shi4 'wo3 xi3 huan1 he1 ka1 fei1', bu4 shi4 'wo3 xi3 huan1 he1 cha2'.
turns.translation_en: No problem. The meaning of this sentence is 'I like to drink coffee', not 'I like to drink tea'.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요. 이 문장의 뜻은 '저는 커피 마시는 것을 좋아합니다'이고, '차 마시는 것을 좋아합니다'가 아니에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我明白了。謝謝你的解釋。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ míngbái le. Xièxie nǐ de jiěshì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 ming2 bai2 le5. xie4 xie5 ni3 de5 jie3 shi4.
turns.translation_en: I understand. Thank you for the explanation.
turns.translation_ko: 이해했어요. 설명해 주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did speaker A originally misunderstand?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and the phrase '聽不懂'.
free_response_prompt: Practice saying: '對不起，我聽不懂。可以再說一次嗎？' and explain what you misunderstood.

title: 請說慢一點

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，你說得太快了。可以說慢一點嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, nǐ shuō de tài kuài le. Kěyǐ shuō màn yīdiǎn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, ni3 shuo1 de5 tai4 kuai4 le5. ke3 yi3 shuo1 man4 yi1 dian3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, you spoke too fast. Can you speak a little slower?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다만, 너무 빠르게 말씀하셨어요. 조금 천천히 말씀해 주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，我慢慢說。這個問題的答案是什麼？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ màn man shuō. Zhège wèntí de dá'àn shì shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, wo3 man4 man5 shuo1. zhe4 ge5 wen4 ti2 de5 da2 an4 shi4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll speak slowly. What is the answer to this question?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 천천히 말할게요. 이 질문의 답은 무엇인가요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 嗯…我以為答案是「三」，可是你說的是「四」嗎？
turns.pinyin: Ēn... wǒ yǐwéi dá'àn shì 'sān', kěshì nǐ shuō de shì 'sì' ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: en1... wo3 yi3 wei2 da2 an4 shi4 'san1', ke3 shi4 ni3 shuo1 de5 shi4 'si4' ma5?
turns.translation_en: Hmm... I thought the answer was 'three', but did you say 'four'?
turns.translation_ko: 음... 저는 답이 '3'이라고 생각했는데, '4'라고 말씀하셨나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不是的，我說的是「三」。你聽錯了。
turns.pinyin: Bù shì de, wǒ shuō de shì 'sān'. Nǐ tīng cuò le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 shi4 de5, wo3 shuo1 de5 shi4 'san1'. ni3 ting1 cuo4 le5.
turns.translation_en: No, I said 'three'. You misheard.
turns.translation_ko: 아니에요, 제가 '3'이라고 말했어요. 잘못 들으셨어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對不起，我聽錯了。請你再說一次，慢一點。
turns.pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, wǒ tīng cuò le. Qǐng nǐ zài shuō yī cì, màn yīdiǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4 bu5 qi3, wo3 ting1 cuo4 le5. qing3 ni3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4, man4 yi1 dian3.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I misheard. Please say it again, slower.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 잘못 들었어요. 다시 한 번 천천히 말씀해 주세요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒關係。答案是「三」。你明白了嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi. Dá'àn shì 'sān'. Nǐ míngbái le ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 guan1 xi5. da2 an4 shi4 'san1'. ni3 ming2 bai2 le5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: No problem. The answer is 'three'. Do you understand?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요. 답은 '3'입니다. 이해하셨나요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 明白了，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Míngbái le, xièxie.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ming2 bai2 le5, xie4 xie5.
turns.translation_en: I understand, thank you.

title: 確認意思

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想確認一下你的意思。你說的「改時間」是改到明天嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià nǐ de yìsi. Nǐ shuō de 'gǎi shíjiān' shì gǎi dào míngtiān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: wo3 xiang3 que4 ren4 yi1 xia4 ni3 de5 yi4 si5. ni3 shuo1 de5 'gai3 shi2 jian1' shi4 gai3 dao4 ming2 tian1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I want to confirm what you mean. Does 'reschedule' mean change to tomorrow?
turns.translation_ko: 무슨 뜻인지 확인하고 싶어요. '시간을 바꾸다'라는 게 내일로 바꾸는 건가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不是的，我是說改到後天。對不起，我沒有說清楚。
turns.pinyin: Bù shì de, wǒ shì shuō gǎi dào hòutiān. Duìbuqǐ, wǒ méiyǒu shuō qīngchu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 shi4 de5, wo3 shi4 shuo1 gai3 dao4 hou4 tian1. dui4 bu5 qi3, wo3 mei2 you3 shuo1 qing1 chu5.
turns.translation_en: No, I meant change to the day after tomorrow. Sorry, I didn't say it clearly.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 모레로 바꾸는 거라고 말했어요. 죄송합니다, 제가 분명히 말하지 않았네요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 原來是這樣。我以為是明天，其實是後天。
turns.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Wǒ yǐwéi shì míngtiān, qíshí shì hòutiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. wo3 yi3 wei2 shi4 ming2 tian1, qi2 shi2 shi4 hou4 tian1.
turns.translation_en: I see. I thought it was tomorrow, but it's actually the day after tomorrow.
turns.translation_ko: 그렇군요. 저는 내일인 줄 알았는데, 사실은 모레였네요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，就是這樣。我們再確認一次，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Duì, jiù shì zhèyàng. Wǒmen zài quèrèn yī cì, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4, jiu4 shi4 zhe4 yang4. wo3 men5 zai4 que4 ren4 yi1 ci4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Yes, that's right. Let's confirm once more, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 그렇습니다. 한 번 더 확인할까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的。所以我們後天見面，對不對？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de. Suǒyǐ wǒmen hòutiān jiànmiàn, duì bù duì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5. suo3 yi3 wo3 men5 hou4 tian1 jian4 mian4, dui4 bu5 dui4?
turns.translation_en: Okay. So we meet the day after tomorrow, right?
turns.translation_ko: 네. 그러면 모레 만나는 거죠, 맞나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，沒有問題。謝謝你確認。
turns.pinyin: Duì, méiyǒu wèntí. Xièxie nǐ quèrèn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4, mei2 you3 wen4 ti2. xie4 xie5 ni3 que4 ren4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, no problem. Thank you for confirming.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 문제없어요. 확인해 주셔서 감사합니다.

turns.translation_ko: 응. 영화관 입구에서 오후 2시에 만나자, 괜찮아?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題。到時候見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Dào shíhou jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2. dao4 shi2 hou jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem. See you then!
turns.translation_ko: 알겠어. 그때 보자!

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，再見！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, zàijiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3, zai4 jian4!
turns.translation_en: Okay, goodbye!
turns.translation_ko: 응, 안녕!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What are they planning to do?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on casual and friendly intonation.
free_response_prompt: Practice calling a friend to make plans. Use the dialogue as a model.

title: 約時間見面
scenario: short chat messages in Traditional Chinese

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我們明天下午三點見面，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒmen míngtiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3men ming2tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 jian4mian4, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hello, shall we meet tomorrow at 3 PM?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 내일 오후 3시에 만날까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以，沒問題。在哪裡見面？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, méi wèntí. Zài nǎlǐ jiànmiàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, mei2 wen4ti2. Zai4 na3li3 jian4mian4?
turns.translation_en: Sure, no problem. Where shall we meet?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 괜찮아요. 어디서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 在捷運站出口一，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zài jiéyùn zhàn chūkǒu yī, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zai4 jie2yun4 zhan4 chu1kou3 yi1, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: At MRT station exit 1, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 지하철역 1번 출구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，我準時到。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ zhǔnshí dào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 zhun3shi2 dao4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll be there on time.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 제 시간에 도착할게요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝，明天見！
turns.pinyin: Xièxie, míngtiān jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie, ming2tian1 jian4!
turns.translation_en: Thank you, see you tomorrow!
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 내일 뵙겠습니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What time will they meet?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Practice sending a message to a friend to confirm a meeting time and place.

title: 遲到通知
scenario: short chat messages in Traditional Chinese

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對不起，我快到了，但是路上塞車。
turns.pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, wǒ kuài dào le, dànshì lùshàng sāichē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4bu5qi3, wo3 kuai4 dao4 le, dan4shi4 lu4shang4 sai1che1.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I'm almost there, but there's a traffic jam.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 거의 도착했는데 길이 막혀요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒關係，你慢慢來，我等你。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, nǐ mànman lái, wǒ děng nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi, ni3 man4man5 lai2, wo3 deng3 ni3.
turns.translation_en: No problem, take your time, I'll wait for you.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 천천히 오세요, 기다릴게요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝你，我大概再十分鐘到。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ, wǒ dàgài zài shí fēnzhōng dào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie ni3, wo3 da4gai4 zai4 shi2 fen1zhong1 dao4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I'll be there in about ten more minutes.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 아마 10분 후에 도착할 거예요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，沒問題，你路上小心。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, méi wèntí, nǐ lùshàng xiǎoxīn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, mei2 wen4ti2, ni3 lu4shang4 xiao3xin1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem, be careful on the road.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 괜찮아요, 길 조심하세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，等一下見。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, děng yīxià jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, deng3 yi1xia4 jian4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, see you in a bit.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 잠시 후에 뵙겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why is A late?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Practice sending a message to a friend to explain you are running late.

title: 確認地址
scenario: short chat messages in Traditional Chinese

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我想確認一下見面的地址。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià jiànmiàn de dìzhǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 que4ren4 yi1xia4 jian4mian4 de5 di4zhi3.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like to confirm the meeting address.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 만날 주소를 확인하고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，地址是台北市大安區信義路三段一百號。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, dìzhǐ shì Táiběi Shì Dà'ān Qū Xìnyì Lù Sān Duàn yībǎi hào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, di4zhi3 shi4 Tai2bei3 Shi4 Da4'an1 Qu1 Xin4yi4 Lu4 San1 Duan4 yi1bai3 hao4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, the address is No. 100, Section 3, Xinyi Road, Da'an District, Taipei City.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 주소는 타이베이시 다안구 신이루 3단 100번지입니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝，是在咖啡店嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie, shì zài kāfēi diàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie, shi4 zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Thank you, is it at a coffee shop?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 커피숍인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，在一樓的咖啡店。
turns.pinyin: Duì, zài yī lóu de kāfēi diàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, zai4 yi1 lou2 de5 ka1fei1 dian4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, at the coffee shop on the first floor.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 1층에 있는 커피숍이에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，我知道了，謝謝你。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le, xièxie nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1dao4 le, xie4xie ni3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I see, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다, 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不客氣，等一下見。
turns.pinyin: Bú kèqì, děng yīxià jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2 ke4qi4, deng3 yi1xia4 jian4.
turns.translation_en: You're welcome, see you in a bit.
turns.translation_ko: 천만에요, 잠시 후에 뵙겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where will they meet?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Practice sending a message to confirm an address for a meeting.

title: 選擇餐廳

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我們今天想吃晚餐，你有推薦的餐廳嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒmen jīntiān xiǎng chī wǎncān, nǐ yǒu tuījiàn de cāntīng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3men jin1tian1 xiang3 chi1 wan3can1, ni3 you3 tui1jian4 de can1ting1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hello, we want to have dinner today. Do you have any restaurant recommendations?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 오늘 저녁을 먹고 싶은데 추천하는 식당이 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有啊，附近有一家牛肉麵店，很好吃，價錢也不貴。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu a, fùjìn yǒu yī jiā niúròumiàn diàn, hěn hǎochī, jiàqián yě bù guì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 a, fu4jin4 you3 yi1 jia1 niu2rou4mian4 dian4, hen3 hao3chi1, jia4qian2 ye3 bu4 gui4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, there's a beef noodle shop nearby. It's delicious and the price is not expensive.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 근처에 소고기 국수 가게가 있는데 맛있고 가격도 비싸지 않아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 牛肉麵不錯，可是我想吃滷肉飯，有沒有賣滷肉飯的餐廳？
turns.pinyin: Niúròumiàn bùcuò, kěshì wǒ xiǎng chī lǔròufàn, yǒu méiyǒu mài lǔròufàn de cāntīng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Niu2rou4mian4 bu4cuo4, ke3shi4 wo3 xiang3 chi1 lu3rou4fan4, you3 mei2you3 mai4 lu3rou4fan4 de can1ting1?
turns.translation_en: Beef noodles are good, but I want to eat braised pork rice. Is there a restaurant that sells braised pork rice?
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수도 좋지만 저는 루로우판을 먹고 싶어요. 루로우판을 파는 식당이 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有，前面路口左轉有一家小吃店，他們的滷肉飯是招牌，很多人推薦。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, qiánmiàn lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn yǒu yī jiā xiǎochī diàn, tāmen de lǔròufàn shì zhāopái, hěnduō rén tuījiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, qian2mian4 lu4kou3 zuo3 zhuan3 you3 yi1 jia1 xiao3chi1 dian4, ta1men de lu3rou4fan4 shi4 zhao1pai2, hen3duo1 ren2 tui1jian4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, turn left at the intersection ahead and there's a small eatery. Their braised pork rice is their signature dish, and many people recommend it.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 앞쪽 사거리에서 좌회전하면 작은 음식점이 있는데 거기의 루로우판이 시그니처 메뉴이고 많은 사람들이 추천해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 太好了，那我們就去那家小吃店吧。謝謝你的建議！
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, nà wǒmen jiù qù nà jiā xiǎochī diàn ba. Xièxiè nǐ de jiànyì!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le, na4 wo3men jiu4 qu4 na4 jia1 xiao3chi1 dian4 ba. Xie4xie4 ni3 de jian4yi4!
turns.translation_en: Great, then let's go to that small eatery. Thank you for your suggestion!
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 그 음식점으로 갑시다. 추천 감사합니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does A want to eat?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about your favorite restaurant and what you like to order there.

title: 選擇時間

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們明天下午碰面，你覺得幾點比較方便？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen míngtiān xiàwǔ pèngmiàn, nǐ juéde jǐ diǎn bǐjiào fāngbiàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men ming2tian1 xia4wu3 peng4mian4, ni3 jue2de ji3 dian3 bi3jiao4 fang1bian4?
turns.translation_en: We're meeting tomorrow afternoon. What time do you think is more convenient?
turns.translation_ko: 내일 오후에 만나는데 몇 시가 더 편하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我下午兩點到四點有空，三點怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn dào sì diǎn yǒu kòng, sān diǎn zěnme yàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 dao4 si4 dian3 you3 kong4, san1 dian3 zen3 me0 yang4?
turns.translation_en: I'm free from 2 to 4 PM. How about 3 o'clock?
turns.translation_ko: 저는 오후 2시부터 4시까지 시간이 있는데 3시는 어떠세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 三點可以，不過我想提早到兩點半，因為我晚上還有事。
turns.pinyin: Sān diǎn kěyǐ, bùguò wǒ xiǎng tízǎo dào liǎng diǎn bàn, yīnwèi wǒ wǎnshàng hái yǒu shì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: San1 dian3 ke3yi3, bu4guo4 wo3 xiang3 ti2zao3 dao4 liang3 dian3 ban4, yin1wei4 wo3 wan3shang4 hai2 you3 shi4.
turns.translation_en: 3 o'clock is fine, but I'd like to move it earlier to 2:30 because I have something to do in the evening.
turns.translation_ko: 3시도 괜찮은데, 제가 저녁에 일이 있어서 2시 30분으로 일찍 당기고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，那就兩點半在咖啡店碰面，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, nà jiù liǎng diǎn bàn zài kāfēi diàn pèngmiàn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, na4 jiu4 liang3 dian3 ban4 zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 peng4mian4, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: No problem, then let's meet at the coffee shop at 2:30, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 그럼 2시 30분에 커피숍에서 만나요, 괜찮죠?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，兩點半見，謝謝你改時間。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, liǎng diǎn bàn jiàn, xièxiè nǐ gǎi shíjiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, liang3 dian3 ban4 jian4, xie4xie4 ni3 gai3 shi2jian1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, see you at 2:30. Thank you for changing the time.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 2시 30분에 뵙겠습니다. 시간을 변경해 주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What time do they finally agree to meet?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 그들은 최종적으로 몇 시에 만나기로 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about a time you had to change a meeting time. What happened?

title: 選擇路線

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，請問到台北車站要怎麼走？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn dào Táiběi chēzhàn yào zěnme zǒu?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si, qing3wen4 dao4 Tai2bei3 che1zhan4 yao4 zen3 me0 zou3?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get to Taipei Main Station?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 타이베이 역까지 어떻게 가나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你可以搭捷運，也可以搭公車。你比較想選哪一種？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ dā jiéyùn, yě kěyǐ dā gōngchē. Nǐ bǐjiào xiǎng xuǎn nǎ yī zhǒng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ke3yi3 da1 jie2yun4, ye3 ke3yi3 da1 gong1che1. Ni3 bi3jiao4 xiang3 xuan3 na3 yi1 zhong3?
turns.translation_en: You can take the MRT or the bus. Which one would you prefer?
turns.translation_ko: 지하철을 타도 되고 버스를 타도 됩니다. 어떤 것을 더 선호하시나요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我趕時間，哪一條路線比較快？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ gǎn shíjiān, nǎ yī tiáo lùxiàn bǐjiào kuài?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 gan3 shi2jian1, na3 yi1 tiao2 lu4xian4 bi3jiao4 kuai4?
turns.translation_en: I'm in a hurry. Which route is faster?
turns.translation_ko: 시간이 촉박한데 어떤 경로가 더 빠른가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 捷運比較快，大概十五分鐘就到了。公車可能要三十分鐘。
turns.pinyin: Jiéyùn bǐjiào kuài, dàgài shíwǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le. Gōngchē kěnéng yào sānshí fēnzhōng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jie2yun4 bi3jiao4 kuai4, da4gai4 shi2wu3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le. Gong1che1 ke3neng2 yao4 san1shi2 fen1zhong1.
turns.translation_en: The MRT is faster, about 15 minutes. The bus might take 30 minutes.
turns.translation_ko: 지하철이 더 빠릅니다. 약 15분이면 도착해요. 버스는 30분 정도 걸릴 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，那我搭捷運。請問捷運站入口在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒ dā jiéyùn. Qǐngwèn jiéyùn zhàn rùkǒu zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, na4 wo3 da1 jie2yun4. Qing3wen4 jie2yun4 zhan4 ru4kou3 zai4 na3li3?
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll take the MRT. Where is the MRT station entrance?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 지하철을 타겠습니다. 지하철역 입구가 어디에 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 前面路口右轉，走兩分鐘就到了。
turns.pinyin: Qiánmiàn lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, zǒu liǎng fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qian2mian4 lu4kou3 you4 zhuan3, zou3 liang3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le.
turns.translation_en: Turn right at the intersection ahead, and it's a two-minute walk.
turns.translation_ko: 앞쪽 사거리에서 우회전하면 2분 거리입니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝你，幫我選了最快的路線！
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè nǐ, bāng wǒ xuǎn le zuì kuài de lùxiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4 ni3, bang1 wo3 xuan3 le zui4 kuai4 de lu4xian4!
turns.translation_en: Thank you for helping me choose the fastest route!
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 가장 빠른 경로를 선택하는 데 도움을 주셨어요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Which route does A choose?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.
free_response_prompt: Tell me about a time you asked for directions. What did you say?

title: 為什麼學中文
scenario: where you are from, why you are learning, what you do

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，請問你從哪裡來？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ cóng nǎlǐ lái?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 cong2 na3li3 lai2?
turns.translation_en: Hello, may I ask where you are from?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 어디에서 오셨나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我從美國來。我的故鄉在紐約。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ cóng Měiguó lái. Wǒ de gùxiāng zài Niǔyuē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 cong2 Mei3guo2 lai2. Wo3 de gu4xiang1 zai4 Niu3yue1.
turns.translation_en: I'm from the United States. My hometown is New York.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 미국에서 왔어요. 제 고향은 뉴욕이에요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你為什麼想學中文？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme xiǎng xué Zhōngwén?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 wei4 shen2 me0 xiang3 xue2 Zhong1wen2?
turns.translation_en: Why do you want to learn Chinese?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 중국어를 배우고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 因為我喜歡台灣的文化，也覺得中文很有意思。
turns.pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ xǐhuān Táiwān de wénhuà, yě juéde Zhōngwén hěn yǒuyìsi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yin1wei4 wo3 xi3huan1 Tai2wan1 de wen2hua4, ye3 jue2de Zhong1wen2 hen3 you3yi4si.
turns.translation_en: Because I like Taiwanese culture, and I also think Chinese is very interesting.
turns.translation_ko: 대만 문화가 좋고, 중국어도 아주 재미있다고 생각해서요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你學中文多久了？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xué Zhōngwén duōjiǔ le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xue2 Zhong1wen2 duo1jiu3 le?
turns.translation_en: How long have you been learning Chinese?
turns.translation_ko: 중국어를 배운 지 얼마나 되었나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我已經學了半年。希望將來可以說得很流利。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng xué le bàn nián. Xīwàng jiānglái kěyǐ shuō de hěn liúlì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yi3jing1 xue2 le ban4 nian2. Xi1wang4 jiang1lai2 ke3yi3 shuo1 de hen3 liu2li4.
turns.translation_en: I've been learning for half a year. I hope to speak fluently in the future.
turns.translation_ko: 반 년째 배우고 있어요. 앞으로 유창하게 말할 수 있으면 좋겠어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 加油！你已經進步很多了。
turns.pinyin: Jiāyóu! Nǐ yǐjīng jìnbù hěn duō le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jia1you2! Ni3 yi3jing1 jin4bu4 hen3 duo1 le.
turns.translation_en: Keep it up! You've already improved a lot.
turns.translation_ko: 힘내세요! 벌써 많이 발전했어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 謝謝！我會繼續努力的。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie! Wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì de.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie! Wo3 hui4 ji4xu4 nu3li4 de.
turns.translation_en: Thank you! I will keep working hard.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다! 계속 노력할게요.

title: 在台灣多久了
scenario: where you are from, why you are learning, what you do

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你來台灣多久了？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ lái Táiwān duōjiǔ le?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 lai2 Tai2wan1 duo1jiu3 le?
turns.translation_en: How long have you been in Taiwan?
turns.translation_ko: 대만에 온 지 얼마나 되었나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我來台灣已經兩年了。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ lái Táiwān yǐjīng liǎng nián le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 lai2 Tai2wan1 yi3jing1 liang3 nian2 le.
turns.translation_en: I've been in Taiwan for two years.
turns.translation_ko: 대만에 온 지 2년 되었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你住在哪個城市？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhù zài nǎge chéngshì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhu4 zai4 na3ge cheng2shi4?
turns.translation_en: Which city do you live in?
turns.translation_ko: 어느 도시에 살고 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我住在台北。台北是一個很熱鬧的城市。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zhù zài Táiběi. Táiběi shì yīge hěn rènào de chéngshì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zhu4 zai4 Tai2bei3. Tai2bei3 shi4 yi1ge hen3 re4nao4 de cheng2shi4.
turns.translation_en: I live in Taipei. Taipei is a very lively city.
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이에 살아요. 타이베이는 아주 번화한 도시예요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你現在在做什麼工作？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiànzài zài zuò shénme gōngzuò?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xian4zai4 zai4 zuo4 shen2 me0 gong1zuo4?
turns.translation_en: What work are you doing now?
turns.translation_ko: 지금 무슨 일을 하고 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我是一個學生，也在學中文。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ shì yīge xuéshēng, yě zài xué Zhōngwén.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 shi4 yi1ge xue2sheng1, ye3 zai4 xue2 Zhong1wen2.
turns.translation_en: I am a student, and I'm also learning Chinese.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 학생이고, 중국어도 배우고 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你的目標是什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ de mùbiāo shì shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 de mu4biao1 shi4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What is your goal?
turns.translation_ko: 목표가 무엇인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我希望將來可以通過中文考試。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xīwàng jiānglái kěyǐ tōngguò Zhōngwén kǎoshì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xi1wang4 jiang1lai2 ke3yi3 tong1guo4 Zhong1wen2 kao3shi4.
turns.translation_en: I hope to pass the Chinese exam in the future.
turns.translation_ko: 앞으로 중국어 시험에 합격할 수 있으면 좋겠어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How long has the speaker been in Taiwan?

title: 自我介紹
scenario: where you are from, why you are learning, what you do

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，請你介紹一下自己。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng nǐ jièshào yīxià zìjǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 ni3 jie4shao4 yi1xia4 zi4ji3.
turns.translation_en: Hello, please introduce yourself.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 자기소개를 해 주세요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的。我叫王小明，從日本來。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de. Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng, cóng Rìběn lái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de. Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2, cong2 Ri4ben3 lai2.
turns.translation_en: Okay. My name is Wang Xiaoming, and I'm from Japan.
turns.translation_ko: 네. 제 이름은 왕샤오밍이고, 일본에서 왔어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你的故鄉在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ de gùxiāng zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 de gu4xiang1 zai4 na3li3?
turns.translation_en: Where is your hometown?
turns.translation_ko: 고향이 어디인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我的故鄉在東京。我在那裡出生長大。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ de gùxiāng zài Dōngjīng. Wǒ zài nàlǐ chūshēng zhǎngdà.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 de gu4xiang1 zai4 Dong1jing1. Wo3 zai4 na4li3 chu1sheng1 zhang3da4.
turns.translation_en: My hometown is Tokyo. I was born and grew up there.
turns.translation_ko: 제 고향은 도쿄예요. 거기서 태어나서 자랐어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你為什麼來台灣？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme lái Táiwān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 wei4 shen2 me0 lai2 Tai2wan1?
turns.translation_en: Why did you come to Taiwan?
turns.translation_ko: 왜 대만에 오셨나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我來台灣留學，想學中文和了解台灣文化。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ lái Táiwān liúxué, xiǎng xué Zhōngwén hé liǎojiě Táiwān wénhuà.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 lai2 Tai2wan1 liu2xue2, xiang3 xue2 Zhong1wen2 he2 liao3jie3 Tai2wan1 wen2hua4.
turns.translation_en: I came to Taiwan to study abroad, to learn Chinese and understand Taiwanese culture.
turns.translation_ko: 유학 왔어요. 중국어를 배우고 대만 문화를 이해하고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你現在是學生嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiànzài shì xuéshēng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xian4zai4 shi4 xue2sheng1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Are you a student now?
turns.translation_ko: 지금 학생인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，我現在是學生，也在打工。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ xiànzài shì xuéshēng, yě zài dǎgōng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 xian4zai4 shi4 xue2sheng1, ye3 zai4 da3gong1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I'm a student now, and I also work part-time.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 지금 학생이고 아르바이트도 하고 있어요.

title: 認識新朋友
scenario: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好！我叫小明，你叫什麼名字？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ jiào Xiǎo Míng, nǐ jiào shénme míngzì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3! Wo3 jiao4 Xiao3 Ming2, ni3 jiao4 shen2 me0 ming2zi4?
turns.translation_en: Hello! My name is Xiao Ming, what's your name?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요! 저는 샤오밍이라고 합니다. 이름이 어떻게 되세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你好，我叫小華，很高興認識你。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiào Xiǎo Huá, hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 jiao4 Xiao3 Hua2, hen3 gao1xing4 ren4shi5 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Hello, my name is Xiao Hua, nice to meet you.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 샤오화라고 합니다. 만나서 반갑습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你的興趣是什麼？我喜歡看電影和聽音樂。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ de xìngqù shì shénme? Wǒ xǐhuān kàn diànyǐng hé tīng yīnyuè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 de5 xing4qu4 shi4 shen2 me0? Wo3 xi3huan1 kan4 dian4ying3 he2 ting1 yin1yue4.
turns.translation_en: What are your hobbies? I like watching movies and listening to music.
turns.translation_ko: 취미가 무엇인가요? 저는 영화 보는 것과 음악 듣는 것을 좋아합니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我也喜歡聽音樂，最近很忙，不過週末有空。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yě xǐhuān tīng yīnyuè, zuìjìn hěn máng, búguò zhōumò yǒu kòng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ye3 xi3huan1 ting1 yin1yue4, zui4jin4 hen3 mang2, bu2guo4 zhou1mo4 you3 kong4.
turns.translation_en: I also like listening to music. I've been busy lately, but I'm free on weekends.
turns.translation_ko: 저도 음악 듣는 것을 좋아합니다. 요즘 바쁘지만 주말에는 시간이 있습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 真的嗎？那我們可以一起去看電影，你覺得怎麼樣？
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nà wǒmen kěyǐ yìqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, nǐ juéde zěnmeyàng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhen1 de5 ma5? Na4 wo3men5 ke3yi3 yi4qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, ni3 jue2de5 zen3 me0yang4?
turns.translation_en: Really? Then we can go see a movie together, what do you think?
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 그럼 우리 함께 영화 보러 갈 수 있는데, 어떻게 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！下次週末見面，再聊。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Xià cì zhōumò jiànmiàn, zài liáo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5! Xia4 ci4 zhou1mo4 jian4mian4, zai4 liao2.
turns.translation_en: Sure! Let's meet next weekend and chat more.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 다음 주말에 만나서 더 이야기해요.

title: 語言交換
scenario: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我叫大衛，我從美國來。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiào Dà Wèi, wǒ cóng Měiguó lái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 jiao4 Da4 Wei4, wo3 cong2 Mei3guo2 lai2.
turns.translation_en: Hello, my name is David, I'm from the United States.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 데이비드라고 합니다. 미국에서 왔습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你好，我叫美玲，我是台灣人。你想學中文嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiào Měi Líng, wǒ shì Táiwān rén. Nǐ xiǎng xué Zhōngwén ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 jiao4 Mei3 Ling2, wo3 shi4 Tai2wan1 ren2. Ni3 xiang3 xue2 Zhong1wen2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Hello, my name is Mei Ling, I'm Taiwanese. Do you want to learn Chinese?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 메이링이라고 합니다. 저는 대만 사람입니다. 중국어를 배우고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對啊，我想學中文，不過我的中文不太好。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, wǒ xiǎng xué Zhōngwén, búguò wǒ de Zhōngwén bú tài hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a5, wo3 xiang3 xue2 Zhong1wen2, bu2guo4 wo3 de5 Zhong1wen2 bu2 tai4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I want to learn Chinese, but my Chinese is not very good.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 중국어를 배우고 싶은데, 제 중국어가 별로 좋지 않습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒關係，我們可以一起練習。你教我英文，我教你中文。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, wǒmen kěyǐ yìqǐ liànxí. Nǐ jiào wǒ Yīngwén, wǒ jiào nǐ Zhōngwén.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi5, wo3men5 ke3yi3 yi4qi3 lian4xi2. Ni3 jiao4 wo3 Ying1wen2, wo3 jiao4 ni3 Zhong1wen2.
turns.translation_en: No problem, we can practice together. You teach me English, I teach you Chinese.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 우리 함께 연습할 수 있어요. 당신이 저에게 영어를 가르치고, 제가 당신에게 중국어를 가르칠게요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 太好了！你覺得我們什麼時候可以見面？
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Nǐ juéde wǒmen shénme shíhou kěyǐ jiànmiàn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le5! Ni3 jue2de5 wo3men5 shen2 me0 shi2hou5 ke3yi3 jian4mian4?
turns.translation_en: Great! When do you think we can meet?
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋아요! 우리 언제 만날 수 있을까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 這個週末方便嗎？我們可以約在咖啡店聊天。
turns.pinyin: Zhège zhōumò fāngbiàn ma? Wǒmen kěyǐ yuē zài kāfēi diàn liáotiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 fang1bian4 ma5? Wo3men5 ke3yi3 yue1 zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 liao2tian1.
turns.translation_en: Is this weekend convenient? We can meet at a coffee shop and chat.
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 괜찮으세요? 커피숍에서 만나서 이야기할 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，下次見！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, xià cì jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, xia4 ci4 jian4!
turns.translation_en: Sure, see you next time!
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 다음에 뵙겠습니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What do A and B plan to do together?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A와 B는 함께 무엇을 하기로 했습니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Introduce yourself and say which language you want to learn. Then suggest a time to meet for language exchange.

title: 鄰居聊天
scenario: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，我是你的新鄰居，我住在一樓。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ shì nǐ de xīn línjū, wǒ zhù zài yī lóu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 shi4 ni3 de5 xin1 lin2ju1, wo3 zhu4 zai4 yi1 lou2.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'm your new neighbor, I live on the first floor.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 당신의 새 이웃입니다. 1층에 살고 있습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你好！我叫王太太，我住在三樓。歡迎你！
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ jiào Wáng tàitai, wǒ zhù zài sān lóu. Huānyíng nǐ!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3! Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 tai4tai5, wo3 zhu4 zai4 san1 lou2. Huan1ying2 ni3!
turns.translation_en: Hello! My name is Mrs. Wang, I live on the third floor. Welcome!
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요! 저는 왕 부인이라고 합니다. 3층에 살고 있습니다. 환영합니다!

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝！最近你忙嗎？我剛搬來，還在整理東西。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie! Zuìjìn nǐ máng ma? Wǒ gāng bān lái, hái zài zhěnglǐ dōngxi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5! Zui4jin4 ni3 mang2 ma5? Wo3 gang1 ban1 lai2, hai2 zai4 zheng3li3 dong1xi5.
turns.translation_en: Thank you! Have you been busy lately? I just moved in and am still organizing things.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다! 요즘 바쁘세요? 저는 이사 온 지 얼마 안 되어 아직 정리 중입니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我也很忙，不過週末打算休息一下。你有空可以來我家坐坐。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yě hěn máng, búguò zhōumò dǎsuàn xiūxí yíxià. Nǐ yǒu kòng kěyǐ lái wǒ jiā zuò zuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ye3 hen3 mang2, bu2guo4 zhou1mo4 da3suan4 xiu1xi5 yi2xia4. Ni3 you3 kong4 ke3yi3 lai2 wo3 jia1 zuo4 zuo5.
turns.translation_en: I'm also very busy, but I plan to rest a bit on the weekend. If you're free, you can come over to my place and sit for a while.
turns.translation_ko: 저도 바쁘지만 주말에는 좀 쉴 생각입니다. 시간이 되시면 저희 집에 놀러 오세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，改天見！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, gǎitiān jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, gai3tian1 jian4!
turns.translation_en: Sure, see you another day!
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 다음에 뵙겠습니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where does the new neighbor live?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Introduce yourself as a new neighbor and ask your neighbor how they are doing. Then suggest meeting for tea.

title: 從車站到咖啡店再到聊天
scenario: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，請問從車站到咖啡店怎麼走？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn cóng chēzhàn dào kāfēi diàn zěnme zǒu?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 cong2 che1 zhan4 dao4 ka1 fei1 dian4 zen3 me0 zou3?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get from the station to the coffee shop?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 역에서 커피숍까지 어떻게 가나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你一直走，到路口左轉，咖啡店就在對面。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yìzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, kāfēi diàn jiù zài duìmiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 yi4 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4 kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, ka1 fei1 dian4 jiu4 zai4 dui4 mian4.
turns.translation_en: Go straight, turn left at the intersection, and the coffee shop is right across the street.
turns.translation_ko: 계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 좌회전하시면, 커피숍이 바로 맞은편에 있습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝你。我想買一杯咖啡，多少錢？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yì bēi kāfēi, duōshao qián?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4 xie5 ni3. Wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi4 bei1 ka1 fei1, duo1 shao5 qian2?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. I'd like to buy a cup of coffee, how much is it?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 커피 한 잔 사고 싶은데, 얼마인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 一杯咖啡六十塊。你要內用還是外帶？
turns.pinyin: Yì bēi kāfēi liùshí kuài. Nǐ yào nèiyòng háishì wàidài?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi4 bei1 ka1 fei1 liu4 shi2 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 nei4 yong4 hai2 shi4 wai4 dai4?
turns.translation_en: One cup of coffee is sixty dollars. Will you have it here or take it away?
turns.translation_ko: 커피 한 잔에 60위안입니다. 매장에서 드실 건가요, 테이크아웃하실 건가요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 內用。我給你一百塊，請找我四十塊。
turns.pinyin: Nèiyòng. Wǒ gěi nǐ yì bǎi kuài, qǐng zhǎo wǒ sìshí kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Nei4 yong4. Wo3 gei3 ni3 yi4 bai3 kuai4, qing3 zhao3 wo3 si4 shi2 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: I'll have it here. I'll give you one hundred dollars, please give me forty dollars change.
turns.translation_ko: 매장에서 먹을게요. 100위안 드릴 테니, 40위안 거슬러 주세요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，這是你的咖啡和找錢。你住附近嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhè shì nǐ de kāfēi hé zhǎo qián. Nǐ zhù fùjìn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, zhe4 shi4 ni3 de5 ka1 fei1 he2 zhao3 qian2. Ni3 zhu4 fu4 jin4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Okay, here's your coffee and change. Do you live nearby?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기 커피와 거스름돈입니다. 근처에 사시나요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對，我剛搬到這裡。我想認識新朋友，你有空聊天嗎？
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ gāng bān dào zhèlǐ. Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou, nǐ yǒu kòng liáotiān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 gang1 ban1 dao4 zhe4 li3. Wo3 xiang3 ren4 shi5 xin1 peng2 you5, ni3 you3 kong4 liao2 tian1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Yes, I just moved here. I'd like to make new friends, do you have time to chat?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 방금 이곳으로 이사 왔어요. 새로운 친구를 사귀고 싶은데, 시간 돼서 이야기 좀 할 수 있을까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，我現在不忙。我們可以聊一下。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, wǒ xiànzài bù máng. Wǒmen kěyǐ liáo yíxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, wo3 xian4 zai4 bu4 mang2. Wo3 men5 ke3 yi3 liao2 yi2 xia4.
turns.translation_en: Sure, I'm not busy now. We can chat for a bit.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 지금 바쁘지 않아요. 잠깐 이야기 나눠요.

title: 走錯地方和修理
scenario: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 請問，這裡是修理手機的地方嗎？
turns.pinyin: Qǐng wèn, zhèlǐ shì xiūlǐ shǒujī de dìfang ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qing3 wen4, zhe4 li3 shi4 xiu1 li3 shou3 ji1 de5 di4 fang5 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, is this the place to repair phones?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 여기가 휴대폰 수리하는 곳인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不好意思，你走錯了。修理手機的地方在路口對面。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, nǐ zǒu cuò le. Xiūlǐ shǒujī de dìfang zài lùkǒu duìmiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, ni3 zou3 cuo4 le5. Xiu1 li3 shou3 ji1 de5 di4 fang5 zai4 lu4 kou3 dui4 mian4.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, you're in the wrong place. The phone repair shop is across the intersection.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 잘못 오셨어요. 휴대폰 수리하는 곳은 교차로 맞은편에 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝。我走過去看看。我的手機壞了，需要修理。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Wǒ zǒu guòqù kànkan. Wǒ de shǒujī huài le, xūyào xiūlǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4 xie5. Wo3 zou3 guo4 qu4 kan4 kan5. Wo3 de5 shou3 ji1 huai4 le5, xu1 yao4 xiu1 li3.
turns.translation_en: Thank you. I'll go over and take a look. My phone is broken and needs repair.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 건너가서 볼게요. 제 휴대폰이 고장 나서 수리가 필요해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題。你要買東西嗎？我們這裡有便宜的充電線。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Nǐ yào mǎi dōngxi ma? Wǒmen zhèlǐ yǒu piányi de chōngdiàn xiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4 ti2. Ni3 yao4 mai3 dong1 xi5 ma5? Wo3 men5 zhe4 li3 you3 pian2 yi5 de5 chong1 dian4 xian4.
turns.translation_en: No problem. Do you want to buy something? We have cheap charging cables here.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요. 물건 사실 건가요? 여기 싼 충전 케이블이 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，一條充電線多少錢？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, yì tiáo chōngdiàn xiàn duōshao qián?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, yi4 tiao2 chong1 dian4 xian4 duo1 shao5 qian2?
turns.translation_en: Sure, how much is one charging cable?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 충전 케이블 하나에 얼마인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 一條一百塊。你要算便宜一點嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yì tiáo yì bǎi kuài. Nǐ yào suàn piányi yì diǎn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi4 tiao2 yi4 bai3 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 suan4 pian2 yi5 yi4 dian3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: One is one hundred dollars. Do you want it a bit cheaper?
turns.translation_ko: 하나에 100위안입니다. 좀 더 싸게 해 드릴까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 可以算八十塊嗎？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ suàn bāshí kuài ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3 yi3 suan4 ba1 shi2 kuai4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Can you make it eighty dollars?
turns.translation_ko: 80위안으로 해 주실 수 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好吧，八十塊給你。謝謝！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo ba, bāshí kuài gěi nǐ. Xièxie!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 ba5, ba1 shi2 kuai4 gei3 ni3. Xie4 xie5!
turns.translation_en: Alright, eighty dollars for you. Thank you!
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 80위안에 드릴게요. 감사합니다!
