title: 問路、買東西和聊天
scenario: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 請問，便利商店怎麼走？我想買東西。
turns.pinyin: Qǐng wèn, biànlì shāngdiàn zěnme zǒu? Wǒ xiǎng mǎi dōngxi.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qing3 wen4, bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 zen3 me0 zou3? Wo3 xiang3 mai3 dong1 xi5.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the convenience store? I would like to buy something.
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 편의점은 어떻게 가나요? 물건을 사고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你一直走，到路口右轉，便利商店就在左邊。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ yìzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, biànlì shāngdiàn jiù zài zuǒbiān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 yi4 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4 kou3 you4 zhuan3, bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 jiu4 zai4 zuo3 bian1.
turns.translation_en: Go straight, turn right at the intersection, and the convenience store is on the left.
turns.translation_ko: 계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 우회전하시면, 편의점이 왼쪽에 있습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 謝謝。我到了。請問，一個三明治多少錢？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Wǒ dào le. Qǐng wèn, yí ge sānmíngzhì duōshao qián?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4 xie5. Wo3 dao4 le5. Qing3 wen4, yi2 ge5 san1 ming2 zhi4 duo1 shao5 qian2?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. I've arrived. Excuse me, how much is a sandwich?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 도착했어요. 실례합니다, 샌드위치 하나는 얼마인가요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 一個三明治三十五塊。你要買嗎？
turns.pinyin: Yí ge sānmíngzhì sānshíwǔ kuài. Nǐ yào mǎi ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi2 ge5 san1 ming2 zhi4 san1 shi2 wu3 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 mai3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: One sandwich is thirty-five dollars. Do you want to buy it?
turns.translation_ko: 샌드위치 하나에 35위안입니다. 사시겠어요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，我買一個。我給你五十塊，請找我十五塊。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ mǎi yí ge. Wǒ gěi nǐ wǔshí kuài, qǐng zhǎo wǒ shíwǔ kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 mai3 yi2 ge5. Wo3 gei3 ni3 wu3 shi2 kuai4, qing3 zhao3 wo3 shi2 wu3 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll buy one. I'll give you fifty dollars, please give me fifteen dollars change.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 하나 살게요. 50위안 드릴 테니, 15위안 거슬러 주세요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好的，這是你的三明治和找錢。你住附近嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhè shì nǐ de sānmíngzhì hé zhǎo qián. Nǐ zhù fùjìn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, zhe4 shi4 ni3 de5 san1 ming2 zhi4 he2 zhao3 qian2. Ni3 zhu4 fu4 jin4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Okay, here's your sandwich and change. Do you live nearby?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기 샌드위치와 거스름돈입니다. 근처에 사시나요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 對，我住附近。我想認識新朋友，你有空聊天嗎？
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ zhù fùjìn. Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou, nǐ yǒu kòng liáotiān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 zhu4 fu4 jin4. Wo3 xiang3 ren4 shi5 xin1 peng2 you5, ni3 you3 kong4 liao2 tian1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Yes, I live nearby. I'd like to make new friends, do you have time to chat?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 근처에 살아요. 새로운 친구를 사귀고 싶은데, 시간 돼서 이야기 좀 할 수 있을까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，我現在不忙。我們可以聊一下。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, wǒ xiànzài bù máng. Wǒmen kěyǐ liáo yíxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, wo3 xian4 zai4 bu4 mang2. Wo3 men5 ke3 yi3 liao2 yi2 xia4.
turns.translation_en: Sure, I'm not busy now. We can chat for a bit.
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 지금 바쁘지 않아요. 잠깐 이야기 나눠요.

title: 看醫生掛號
scenario: health or housing problem from start to resolution

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 你好，我想要掛號。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào guàhào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 gua4hao4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like to register.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 접수하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: 櫃台人員
turns.text: 好的，請問你哪裡不舒服？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nǐ nǎlǐ bù shūfu?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3wen4 ni3 na3li3 bu4 shu1fu?
turns.translation_en: Okay, may I ask what's bothering you?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 어디가 불편하신가요?

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 我昨天開始發燒，還有咳嗽和頭痛。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ fāshāo, hái yǒu késòu hé tóutòng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 fa1shao1, hai2 you3 ke2sou4 he2 tou2tong4.
turns.translation_en: I started having a fever yesterday, plus a cough and headache.
turns.translation_ko: 어제부터 열이 나고, 기침과 두통도 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 櫃台人員
turns.text: 我幫你安排看醫生，請等一下。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nǐ ānpái kàn yīshēng, qǐng děng yīxià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bang1 ni3 an1pai2 kan4 yi1sheng1, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.
turns.translation_en: I'll arrange for you to see the doctor, please wait a moment.
turns.translation_ko: 의사 선생님 진료를 예약해 드릴게요, 잠시만 기다려 주세요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 謝謝。大概要等多久？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Dàgài yào děng duōjiǔ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5. Da4gai4 yao4 deng3 duo1jiu3?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. About how long do I need to wait?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 얼마나 기다려야 하나요?

turns.speaker: 櫃台人員
turns.text: 大概二十分鐘。這是你的掛號單，請拿好。
turns.pinyin: Dàgài èrshí fēnzhōng. Zhè shì nǐ de guàhào dān, qǐng ná hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Da4gai4 er4shi2 fen1zhong1. Zhe4 shi4 ni3 de gua4hao4 dan1, qing3 na2 hao3.
turns.translation_en: About twenty minutes. Here's your registration form, please hold onto it.
turns.translation_ko: 약 20분입니다. 접수증입니다, 잘 챙기세요.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 好的，沒問題。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, méi wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, mei2 wen4ti2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다.

title: 修理漏水
scenario: health or housing problem from start to resolution

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 房東，我房間的水龍頭壞掉了，一直在漏水。
turns.pinyin: Fángdōng, wǒ fángjiān de shuǐlóngtóu huài diào le, yīzhí zài lòushuǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Fang2dong1, wo3 fang2jian1 de shui3long2tou2 huai4 diao4 le, yi1zhi2 zai4 lou4shui3.
turns.translation_en: Landlord, the faucet in my room is broken and keeps leaking.
turns.translation_ko: 집주인님, 제 방 수도꼭지가 고장 나서 계속 물이 새고 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 不好意思，我馬上安排師傅過去檢查。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ mǎshàng ānpái shīfu guòqù jiǎnchá.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si5, wo3 ma3shang4 an1pai2 shi1fu4 guo4qu4 jian3cha2.
turns.translation_en: I'm sorry, I'll arrange for a repairman to come check it right away.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 바로 기사님을 보내서 확인하도록 하겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 謝謝。請問師傅什麼時候會來？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Qǐngwèn shīfu shénme shíhou huì lái?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5. Qing3wen4 shi1fu4 shen2 me0 shi2hou5 hui4 lai2?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. When will the repairman come?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 기사님은 언제 오시나요?

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 我幫你預約今天下午三點，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nǐ yùyuē jīntiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bang1 ni3 yu4yue1 jin1tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, ke3yi3 ma?
turns.translation_en: I'll make an appointment for today at 3 PM, is that okay?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 오후 3시로 예약해 드릴게요, 괜찮으신가요?

turns.speaker: 房客
turns.text: 可以，沒問題。
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, méi wèntí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, mei2 wen4ti2.
turns.translation_en: Yes, no problem.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 괜찮습니다.

turns.speaker: 房東
turns.text: 好的，我確認好再跟你說。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ quèrèn hǎo zài gēn nǐ shuō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 que4ren4 hao3 zai4 gen1 ni3 shuo1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll confirm and let you know.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 확인 후에 다시 알려드리겠습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What is the problem in the room?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Pretend you are a tenant. Tell your landlord that the faucet is broken and ask when the repairman can come.

title: 藥局拿藥
scenario: health or housing problem from start to resolution

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 你好，我剛剛看完醫生，這是藥單。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ gānggāng kàn wán yīshēng, zhè shì yào dān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 gang1gang1 kan4 wan2 yi1sheng1, zhe4 shi4 yao4 dan1.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I just saw the doctor. Here's the prescription.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 방금 진료를 받고 왔습니다. 처방전입니다.

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 好的，請等一下，我幫你準備藥。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià, wǒ bāng nǐ zhǔnbèi yào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4, wo3 bang1 ni3 zhun3bei4 yao4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, please wait a moment, I'll prepare your medicine.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요, 약을 준비해 드리겠습니다.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 謝謝。請問這個藥怎麼吃？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie. Qǐngwèn zhège yào zěnme chī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5. Qing3wen4 zhe4ge5 yao4 zen3 me0 chi1?
turns.translation_en: Thank you. How should I take this medicine?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 이 약은 어떻게 먹나요?

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 這個藥一天三次，飯後吃。一次吃一包。
turns.pinyin: Zhège yào yī tiān sān cì, fàn hòu chī. Yī cì chī yī bāo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4ge5 yao4 yi1 tian1 san1 ci4, fan4 hou4 chi1. Yi1 ci4 chi1 yi1 bao1.
turns.translation_en: Take this medicine three times a day, after meals. One packet each time.
turns.translation_ko: 이 약은 하루 세 번, 식후에 드세요. 한 번에 한 봉지씩 드시면 됩니다.

turns.speaker: 病人
turns.text: 好的，我了解了。謝謝你。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ liǎojiě le. Xièxie nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 liao3jie3 le. Xie4xie5 ni3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I understand. Thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 알겠습니다. 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: 藥師
turns.text: 不客氣，祝你早日康復。
turns.pinyin: Bú kèqì, zhù nǐ zǎorì kāngfù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu2 ke4qi4, zhu4 ni3 zao3ri4 kang1fu4.
turns.translation_en: You're welcome, I wish you a speedy recovery.
turns.translation_ko: 천만에요, 빨리 쾌차하시길 바랍니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How should the patient take the medicine?
options_en: Three times a day, after meals
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Three times a day, after meals

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Pretend you are at a pharmacy. Show the prescription and ask how to take the medicine.

title: 朋友約會衝突
scenario: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，這個星期六有空嗎？我想邀請你一起去看電影。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, zhège xīngqīliù yǒu kòng ma? Wǒ xiǎng yāoqǐng nǐ yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, zhe4 ge5 xing1 qi1 liu4 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3 xiang3 yao1 qing3 ni3 yi1 qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4 ying3.
turns.translation_en: Hello, are you free this Saturday? I would like to invite you to go see a movie together.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 이번 토요일에 시간 있으세요? 영화 보러 같이 가고 싶어서요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不好意思，我星期六已經有別的行程了。可以改期嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xīngqīliù yǐjīng yǒu bié de xíngchéng le. Kěyǐ gǎiqī ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 xing1 qi1 liu4 yi3 jing1 you3 bie2 de5 xing2 cheng2 le5. Ke3 yi3 gai3 qi1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I already have other plans on Saturday. Can we reschedule?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 토요일은 이미 다른 일정이 있어요. 날짜를 변경할 수 있을까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題，那你星期天方便嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, nà nǐ xīngqītiān fāngbiàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4 ti2, na4 ni3 xing1 qi1 tian1 fang1 bian4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: No problem, then are you free on Sunday?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 그럼 일요일에 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 星期天可以，不過下午三點以後才有空。
turns.pinyin: Xīngqītiān kěyǐ, bùguò xiàwǔ sān diǎn yǐhòu cái yǒu kòng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xing1 qi1 tian1 ke3 yi3, bu4 guo4 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3 yi3 hou4 cai2 you3 kong4.
turns.translation_en: Sunday works, but I'm only free after 3 PM.
turns.translation_ko: 일요일은 괜찮은데, 오후 3시 이후에나 시간이 나요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，那我們星期天下午三點半在電影院門口見面，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, nà wǒmen xīngqītiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn bàn zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, na4 wo3 men5 xing1 qi1 tian1 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3 ban4 zai4 dian4 ying3 yuan4 men2 kou3 jian4 mian4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Okay, then let's meet at the movie theater entrance at 3:30 PM on Sunday, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 일요일 오후 3시 30분에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，到時候見！謝謝你的邀請。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, dào shíhou jiàn! Xièxiè nǐ de yāoqǐng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4 ti2, dao4 shi2 hou5 jian4! Xie4 xie4 ni3 de5 yao1 qing3.
turns.translation_en: No problem, see you then! Thanks for the invitation.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 그때 뵙겠습니다! 초대해 주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did B want to reschedule?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著錄音，重複每個句子，注意語調和停頓。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文回答：你最近和朋友約會時，有沒有遇到時間衝突？你是怎麼解決的？

title: 遲到與改期
scenario: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 抱歉，我今天臨時有事，沒辦法準時到餐廳了。
turns.pinyin: Bàoqiàn, wǒ jīntiān línshí yǒu shì, méi bànfǎ zhǔnshí dào cāntīng le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bao4 qian4, wo3 jin1 tian1 lin2 shi2 you3 shi4, mei2 ban4 fa3 zhun3 shi2 dao4 can1 ting1 le5.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, something came up today and I can't make it to the restaurant on time.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 오늘 갑자기 일이 생겨서 식당에 제시간에 도착할 수 없어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒關係，那你大概會晚多久？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, nà nǐ dàgài huì wǎn duō jiǔ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1 xi5, na4 ni3 da4 gai4 hui4 wan3 duo1 jiu3?
turns.translation_en: No problem, then about how late will you be?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 그럼 대략 얼마나 늦을 예정인가요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 可能要晚一個小時，因為我還在公司忙。
turns.pinyin: Kěnéng yào wǎn yī ge xiǎoshí, yīnwèi wǒ hái zài gōngsī máng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3 neng2 yao4 wan3 yi1 ge5 xiao3 shi2, yin1 wei4 wo3 hai2 zai4 gong1 si1 mang2.
turns.translation_en: I might be an hour late because I'm still busy at the office.
turns.translation_ko: 한 시간 정도 늦을 것 같아요, 아직 회사에서 일하고 있어서요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 一個小時有點久，我們要不要改期？改天再約？
turns.pinyin: Yī ge xiǎoshí yǒudiǎn jiǔ, wǒmen yào bù yào gǎiqī? Gǎitiān zài yuē?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Yi1 ge5 xiao3 shi2 you3 dian3 jiu3, wo3 men5 yao4 bu4 yao4 gai3 qi1? Gai3 tian1 zai4 yue1?
turns.translation_en: An hour is a bit long. Should we reschedule? Meet another day?
turns.translation_ko: 한 시간은 좀 길어요. 날짜를 변경할까요? 다른 날 다시 만날까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，抱歉造成你的麻煩。那我們改下個星期三晚上，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, bàoqiàn zàochéng nǐ de máfan. Nà wǒmen gǎi xià ge xīngqīsān wǎnshàng, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, bao4 qian4 zao4 cheng2 ni3 de5 ma2 fan5. Na4 wo3 men5 gai3 xia4 ge5 xing1 qi1 san1 wan3 shang4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Okay, sorry for the trouble. Then let's change it to next Wednesday evening, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 불편을 끼쳐 죄송합니다. 그럼 다음 주 수요일 저녁으로 변경할까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 下星期三晚上我可以，那就敲定囉！
turns.pinyin: Xià ge xīngqīsān wǎnshàng wǒ kěyǐ, nà jiù qiāodìng luo!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xia4 ge5 xing1 qi1 san1 wan3 shang4 wo3 ke3 yi3, na4 jiu4 qiao1 ding4 luo5!
turns.translation_en: Next Wednesday evening works for me. Then it's settled!
turns.translation_ko: 다음 주 수요일 저녁 괜찮아요. 그럼 확정이네요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did A want to reschedule?

title: 團體行程調整
scenario: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 大家這個週末要不要一起去爬山？
turns.pinyin: Dàjiā zhège zhōumò yào bù yào yīqǐ qù páshān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Da4 jia1 zhe4 ge5 zhou1 mo4 yao4 bu4 yao4 yi1 qi3 qu4 pa2 shan1?
turns.translation_en: Everyone, do you want to go hiking together this weekend?
turns.translation_ko: 여러분, 이번 주말에 같이 등산 갈래요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我星期六有空，但是星期天不行，因為我要上班。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xīngqīliù yǒu kòng, dànshì xīngqītiān bù xíng, yīnwèi wǒ yào shàngbān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xing1 qi1 liu4 you3 kong4, dan4 shi4 xing1 qi1 tian1 bu4 xing2, yin1 wei4 wo3 yao4 shang4 ban1.
turns.translation_en: I'm free on Saturday, but not Sunday because I have to work.
turns.translation_ko: 토요일은 시간이 되는데, 일요일은 안 돼요, 일해야 해서요.

turns.speaker: C
turns.text: 我都可以，不過星期六下午三點以後比較好。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ dōu kěyǐ, bùguò xīngqīliù xiàwǔ sān diǎn yǐhòu bǐjiào hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 dou1 ke3 yi3, bu4 guo4 xing1 qi1 liu4 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3 yi3 hou4 bi3 jiao4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: I'm fine either way, but Saturday after 3 PM is better.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 다 괜찮은데, 토요일 오후 3시 이후가 더 좋아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，那我們就約星期六下午三點，在捷運站出口見面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒmen jiù yuē xīngqīliù xiàwǔ sān diǎn, zài jiéyùn zhàn chūkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, na4 wo3 men5 jiu4 yue1 xing1 qi1 liu4 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3, zai4 jie2 yun4 zhan4 chu1 kou3 jian4 mian4, ke3 yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Okay, then let's meet at the MRT station exit at 3 PM on Saturday, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 토요일 오후 3시에 지하철역 출구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，我會準時到。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒ huì zhǔnshí dào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4 ti2, wo3 hui4 zhun3 shi2 dao4.
turns.translation_en: No problem, I'll be there on time.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 제시간에 도착할게요.

turns.speaker: C
turns.text: 我也沒問題，到時候見！
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yě méi wèntí, dào shíhou jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ye3 mei2 wen4 ti2, dao4 shi2 hou5 jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem for me either, see you then!
turns.translation_ko: 저도 괜찮아요, 그때 뵙겠습니다!

title: 在咖啡店遇到朋友

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 欸，你怎麼也在這裡？好久不見！
turns.pinyin: Ēi, nǐ zěnme yě zài zhèlǐ? Hǎojiǔ bùjiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ei1, ni3 zen3 me0 ye3 zai4 zhe4li3? Hao3jiu3 bu4jian4!
turns.translation_en: Hey, what are you doing here? Long time no see!
turns.translation_ko: 어, 너도 여기 있었네? 오랜만이야!

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對啊，我剛下班，想說來買杯咖啡。你呢？
turns.pinyin: Duì a, wǒ gāng xiàbān, xiǎng shuō lái mǎi bēi kāfēi. Nǐ ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a, wo3 gang1 xia4ban1, xiang3 shuo1 lai2 mai3 bei1 ka1fei1. Ni3 ne?
turns.translation_en: Yeah, I just got off work and thought I'd grab a coffee. How about you?
turns.translation_ko: 응, 방금 퇴근해서 커피 한 잔 사러 왔어. 너는?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我來買一杯拿鐵，等一下要回去公司加班。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ lái mǎi yī bēi nǎtiě, děng yīxià yào huíqù gōngsī jiābān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 lai2 mai3 yi1 bei1 na3tie3, deng3 yi1xia4 yao4 hui2qu4 gong1si1 jia1ban1.
turns.translation_en: I came to buy a latte; I have to go back to the office to work overtime later.
turns.translation_ko: 나는 라떼 한 잔 사러 왔어, 곧 회사에 돌아가서 야근해야 해.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 辛苦了！那你要不要順便吃點東西？
turns.pinyin: Xīnkǔ le! Nà nǐ yào bùyào shùnbiàn chī diǎn dōngxī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xin1ku3 le! Na4 ni3 yao4 bu4yao4 shun4bian4 chi1 dian3 dong1xi1?
turns.translation_en: That sounds tough! Do you want to grab a bite to eat while you're at it?
turns.translation_ko: 수고했어! 그럼 너 뭐 좀 먹을래?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不用了，我剛剛已經吃過晚餐了。
turns.pinyin: Bùyòng le, wǒ gānggāng yǐjīng chī guò wǎncān le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4yong4 le, wo3 gang1gang1 yi3jing1 chi1 guo4 wan3can1 le.
turns.translation_en: No thanks, I already had dinner just now.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아, 아까 저녁 먹었어.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好吧，那下次有空我們再約吃飯！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo ba, nà xià cì yǒu kòng wǒmen zài yuē chīfàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 ba, na4 xia4 ci4 you3 kong4 wo3men zai4 yue1 chi1fan4!
turns.translation_en: Alright, then let's make plans to have a meal together next time we're free!
turns.translation_ko: 그래, 그럼 다음에 시간 되면 밥 먹자!

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，再聯絡！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, zài liánluò!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a, zai4 lian2luo4!
turns.translation_en: Sure, let's keep in touch!
turns.translation_ko: 응, 연락할게!

title: 在便利商店買東西

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 歡迎光臨！請問需要什麼？
turns.pinyin: Huānyíng guānglín! Qǐngwèn xūyào shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Huan1ying2 guang1lin2! Qing3wen4 xu1yao4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Welcome! What can I help you with?
turns.translation_ko: 어서 오세요! 무엇을 도와드릴까요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我要一個茶葉蛋和一杯小杯的熱拿鐵。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yào yī gè cháyèdàn hé yī bēi xiǎo bēi de rè nǎtiě.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yao4 yi1 ge4 cha2ye4dan4 he2 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de re4 na3tie3.
turns.translation_en: I'd like one tea egg and a small hot latte.
turns.translation_ko: 차 한 알과 작은 컵 따뜻한 라떼 하나 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，總共是六十五塊。請問要怎麼付款？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zǒnggòng shì liùshíwǔ kuài. Qǐngwèn yào zěnme fùkuǎn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zong3gong4 shi4 liu4shi2wu3 kuai4. Qing3wen4 yao4 zen3 me0 fu4kuan3?
turns.translation_en: Okay, that'll be 65 dollars total. How would you like to pay?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 총 65원입니다. 어떻게 결제하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我用悠遊卡付款。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yòng yōuyóukǎ fùkuǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yong4 you1you2ka3 fu4kuan3.
turns.translation_en: I'll pay with my EasyCard.
turns.translation_ko: 유유카드로 결제할게요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，請感應卡片。需要載具嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng gǎnyìng kǎpiàn. Xūyào zàijù ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 gan3ying4 ka3pian4. Xu1yao4 zai4ju4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Okay, please tap your card. Do you need a receipt for the invoice?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 카드를 대 주세요. 영수증이 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不用，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Bùyòng, xièxiè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4yong4, xie4xie4.
turns.translation_en: No, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 괜찮습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How much did the customer pay?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are at a convenience store. Describe what you buy and how you pay.

title: 問路去醫院

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，請問醫院怎麼走？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐngwèn yīyuàn zěnme zǒu?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4si, qing3wen4 yi1yuan4 zen3 me0 zou3?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the hospital?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 병원에 어떻게 가나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你往前走，到第二個路口左轉，就會看到了。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ wǎng qián zǒu, dào dì èr gè lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, jiù huì kàn dào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 wang3 qian2 zou3, dao4 di4 er4 ge4 lu4kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, jiu4 hui4 kan4 dao4 le.
turns.translation_en: Go straight ahead, turn left at the second intersection, and you'll see it.
turns.translation_ko: 앞으로 가서 두 번째 사거리에서 좌회전하면 보일 거예요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 大概要走多久？
turns.pinyin: Dàgài yào zǒu duō jiǔ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Da4gai4 yao4 zou3 duo1 jiu3?
turns.translation_en: About how long will it take to walk?
turns.translation_ko: 걸어서 얼마나 걸리나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 差不多十分鐘。
turns.pinyin: Chàbùduō shí fēnzhōng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Cha4bu4duo1 shi2 fen1zhong1.
turns.translation_en: About ten minutes.
turns.translation_ko: 대략 10분 정도요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好的，謝謝你！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, xie4xie4 ni3!
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you!
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다!

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不客氣，小心走。
turns.pinyin: Bù kèqì, xiǎoxīn zǒu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 ke4qi4, xiao3xin1 zou3.
turns.translation_en: You're welcome, walk safely.
turns.translation_ko: 천만에요, 조심히 가세요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Where does person A want to go?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Imagine you are asking for directions to a hospital. Describe the conversation.

title: Final Service Task: 在餐廳點餐
scenario: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 你好，歡迎光臨！請問今天想吃什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, huānyíng guānglín! Qǐngwèn jīntiān xiǎng chī shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, huan1ying2 guang1lin2! Qing3wen4 jin1tian1 xiang3 chi1 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Hello, welcome! What would you like to eat today?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 환영합니다! 오늘 무엇을 드시고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我想要一份牛肉麵，不要辣，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào yī fèn niúròumiàn, bù yào là, xièxie.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 fen4 niu2rou4mian4, bu4 yao4 la4, xie4xie.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I would like one bowl of beef noodles, not spicy, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 소고기 국수 한 그릇 주세요, 맵지 않게 해 주세요, 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，牛肉麵一份，不要辣。還要別的嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, niúròumiàn yī fèn, bù yào là. Hái yào bié de ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, niu2rou4mian4 yi1 fen4, bu4 yao4 la4. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de ma?
turns.translation_en: Okay, one bowl of beef noodles, not spicy. Anything else?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 소고기 국수 한 그릇, 맵지 않게요. 다른 것도 드릴까요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 還要一杯紅茶，少冰，內用。
turns.pinyin: Hái yào yī bēi hóngchá, shǎo bīng, nèiyòng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hai2 yao4 yi1 bei1 hong2cha2, shao3 bing1, nei4yong4.
turns.translation_en: Also a cup of black tea with light ice, for here.
turns.translation_ko: 홍차 한 잔도 주세요, 얼음 적게, 매장에서 먹을게요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題。總共是兩百一十塊。請問要怎麼付款？
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Zǒnggòng shì liǎng bǎi yī shí kuài. Qǐngwèn yào zěnme fùkuǎn?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Zong3gong4 shi4 liang3 bai3 yi1 shi2 kuai4. Qing3wen4 yao4 zen3 me0 fu4kuan3?
turns.translation_en: No problem. The total is 210 dollars. How would you like to pay?
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다. 총 210원입니다. 어떻게 결제하시겠습니까?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 我用信用卡付款。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ yòng xìnyòngkǎ fùkuǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yong4 xin4yong4ka3 fu4kuan3.
turns.translation_en: I'll pay with a credit card.
turns.translation_ko: 신용카드로 결제할게요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，請在這裡刷卡。這是您的發票，請拿好。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng zài zhèlǐ shuākǎ. Zhè shì nín de fāpiào, qǐng ná hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, qing3 zai4 zhe4li3 shua1ka3. Zhe4 shi4 nin2 de fa1piao4, qing3 na2 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Okay, please swipe your card here. Here is your receipt, please take it.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기서 카드를 긁어 주세요. 영수증입니다, 잘 챙기세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝，請問洗手間在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Xièxie, qǐngwèn xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie, qing3wen4 xi3shou3jian1 zai4 na3li3?
turns.translation_en: Thank you, where is the restroom?
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다, 화장실이 어디에 있나요?

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer order?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著店員和客人的對話，練習說出每一句話，注意語調和速度。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文說出你最近一次在餐廳點餐的經驗，包括你點了什麼、怎麼付款、餐廳的服務如何。

title: Final Social Task: 約朋友看電影
scenario: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你好，這個週末你有空嗎？我們一起去看電影好不好？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, zhège zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, zhe4ge zhou1mo4 ni3 you3 kong4 ma? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3 hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Hello, are you free this weekend? How about we go see a movie together?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 이번 주말에 시간 있으세요? 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我星期六下午有空。你想看什麼電影？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ xīngqīliù xiàwǔ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a! Wo3 xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 kan4 shen2 me0 dian4ying3?
turns.translation_en: Sure! I'm free Saturday afternoon. What movie do you want to see?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 토요일 오후에 시간 있어요. 무슨 영화 보고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我聽說最近有一部新的台灣電影，聽說很好看。我們去看那個好不好？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tīngshuō zuìjìn yǒu yī bù xīn de táiwān diànyǐng, tīngshuō hěn hǎokàn. Wǒmen qù kàn nàge hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ting1shuo1 zui4jin4 you3 yi1 bu4 xin1 de tai2wan1 dian4ying3, ting1shuo1 hen3 hao3kan4. Wo3men qu4 kan4 na4ge hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: I heard there's a new Taiwanese movie recently, and it's supposed to be very good. How about we go see that?
turns.translation_ko: 최근에 새 대만 영화가 나왔다고 들었는데, 재미있다고 해요. 그거 보러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！星期六下午兩點，在電影院門口見面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a! Xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 jian4mian4, ke3yi3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Sure! Saturday at 2 PM, meet at the movie theater entrance, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 토요일 오후 2시에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題，到時候見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, dào shíhou jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, dao4 shi2hou jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem, see you then!
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 그때 봐요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: When will A and B meet?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著A和B的對話，練習說出每一句話，注意約時間的用語。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文說出你最近一次和朋友約會做什麼，包括你們約了什麼時間、去哪裡、做了什麼事。

title: Final Problem Task: 在便利商店退貨
scenario: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，我昨天在這裡買了一個三明治，但是回家發現已經過期了。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ zuótiān zài zhèlǐ mǎi le yī ge sānmíngzhì, dànshì huí jiā fāxiàn yǐjīng guòqī le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 zuo2tian1 zai4 zhe4li3 mai3 le yi1 ge san1ming2zhi4, dan4shi4 hui2 jia1 fa1xian4 yi3jing1 guo4qi1 le.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I bought a sandwich here yesterday, but when I got home I found it was already expired.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 어제 여기서 샌드위치를 샀는데, 집에 가서 보니 이미 유통기한이 지났어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 真的嗎？不好意思，請讓我看看您的發票和商品。
turns.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐng ràng wǒ kànkan nín de fāpiào hé shāngpǐn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhen1 de ma? Bu4 hao3yi4si, qing3 rang4 wo3 kan4kan nin2 de fa1piao4 he2 shang1pin3.
turns.translation_en: Really? I'm sorry, please let me see your receipt and the item.
turns.translation_ko: 정말요? 죄송합니다, 영수증과 상품을 좀 보여주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，這是發票和三明治。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhè shì fāpiào hé sānmíngzhì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zhe4 shi4 fa1piao4 he2 san1ming2zhi4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, here is the receipt and the sandwich.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기 영수증과 샌드위치입니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 對不起，這是我們的問題。我馬上幫您退錢，或者您要換一個新的？
turns.pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, zhè shì wǒmen de wèntí. Wǒ mǎshàng bāng nín tuì qián, huòzhě nín yào huàn yī ge xīn de?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4bu4qi3, zhe4 shi4 wo3men de wen4ti2. Wo3 ma3shang4 bang1 nin2 tui4 qian2, huo4zhe3 nin2 yao4 huan4 yi1 ge xin1 de?
turns.translation_en: I'm sorry, this is our problem. I'll refund you right away, or would you like to exchange it for a new one?
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 저희 문제입니다. 바로 환불해 드리거나, 새 제품으로 교환해 드릴까요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 請幫我退錢，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ tuì qián, xièxie.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Qing3 bang1 wo3 tui4 qian2, xie4xie.
turns.translation_en: Please refund me, thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 환불해 주세요, 감사합니다.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，這是退給您的錢，總共四十五塊。真的很抱歉。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhè shì tuì gěi nín de qián, zǒnggòng sìshíwǔ kuài. Zhēn de hěn bàoqiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zhe4 shi4 tui4 gei3 nin2 de qian2, zong3gong4 si4shi2wu3 kuai4. Zhen1 de hen3 bao4qian4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, here is your refund, 45 dollars in total. I'm really sorry.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 환불해 드린 돈입니다, 총 45원입니다. 정말 죄송합니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 沒關係，謝謝你的幫忙。
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, xièxie nǐ de bāngmáng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi, xie4xie ni3 de bang1mang2.
turns.translation_en: It's okay, thank you for your help.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 도와주셔서 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why did the customer want a refund?

shadowing_prompt: 請跟著客人和店員的對話，練習說出每一句話，注意退貨的用語。
free_response_prompt: 請用中文說出你曾經退貨或換貨的經驗，包括你買了什麼、為什麼要退貨、店員怎麼處理。
